name: Josh Harder
subject: I’m concerned
body:
Trump’s Super PAC is targeting me.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110453497/554393090/-1860252395?refcode=-header-&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3MDY2ZmEtN2I1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SotPAtMKzQP5u5ArkJdNbsYBxZzEEJj0OBMmODLkRmI=) | Hi Peter, As you know, Trump’s Super PAC is dumping $300,000 into TV ads against me. No one saw this coming, and to be frank we weren’t prepared to have to defend ourselves this early. Trump knows this seat is vulnerable, and he’s trying to turn voters against me as early as possible. The worst part? These false ads are probably going to work. **I have to be able to respond, but we simply don’t have the money to do it this early. We’re just a few days out from our end-of-quarter deadline — and if we fall short, we won’t be able to keep up.** Here’s what’s at stake if we don’t reach our goal:
* Our rapid response ads won’t go up.
* We can’t hire organizers.
* Voters turn against us, early.

[_**We’ve never been out-organized and I want to keep it that way. Will you chip in today so we can meet our end-of-quarter goal and push back before it’s too late?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110453498/554393091/1119658952?&refcode=E13951-20250627-Concerned-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3MDY2ZmEtN2I1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SotPAtMKzQP5u5ArkJdNbsYBxZzEEJj0OBMmODLkRmI=) _If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your payment will go through immediately:_ | **[DONATE $5 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110453499/554393092/1119658952?express_lane=true&&refcode=E13951-20250627-Concerned-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3MDY2ZmEtN2I1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SotPAtMKzQP5u5ArkJdNbsYBxZzEEJj0OBMmODLkRmI=)** | **[DONATE $10 →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110453500/554393093/1119658952?express_lane=true&&refcode=E13951-20250627-Concerned-EG-DeadlineEOQ&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDMxMTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmE3MDY2ZmEtN2I1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=SotPAtMKzQP5u5ArkJdNbsYBxZzEEJj0OBMmODLkRmI=)**

This is what we're still up against: States have continued to execute an agenda of voter suppression, driven by partisan lies. Dark money and decades of work by opponents of voting rights have brought us here . It's scary and it shows just how far the vote suppressors are willing to go.
We've got to stop them wherever and however we can. RUSH $25 or more right now to fight back and defend our voting rights >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=LAf7fXkURmrqqivPIHmU0uTM7exT9UIix+H+wDJ5oqKDtB85c9Unb5XnHi7XVi/d3kcCL0JCxybVtEFBrX8ssonJ71QCHw0F6eHZHs0Qbco=]

Team, we're not kidding: Ten states enacted new voting restrictions in 2024 .
Brennan Center map of 10 states that made it harder to vote in 2024 [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=LAf7fXkURmrqqivPIHmU0uTM7exT9UIix+H+wDJ5oqKDtB85c9Unb5XnHi7XVi/d3kcCL0JCxybVtEFBrX8ssonJ71QCHw0F6eHZHs0Qbco=]
In fact, according to the nonpartisan Brennan Center For Justice, " states enacted more restrictive voting laws in 2024 than in any year in the last decade except for 2021 ".
From attacks on mail-in voting to suppressive citizenship proof requirements to legalized partisan election interference, states from Arizona to Georgia to North Carolina did their best to harm our fundamental right to vote. Opponents of voting rights have spent the last two decades attacking voting rights and 2025 looks to be no different.
Unlike the vote suppressors driving these new restrictions with their dark money millions, we believe that everyone’s voice should be heard and every vote should count . That's why we need your help to preserve and protect our democracy now.
Team, this is the fight of our lives. Opponents of voting rights are trying to make the progress we've made a distant memory. Push back in 2025 by pitching in $25 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=LAf7fXkURmrqqivPIHmU0uTM7exT9UIix+H+wDJ5oqKDtB85c9Unb5XnHi7XVi/d3kcCL0JCxybVtEFBrX8ssonJ71QCHw0F6eHZHs0Qbco=]

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.everyaction.com/Qyv_-_BiF0iduOUt5sZ0yw2?am=20.00&contactdata=LAf7fXkURmrqqivPIHmU0uTM7exT9UIix+H+wDJ5oqKDtB85c9Unb5XnHi7XVi/d3kcCL0JCxybVtEFBrX8ssonJ71QCHw0F6eHZHs0Qbco=]

name: Katie Porter
subject: My why
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
I didn’t make this decision lightly.
#
Hi Peter, Katie Porter here—candidate for California governor.
When I was asked who’s inspired me the most, I had an easy answer: my kids.
I wake up every morning and think about the kind of future my kids will have.
**Unless we make housing affordable, my kids won’t be able to live in California when they grow up. Without climate action, many of our communities will not be livable for my kids and their peers. And without a Governor who will stand up to Trump—or any wannabe dictator—my kids will have fewer rights than I did at their age.**
Running for office isn’t always easy. But when I think about the work I can do to secure a better future for my kids and millions of California children, I’m so inspired to do this work.
But I can’t do it without you.
**[Will you join me in building a stronger, more resilient California for generations to come by splitting a donation between State Democrats Committee and my campaign for governor?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90796?refcode=em20250628-9063&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9063%2E614464%2EbDDWIO)**
Thanks,
Katie

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=2&akid=9063%2E614464%2EbDDWIO).

name: Team Swalwell
subject: Republicans are arresting seniors in wheelchairs all for speaking out
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Swalwell For Congress
body:
In Trump’s America, demanding healthcare is apparently criminal. |
---
_Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. _
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110454072/554400916/-1590518309?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWFlYWQxNS03ZTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-ELt_seP1UqSsfmMGYnugDYcJU2s2rswSS29MeLjKY=&emci=aa852153-8053-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=a1aead15-7e54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=7878003)
Friend, this week, a group of seniors in wheelchairs came to the Capitol to do something simple and powerful: **Speak up for their healthcare.** They weren’t violent. They weren’t disruptive. They just wanted to be heard — **because up to 20 million seniors could lose Medicaid under the Republicans’ brutal new budget.** Their reward for showing up? **They were zip-tied and they were arrested.** Let that sink in: Seniors in wheelchairs were handcuffed in the U.S. Capitol because they protested Congress gutting their Medicaid _the very same week Mitch McConnell said we’d all “get over it.”_ [**Friend, if seniors and advocates from across the country can travel to DC to protest these disastrous cuts, we can show up, stand up, and use our collective voices to say “HELL NO” to Republicans’ moves to gut our healthcare. If you’re with us in this fight, pitch in ahead on Monday’s major end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110454073/554400917/-665016130?&refcode=E13961-20250628-EOQ3-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWFlYWQxNS03ZTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-ELt_seP1UqSsfmMGYnugDYcJU2s2rswSS29MeLjKY=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [DONATE $5](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110454074/554400918/-1475085458?refcode=E13961-20250628-EOQ3-EG-DeadlineEOQ&express_lane=true&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWFlYWQxNS03ZTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-ELt_seP1UqSsfmMGYnugDYcJU2s2rswSS29MeLjKY=)

In America, you should be able to go to the doctor. You should be able to choose your provider. And you should be able to access _high-quality, affordable care_ — **PERIOD**.
**But Trump is quite literally gutting the resources that millions of Americans need to survive just so he can give his billionaire buddies tax breaks they didn’t even ask for.**
[**Eric is using every tool at his disposal to fight this on the House Judiciary Committee, but we can’t go toe-to-toe with Republicans’ billionaire-backed war chest without grassroots power. Can we count on you to pitch in and help Eric lead the fight against these cuts in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110454080/554400924/1443908173?&refcode=E13961-20250628-EOQ3-SL-DeadlineEOQ&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDMvMS85MDcyNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhMWFlYWQxNS03ZTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=0-ELt_seP1UqSsfmMGYnugDYcJU2s2rswSS29MeLjKY=)

We should be treating these seniors with dignity. Not hauling them away in handcuffs.
Let’s show them we’ve got their backs — and that we won’t let the GOP rip healthcare away from those who need it most.
— Team Swalwell

clean_body: In Trump’s America, demanding healthcare is apparently criminal. | Democrat Eric Swalwell represents California's 14th Congressional District. Friend, this week, a group of seniors in wheelchairs came to the Capitol to do something simple and powerful: Speak up for their healthcare. They weren’t violent. They weren’t disruptive. They just wanted to be heard — because up to 20 million seniors could lose Medicaid under the Republicans’ brutal new budget. Their reward for showing up? They were zip-tied and they were arrested. Let that sink in: Seniors in wheelchairs were handcuffed in the U.S. Capitol because they protested Congress gutting their Medicaid the very same week Mitch McConnell said we’d all “get over it.” = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = In America, you should be able to go to the doctor. You should be able to choose your provider. And you should be able to access high-quality, affordable care — PERIOD. But Trump is quite literally gutting the resources that millions of Americans need to survive just so he can give his billionaire buddies tax breaks they didn’t even ask for. = = We should be treating these seniors with dignity. Not hauling them away in handcuffs. Let’s show them we’ve got their backs — and that we won’t let the GOP rip healthcare away from those who need it most. — Team Swalwell | = Democrat Eric Swalwell proudly represents California's 14th Congressional District. He needs your support in order to keep protecting what's important: our healthcare, our paychecks, our future, and our democracy. = Eric runs a people-powered campaign that relies on grassroots supporters like you, and if he's going to win re-election, he's going to need your help. | Peter,

With extremist Republicans threatening our rights and health care, and new challengers entering the race in CA-06, it’s more important than ever that we support leaders who bring experience, compassion, and the courage to stand up to Trump’s authoritarian agenda.

Dr. Ami Bera is that leader. He’s spent over two decades practicing medicine — including serving as Sacramento County’s Chief Medical Officer and training young doctors at UC Davis. He’s treated veterans, seniors, and working families — and he knows exactly what’s at stake as Trump and the GOP try to gut Medicaid and endanger people’s lives.

Peter, I'm going to do everything I possibly can — not just to call out what’s going wrong, but to support candidates who offer a better alternative.

**Abigail Spanberger is the type of courageous leader we need right now.**

She's served our country as a CIA officer and a member of Congress, and she happens to be the only Democrat in the nation who can flip a Governor's office this November.

name: Team Crow
subject: It’s more than just a statement. It’s a way of life.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jason Crow for Congress
body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
If there’s one thing you should know about Jason, it’s this: He’s never forgotten the creed he lived by when he served as an Army Ranger.

And even now a member of Congress, these words still hold true today for Jason:

“My country expects me to move further, faster, and fight harder than any other.”
“I will shoulder more than my share of the task, whatever it may be, 100% and then some.”
“Under no circumstances will I ever embarrass my country.”

9/11 changed the lives of so many Americans, including Jason’s, which is why he made the decision to transition from the National Guard to active duty.

He served three combat tours in Iraq and Afghanistan — and learned a lot about servant leadership, working under pressure, and the value of selfless service to others.

http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025 [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

Now, although our nation is facing a different fight, the stakes are just as high. Our constitutional rights are under attack. Working families are being crushed by inflation and high prices. Our economy is slowing because of Donald Trump’s trade war and tariffs, which have raised prices for families in Colorado and across the country. Jason is working to make health care, child care, housing, and everyday items like groceries and gas more affordable.

And those words Jason used to say as an Army Ranger? They’re not just a statement — they’re a way of life.

Jason will never stop fighting to defend the Constitution and protect the rights he put his life on the line to protect. Will you stand with him by donating $10 before our upcoming end-of-quarter deadline? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025?amount=10]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

Thank you,

Team Crow

Greenwood Village, CO 80112

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Trapped behind enemy lines
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Steve Daines for Montana
body:
This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester

|
---
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z76blpuct094c06hi7lppanl0944r7a7lrrq8650_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)

Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_

[**Now I’m writing you because Steve NEEDS our help.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zshu06u7ok6itsbfjo32v156f09mgl0m37l0h0t8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)

[**DEFEND MONTANA
DONATE NOW **](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z3omrevigt2pr90b8ponahhfd0j92bsshfnth6so_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)
Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress.

2026 is right around the corner. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in $25, $35, $50, or whatever you can give to help Steve take on Chuck Schumer and his radical Democrat challenger.**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zf6c8dd0oobio8fu45obgfb6gk2r845b9sg0oqno_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)

[**DONATE $25**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zq4c3ggtt5opejinbgmtvtk23m0tpmkel564n19g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs) [**DONATE $35**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zmlhhovpbqqtebrc3127geilslf38abdvfajg510_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs) [**DONATE $50**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zea1erv1lbt04jbevr46hktis04dl3cdk88p8llo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs) [**DONATE MORE**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zav5s99mklbir1qrm9pba3mvjma84tnvvpvs6hug_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)
Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race.

The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. [**Today’s the day we can help Steve prepare for the fight ahead. Will you help jumpstart Steve’s reelection campaign with a generous contribution today?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z65a4qqegjv3mdrfs19asdivpfj7orpv3smgo3i8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)

For America's Future,
[](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9j4athvidl7jbfthispf146kioh0q01q4ot0b9o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)
Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT)
Former Navy SEAL
Purple Heart Recipient

P.S. We all have Steve to thank for booting Chuck Schumer out of the Majority Leader’s chair! [**Now, Steve needs our help!**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2zlr908925a5h1vmai56br9o8or7co896geo2s1h8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)

The radicals in the Democrat party are FUMING. They’d love nothing more than to send Steve packing for his role in producing the 2024 Republican Trifecta. [**Will you step up and donate to give Steve the resources he needs to fight back and secure victory in 2026?**](http://e.nationalrepublicanpolling.com/rd/9z2z9351p6jh9448p40mmcqiila64cn5362d94kvqn8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1c1h2bs)

**Senator Steve Daines

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: I’m not going to apologize for being who I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
All I ever really wanted to do was serve my country and help others.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zg0h84oa44nk4bshumo00a3r5u38q6rl1h3pl5mg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)Friend,

All I ever really wanted to do was serve my country and help others.

Be it in the military as a Navy Special Operator, in the White House, or as a member of Congress.

It's who I am - and it's what I do.

But having devoted my life to service, I've really never been one to rake in the big bucks.

And I take pride in that. I take pride in fighting for the forgotten men and women of America - unlike the Democrats.

They think folks like us aren't worth fighting for - that we will never amount to anything. They think they're better than us - and therefore, more qualified than us to serve.

They have all their luxurious fundraisers, and red carpet events that haul in millions each night from the liberal elite, and Wall Street big shots.

And every last dime gets spent against folks like me and you - against the forgotten men and women of America who just want a fair shot.

That's why I'm asking for your help today. So if you can, and only if you can, would you mind chipping in just a couple of bucks ? [$30
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zgv2hj2fgq8c2bfm66boanbkc7h5u879kv5sqn3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)[$40
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zel95vdd7jb6791tm1h5cukj1sde4ec5cpcmdk20_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)[$50
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmjj6fvb11poc0ithb86iicjaen7demr44225g98_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)[$100
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zf4gduuhr3bn8n94e601ea2bu7r1c04kljnfe4fo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)If I could look you in the eye and say this, I would - because I want you to know that I will never, ever forget what you do for me today.

And I will always be grateful.
-Morgan Luttrell

Morgan Luttrell is a Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense.

I take pride in fighting for the forgotten men and women of America - unlike the Democrats. They think folks like us aren't worth fighting for - that we will never amount to anything. They think they're better than us - and therefore, more qualified than us to serve. They have all their luxurious fundraisers, and red carpet events that haul in millions each night from the liberal elite, and Wall Street big shots. And every last dime gets spent against folks like me and you - against the forgotten men and women of America who just want a fair shot. That's why I'm asking for your help today. So if you can, and only if you can, would you mind chipping in just a couple of bucks ? I could look you in the eye and say this, I would - because I want you to know that I will never, ever forget what you do for me today. And I will always be grateful. -Morgan Luttrell Morgan Luttrell is a Navy Veteran. name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: As a Marine, I was taught to keep my word.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When I joined the Marines right out of high school, they taught me to keep my word

| | | It amuses me to watch the DC press' heads explode when we actually do _something_ that we _promised we would do_ during the campaign...

This is Vice President JD Vance. When I joined the Marines right out of high school, they taught me to keep my word - what a novel concept in DC!

It should have come as a surprise to NO ONE when we immediately moved to:
- Close the border and slash illegal immigration
- Gut DEI propaganda in our military
- Ban men in women's sports
- End taxes on tips and social security
- Incentivize businesses to invest in America
- Reinstate deterrence on the world stage
- Deport violent criminal aliens
- And the list goes on
_[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zqijdeko44fkascruor3v2bqa5rfmue08jku59to_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)[And we're just getting started. Our partners in Congress have been in lockstep with us to deliver on our President's agenda too.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z7ivtolnmm2d4uubnkt79ehb96pj9th2pqg4fvdo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)_

Unfortunately, moving so swiftly and decisively comes at a cost.

The Democrat Machine and the DC press are ENRAGED at how quickly everything they've worked for is unraveling before their very eyes. They're fighting back in the only ways they know how:

1) Launching dishonest attacks to hurt Republicans politically, 2) Peddling Fake News hoaxes, and 3) Exploiting the outrage to mobilize Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

Now the Democrat Machine's bank accounts are OVERFLOWING! They've already unloaded $50,000,000 on the heads of our most vulnerable Republicans - that's enough to destroy our House Majority AND hand power over to the Liberals!

That's why I'm taking matters into my own hands.

_[I 'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $500,000 between now and the end of the month.](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z9funu2tsnei2epodi1phod6271ivqejrqft2hlo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)_

I don't want your family to overstretch but if you can kick in even a few bucks, it would really help us save our House Majority, hold the line, and keep delivering on the President's promises.

_Do you think you could help us out?_
---
[ PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $100
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zdm45s95852raerbhkhur8kp0r275csjcchi3hhg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)
[PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $50
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zq4ufcocqbrvk35jfpvie6i3raulorpcg9o5jfio_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)
[PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $25
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zf8aman7ajihvr0joi1th411dg3j8jf136couus8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)
[PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $10
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z2abl1ppha5d0oorm43r3jjh62fbrlblhfda4v18_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)
I am proud of what we've accomplished together just in the first few months in office.

And I can promise you this:

We're not taking our foot off the gas. Not for a second.

But our ability to keep control of the House for our President's ENTIRE TERM hinges on the investments we make today - not next year, not closer to Election Day. Today.

That's why I'm partnering with Leader Scalise right here and right now.

_[We 're both personally asking for your support. Are you in?](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z5dfkr4qrvhtimjuok31mkm4oo4u27k4qj244uuo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2z0a4mtdpjtcmos5jns2jsvar8p3j8p76gsprbva0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_
[](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zji59skk3hj83vjl8egtghmtqmj3gpout8ki19v0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)
If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**
[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](https://e.updatesforgreatamericans.com/rd/9z2zruvk09mfvf035uavavp4hlhn9kqoo4niuuijvgo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)

name: Tomas [House GOP]
subject: I’ve seen this before
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
I fear that with the RADICAL LEFTISTS in Congress, America could be going down the wrong path

Patriot,
[Let me tell you a story about my past. ](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zurvifcg2s3i8dfhkhq03no2ghqmdh9350mls750_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6c3h2bs)
I was born in Venezuela, a nation destined to be prosperous with all the oil resources in the world. At least, this would have been the case if it were not for Socialism and Communism destroying it all. These ideologies dismantled Venezuela, and I fear that with the RADICAL LEFTISTS in Congress, America could be going down the wrong path.[KEEP AMERICA ON THE RIGHT PATH
](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zrh01l4knv56pti2hjm6kv5miqfgcu5vjsiv0e08_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6c3h2bs)That's why I'm warning you now about the dangers that Democrats present to our beloved nation. That's why, more than ever, it's important that REPUBLICANS maintain control of the House. We CANNOT afford to let them bring WOKE Biden Era policies back into our nation. If we lose, it could mean the end of true AMERICAN VALUES.[RUSH IN SUPPORT
](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2ztjrbr9kvjn08kv9r5ho2ltc6atlp144tuqdrn8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6c3h2bs)[Let's work together to ensure that the U.S. does not face the same fate as Venezuela. Will you be on my side for this, or will you let Democrats win? The choice is yours. ](https://e.realamericanreporting.com/rd/9z2zcbti0oc0h0qfu1h8lb66d1md8cof4e3knng75t0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6c3h2bs)

name: Morgan Luttrell
subject: I’m not going to apologize for being who I am
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
All I ever really wanted to do was serve my country and help others.

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z33lc7jlt58ris97egvbug4uje9vc11qa21avk38_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)Friend,

All I ever really wanted to do was serve my country and help others.

Be it in the military as a Navy Special Operator, in the White House, or as a member of Congress.

It's who I am - and it's what I do.

But having devoted my life to service, I've really never been one to rake in the big bucks.

And I take pride in that. I take pride in fighting for the forgotten men and women of America - unlike the Democrats.

They think folks like us aren't worth fighting for - that we will never amount to anything. They think they're better than us - and therefore, more qualified than us to serve.

They have all their luxurious fundraisers, and red carpet events that haul in millions each night from the liberal elite, and Wall Street big shots.

And every last dime gets spent against folks like me and you - against the forgotten men and women of America who just want a fair shot.

That's why I'm asking for your help today. So if you can, and only if you can, would you mind chipping in just a couple of bucks ? [$30
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs3q3aj7rclas43gfckme9preq40ctr3ca665f3g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)[$40
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zh370p8umi3f1fefchurbimcj6niitecdoccq8go_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)[$50
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zt4jue2jeoq0iv5bsk09e4p37lji3bbf7sls5vs8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)[$100
](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2za7dug2dqc0gsfjnuveq9k8151ced4jif3nth0e8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj1cjh2bs)If I could look you in the eye and say this, I would - because I want you to know that I will never, ever forget what you do for me today.

And I will always be grateful.
-Morgan Luttrell

Morgan Luttrell is a Navy Veteran. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense.

name: Hillsdale College via 1600 Daily
subject: The greatest armed conflict in human history
body:
This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict

This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College
[](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z3gnpvcftnsm0bc46qtnd0acsp0r8a9ha5me5m6g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6cth2bs) Dear Fellow American,
Only a fraction of the 16 million Americans who fought bravely in World War II remain with us. This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important.
To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called **“The Second World Wars.”**
**Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson** , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zkdnnbpm7k62i3k39bhefh12nglipubbp2da5ho8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6cth2bs) If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College.
Here’s a secure link to reserve your copy of **“The Second World Wars”** on DVD:
**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/support-the-second-world-wars](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zp3bunol4oqdqogrtunps6i9glm3nfq0olaekfa0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6cth2bs)**
Thank you for preserving liberty for future generations of Americans through education with Hillsdale College!
Best regards,
Jeremiah Regan, Ph.D. Executive Director of Online Learning Hillsdale College
P.S. The **“The Second World Wars”** DVD set is great as a homeschool curriculum or for independent study. Plus, it makes a perfect gift for anyone who wants to know more about the Second World War. **[Reserve your copy now.](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zs61pvi54bd2kunvontuanu6i62c0s39emsqme38_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie8oj6cth2bs)**

This fact means that we’re losing more and more living memory of the greatest armed conflict in human history, which makes the study of World War II even more important. To this end, Hillsdale College has produced an online course called “The Second World Wars.” Taught by historian Victor Davis Hanson , this course explores how the conflict’s diverse theaters, belligerents, and ways of fighting came eventually to define a single war. And it examines the key investments, strategies, and leaders that led the Allied powers to victory over the Axis. If you’d like to secure a DVD set before they’re all gone, you can get one shipped directly to your home for any gift of $100 or more to Hillsdale College. name: Roy Beck
subject: Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law
body:
I need you to sign your NumbersUSA “Deport 1 Million” petition right away.

| |
---
| |
---
| |
---
| | My Fellow American,If you’re a Patriot who knows that we MUST accelerate the pace of deportations, **[I need you to sign your NumbersUSA “Deport 1 Million” petition right away.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z6hdgrbk3fgefcda16o813bfkbj8rhbp6138u3s0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie4p32chh2bs)** Or at least in the next 48 hours. My team at **NumbersUSA **has 29 years of experience and success in harnessing the power of grassroots armies of American Patriots to defeat the open-borders activists.And we are launching a nationwide petition drive built around 3 simple steps to reach 1 million deportations by year end:
---
1. **Ban** all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens
2. **Shut off** income for illegal aliens through “E-Verify”
3. **Unleash **ICE to the full extent of the law

---
President Trump has closed the Southern Border, but we still have most of the 8 million Biden Border Crashers (and at least 15-17 MILLION illegal aliens total)......costing taxpayers an estimated $150 BILLION dollars a year.Our hospitals are overcrowded, our public services are overextended, and millions of Americans have been replaced by illegal workers. We literally cannot afford to delay.
---
[ **SIGN YOUR PETITION** ](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zl8c6dnf4tk3vio6bodfih2hndlfgjt35a4r6etg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie4p32chh2bs)
---
The Radical Left seems fixated on creating societal upheaval by overwhelming our borders and immigration system. That’s why they’re using the courts to stall and stop all deportations –- because it would take at least 15 YEARS to provide each illegal alien in our country all the extra reviews and appeals the open-borders radicals are demanding. They want to make this invasion permanent, and they are sabotaging the deportation operation at every turn......but our BAN, SHUTOFF & UNLEASH steps will trigger a wave of deportations and self-deportations that the Radical Left will be powerless to stop, and it’ll snowball from there.**We start with 1 million and then keep on going.** Patriots in the Trump Administration like JD Vance, Stephen Miller, and Tom Homan are going to battle every day to:**Carry out** the requirements for deportations that are contained in **_laws passed_** by previous Congresses ...** ** **Battle** state and local governments that violate federal laws by shielding illegal aliens and the outlaw businesses that hire them....**And Resist** pressure from corporate media and lobbies to protect the illegal workforce.In other words, **_these patriots are fighting to deliver on their promises_**. **[If you’re still with them, I’m asking you to sign your Deport 1 Million Petition right away, and submit it to NumbersUSA.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zg0kt9pb6n6q11681d43ma2st84de01gmr6i2d8o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie4p32chh2bs)****Friend, my name is Roy Beck, and I’m the founder of NumbersUSA—the largest single-issue grassroots advocacy group in the nation.****NumbersUSA **brings together a grassroots network of millions for one purpose: America First, lower-immigration policy.We have the experience, the scale, and most importantly, we have a plan to make sure the Trump administration hits its deportation goals.But I need your help to execute these three simple steps for deporting at least 1 million in Year One. Let me explain those 3 steps in a little more detail:
---
**1\. Ban** all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens.
---
Until we cut off all the taxpayer subsidies to illegal aliens of housing, health care, and tuition... ...and stop granting them driver’s licenses, Social Security numbers, and other privileges of a U.S. citizen, illegals have no reason to leave.
---
**2\. Shut off** income for illegal aliens through nationwide “E-Verify.”
---
Most illegal aliens will eventually go home if they can’t obtain U.S. jobs. “E-Verify” has long been available through the Department of Homeland Security. It allows employers to ensure they are hiring Americans and not illegal workers. But nobody is required to use it, so the anti-American employers don’t. Mandating E-Verify for all employers is an obvious first step Congress must take to make sure sanctuary governors and mayors aren’t helping illegals to take jobs from American workers and undercut their wages.
---
**3\. Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law.**
---
We’re already seeing many illegal aliens choose to leave on their own terms instead of in handcuffs with an ICE agent...But we need more of this.Sanctuary Cities, uncooperative local officials, and anti-ICE activists keep impeding ICE’s critical work. To overcome their resistance, we’ll need more funding and more public pressure.......and more laws passed by Congress so a future President can’t open the floodgates ever again. We’ve already seen the entire radical Leftist apparatus mobilize nationwide, foreign-flag-waving street demonstrations in favor of illegal immigration.The fiery images of the demonstrations show how passionate they are for the right of all foreign tourists, guest workers, and illegal aliens to stay and work in our country forever. So, you know they will never consent to 1 million deportations. And they’ll definitely never consent to the largest deportation operation in history! [**This petition drive can generate enough public pressure to overwhelm the Radical Left and Open-Borders Business Lobbies. **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zge16lo3t2mf0srki19ed7437i8ppkg032fffog8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie4p32chh2bs)**And there is no better group to organize it than NumbersUSA. ** Putting pressure on Congress is what we at NumbersUSA have been doing for a quarter-century.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of voters using the newly accessible internet to pressure elected officials directly. Then in 2007, when Ted Kennedy and sellout Republicans wanted to import millions more foreign workers and give amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants, **NumbersUSA **mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times credited us (or maybe blamed us) for blocking that bill. All told, **NumbersUSA **has reduced possible immigration to the U.S. by over 40 MILLION through our many grassroots victories.We know how to give the American people a voice on Capitol Hill that no lawmaker or talking head can ignore.So if you’re frustrated by the well-funded and organized protests slowing down deportations... If you’re worried about all the illegals still here... And if you want to make a difference right now...[**The best thing you can do is sign your petition today.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zt5ck0pq9od9ofgmnl6f0or3t6g6foin9712e1v0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie4p32chh2bs) Because you understand how urgent this is, I’m asking you to consider making a gift of $27, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000 when you submit your petition today.With a donation of $27, you can become a member of **NumbersUSA **and join the millions of Americans across our great land demanding an America First lower-immigration policy. If you can’t afford $27 today, consider just $3.97—the approximate cost of processing your petition.But of course, larger gifts will accelerate our petition drive’s nationwide roll-out and intensify the pressure on Capitol Hill. To kick the deportations into overdrive, we need to light a fire under every open-borders politician and bureaucrat who’s holding things up.**[That’s why we need your Deport 1 Million Petition and your best donation sent to NumbersUSA today.](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zff39q6evbjpt2kng9f1i8rnu5qvmie5qg39l9dg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie4p32chh2bs)** Thank you for reading my email today. It’s Patriots like you who give me hope for our country’s future.
---
| | **Roy Beck**
---
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2z8vb0l4tpqc3omr2ctkpvgqutnmorhaongcpi2go_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie4p32chh2bs)
---
Founder**NumbersUSA**
---

clean_body: I need you to sign your NumbersUSA “Deport 1 Million” petition right away. | | | | | | | | My Fellow American,If you’re a Patriot who knows that we MUST accelerate the pace of deportations, Or at least in the next 48 hours. My team at NumbersUSA has 29 years of experience and success in harnessing the power of grassroots armies of American Patriots to defeat the open-borders activists.And we are launching a nationwide petition drive built around 3 simple steps to reach 1 million deportations by year end: 1. Ban all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens 2. Shut off income for illegal aliens through “E-Verify” 3. Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law President Trump has closed the Southern Border, but we still have most of the 8 million Biden Border Crashers (and at least 15-17 MILLION illegal aliens total)......costing taxpayers an estimated $150 BILLION dollars a year.Our hospitals are overcrowded, our public services are overextended, and millions of Americans have been replaced by illegal workers. We literally cannot afford to delay. The Radical Left seems fixated on creating societal upheaval by overwhelming our borders and immigration system. That’s why they’re using the courts to stall and stop all deportations –- because it would take at least 15 YEARS to provide each illegal alien in our country all the extra reviews and appeals the open-borders radicals are demanding. They want to make this invasion permanent, and they are sabotaging the deportation operation at every turn......but our BAN, SHUTOFF & UNLEASH steps will trigger a wave of deportations and self-deportations that the Radical Left will be powerless to stop, and it’ll snowball from there.We start with 1 million and then keep on going. Patriots in the Trump Administration like JD Vance, Stephen Miller, and Tom Homan are going to battle every day to:Carry out the requirements for deportations that are contained in laws passed by previous Congresses ... Battle state and local governments that violate federal laws by shielding illegal aliens and the outlaw businesses that hire them....And Resist pressure from corporate media and lobbies to protect the illegal workforce.In other words, these patriots are fighting to deliver on their promises. , my name is Roy Beck, and I’m the founder of NumbersUSA—the largest single-issue grassroots advocacy group in the nation.NumbersUSA brings together a grassroots network of millions for one purpose: America First, lower-immigration policy.We have the experience, the scale, and most importantly, we have a plan to make sure the Trump administration hits its deportation goals.But I need your help to execute these three simple steps for deporting at least 1 million in Year One. Let me explain those 3 steps in a little more detail: 1\. Ban all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens. Until we cut off all the taxpayer subsidies to illegal aliens of housing, health care, and tuition... ...and stop granting them driver’s licenses, Social Security numbers, and other privileges of a U.S. citizen, illegals have no reason to leave. 2\. Shut off income for illegal aliens through nationwide “E-Verify.” Most illegal aliens will eventually go home if they can’t obtain U.S. jobs. “E-Verify” has long been available through the Department of Homeland Security. It allows employers to ensure they are hiring Americans and not illegal workers. But nobody is required to use it, so the anti-American employers don’t. Mandating E-Verify for all employers is an obvious first step Congress must take to make sure sanctuary governors and mayors aren’t helping illegals to take jobs from American workers and undercut their wages. 3\. Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law. We’re already seeing many illegal aliens choose to leave on their own terms instead of in handcuffs with an ICE agent...But we need more of this.Sanctuary Cities, uncooperative local officials, and anti-ICE activists keep impeding ICE’s critical work. To overcome their resistance, we’ll need more funding and more public pressure.......and more laws passed by Congress so a future President can’t open the floodgates ever again. We’ve already seen the entire radical Leftist apparatus mobilize nationwide, foreign-flag-waving street demonstrations in favor of illegal immigration.The fiery images of the demonstrations show how passionate they are for the right of all foreign tourists, guest workers, and illegal aliens to stay and work in our country forever. So, you know they will never consent to 1 million deportations. And they’ll definitely never consent to the largest deportation operation in history! there is no better group to organize it than NumbersUSA. Putting pressure on Congress is what we at NumbersUSA have been doing for a quarter-century.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of voters using the newly accessible internet to pressure elected officials directly. Then in 2007, when Ted Kennedy and sellout Republicans wanted to import millions more foreign workers and give amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times credited us (or maybe blamed us) for blocking that bill. All told, NumbersUSA has reduced possible immigration to the U.S. by over 40 MILLION through our many grassroots victories.We know how to give the American people a voice on Capitol Hill that no lawmaker or talking head can ignore.So if you’re frustrated by the well-funded and organized protests slowing down deportations... If you’re worried about all the illegals still here... And if you want to make a difference right now... Because you understand how urgent this is, I’m asking you to consider making a gift of $27, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000 when you submit your petition today.With a donation of $27, you can become a member of NumbersUSA and join the millions of Americans across our great land demanding an America First lower-immigration policy. If you can’t afford $27 today, consider just $3.97—the approximate cost of processing your petition.But of course, larger gifts will accelerate our petition drive’s nationwide roll-out and intensify the pressure on Capitol Hill. To kick the deportations into overdrive, we need to light a fire under every open-borders politician and bureaucrat who’s holding things up. Thank you for reading my email today. It’s Patriots like you who give me hope for our country’s future. | | Roy Beck FounderNumbersUSA | | | P.S. Click the button below to access your Deport 1 Million Petition. name: Vice President JD Vance
subject: As a Marine, I was taught to keep my word.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
When I joined the Marines right out of high school, they taught me to keep my word

| | | It amuses me to watch the DC press' heads explode when we actually do _something_ that we _promised we would do_ during the campaign...

This is Vice President JD Vance. When I joined the Marines right out of high school, they taught me to keep my word - what a novel concept in DC!

It should have come as a surprise to NO ONE when we immediately moved to:
- Close the border and slash illegal immigration
- Gut DEI propaganda in our military
- Ban men in women's sports
- End taxes on tips and social security
- Incentivize businesses to invest in America
- Reinstate deterrence on the world stage
- Deport violent criminal aliens
- And the list goes on
_[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z838dia3kpa39obcoh35i540a19cukehna8lke68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)[And we're just getting started. Our partners in Congress have been in lockstep with us to deliver on our President's agenda too.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zh3jl8s8fmo9glvl5sej9b25lb715f1pnvf3jabg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)_

Unfortunately, moving so swiftly and decisively comes at a cost.

The Democrat Machine and the DC press are ENRAGED at how quickly everything they've worked for is unraveling before their very eyes. They're fighting back in the only ways they know how:

1) Launching dishonest attacks to hurt Republicans politically, 2) Peddling Fake News hoaxes, and 3) Exploiting the outrage to mobilize Liberals to whip out their credit cards and donate to Democrats.

Now the Democrat Machine's bank accounts are OVERFLOWING! They've already unloaded $50,000,000 on the heads of our most vulnerable Republicans - that's enough to destroy our House Majority AND hand power over to the Liberals!

That's why I'm taking matters into my own hands.

_[I 'm partnering with House Majority Leader Steve Scalise to raise $500,000 between now and the end of the month.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbj5jc3ro5e8auo1kh59qvvin5it3eijojg92ehg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)_

I don't want your family to overstretch but if you can kick in even a few bucks, it would really help us save our House Majority, hold the line, and keep delivering on the President's promises.

_Do you think you could help us out?_
---
[ PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $100
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8ud9lj35tjpdmut41ebkrl4prg35htq8i0v0p50_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)
[PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $50
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z49i2tglmpur88c23kedm1s9e2polrck6jcct108_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)
[PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $25
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z5on21t67p4e4op8h7q2ietk6t98771g2t9534k0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)
[PLEASE: CONTRIBUTE $10
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ziic6mmtruc1j38l2na13phtdujrs90nqbijres8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)
I am proud of what we've accomplished together just in the first few months in office.

And I can promise you this:

We're not taking our foot off the gas. Not for a second.

But our ability to keep control of the House for our President's ENTIRE TERM hinges on the investments we make today - not next year, not closer to Election Day. Today.

That's why I'm partnering with Leader Scalise right here and right now.

_[We 're both personally asking for your support. Are you in?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zjh5dg3ub41nrlm24cc0f3ilqgnq9opkkn43ourg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)_

Regardless, it's an honor to fight alongside you.

God bless America,
Vice President JD Vance
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zb5rg6n5irsi9vmots2fibou9mbf3u606mckd7sg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)
* * *
\- Democrat Leadership formed an _anti-Trump task force_
\- More than a dozen Attorneys General are _suing_ the Trump Administration
\- A House Democrat just introduced _7 Articles of Impeachment_
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zlatpj9m6cs953rr0p0gr6h57ad5ujg11ds6foeo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)
If they manage to strip us of our House Majority, they'll have the power to impeach, investigate, and bring his entire legislative agenda to a SCREECHING HALT!

**We're PLEADING WITH YOU to do your part to help SAVE our Pro-Trump House Majority:**
[ DO YOUR PART: PITCH IN NOW
](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zaicjmijpa29qa9q1p7bcj9ja5mgl0ajmt7h6nu8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chieapr6chh2bs)

name: Navy SEAL Derrick Van Orden
subject: My mom didn’t raise a quitter
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Troy Downing for Congress
body:
I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and read this email.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Peter,
I've never been one to shy away from a fight.
Whether overseas as a Navy SEAL or right here at home defending conservative values in Congress, I have always stood on the front lines, ready to serve, lead, and protect the country I love.
**_Now, I'm in the political fight of my life._**
Cook Political Report labeled my race a toss-up, and the radical Left believes they can buy this seat and flip Wisconsin's 3rd Congressional District blue.
**Let me be clear:** that's not going to happen.
_Not on my watch. _
_Not with your help._
Democrats are furious that I've stood with President Trump every step of the way. They're pouring money into my opponent's campaign because I don't play by their rules.
And I REFUSE to quit.
They want to shut me up because I call out Biden's failures, and the Left’s attempt to rewrite our history and redefine gender, family, and morality.
**But I didn't run for office to cozy up to the D.C. elites. I ran to serve the people and protect the country I risked my life for.**
This race will come down to the wire, and every dollar counts.
[I need every America First Patriot reading this to step up and pitch in today. Your support could make the difference between victory and defeat.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) [ SEND HELP NOW
](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Rush help now and help me keep this seat red, defend the House, and return power to We the People.
Thank you for your kind support,
Derrick Van Orden U.S. Congressman (WI-03) Navy SEAL (Ret.) | | |
---

name: James O'Keefe
subject: I Won in Court—Help Me Keep Fighting for Truth
body:
This isn’t just my win—it’s a win for free speech. Project Veritas tried to block me, claiming I intimidate witnesses. The judge rejected that, calling it irrational and affirming my right to uncover the truth.

| [****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zv02r2gne9ie71s8tvdgd2nthdj3j1a2bq3u7loo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)
[****](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrruv8426na1910f5lva6f2ioaq1kt1q1bo3ll3o_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs) Dear Patriot,

My name is James O'Keefe, and for 14 years, I've been an investigative journalist exposing corruption--from ACORN to Pfizer. But today, I'm writing to you about a personal fight that could end my career [**unless people like you step up**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsop4lt49gv3fhsp9destf0daci54v0dg1o4i528_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs).

I founded Project Veritas and built it into a force for truth.

After our biggest investigation yet, the board I appointed ousted me. Now, they're suing me in federal court to stop my new organization, OMG, and silence my reporting. But this week, I scored a **major victory** : the judge ruled in my favor, allowing me to continue deposing witnesses and extending the deadline to August 15th.

This isn't just my win--it's a **win for free speech**. Project Veritas tried to block me, claiming I intimidate witnesses. The judge rejected that, calling it irrational and affirming my right to uncover the truth. But with **eight depositions left** , costing a minimum of **$61,375** , [**I can 't do it alone.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zm85pes1ip3mc9o31hs0p50v6kr7egp4uedsckr8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)

Here's why this matters: my work has changed the game, exposing corruption that powerful people want hidden. This lawsuit is their final attack to shut me down. [**Will you help me raise**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zojkf9tc4l8pk8m3b0ngi7bpt6ptova8u89sl8p8_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)**[**$61,375**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zg57oq1pntt242djrmskhboi08l050i05i31o2j0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)**[**to finish these depositions and keep fighting?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zgv2fhij4c3jnfkf7lm9p96tvn3brefekskrip30_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)

[**Please, help me in get through this battle by donating today.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2ze1hj9123aov9bb4h7b1s7m3qoqhmiaat4p94r5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)

The stakes are high. In court, we revealed threats like "chew on my heart and eat it" from a former board member and violent insults from their lawyer. The judge was shocked--but I'm not surprised. This is what truth-tellers face.

[**Your support through Liberty Guard can defend me and the journalism that holds power accountable.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zphs97ken99mbdrjdm0if5ab6s6cr5hvuf1jkojg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)

Thank you for considering this. Together, we can protect the truth.

Respectfully,
James O’Keefe
Founder and CEO
O'Keefe Media Group

P.S. We have until **August 15th** to raise **$61,375**. [**Please donate today!**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zsumnsugeoe5n33chslkt1quidfvi3mf4b5tpnio_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2chh2bs)

name: Sen. Tim Sheehy
subject: Trapped behind enemy lines

body:
This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester

|

[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zi990oq2b52db9h4tkoa9l9ph998a9044qhb63fg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2c1h2bs)

Fellow American,

TRAPPED behind enemy lines... Pinned down by heavy fire... Nearly overrun by dangerous insurgents...

_No, this is not a story from my time fighting in the War on Terror as a Navy SEAL..._

_**This is a scene from my recent VICTORY in the Montana Senate race against my deeply entrenched establishment Democrat opponent, Jon Tester.**_ I’m proud to say we flipped the Senate RED, thanks in part to this win in Montana.

Winning this race wasn’t a “gimme.” We had to claw, scratch, and fight for every single vote. _**That’s because Tester had a WAR CHEST of $25,000,000**_. He threw money at anybody and everybody who’d smear my good name.

It was truly one of the hardest battles of my life.

_Despite all the obstacles_ , I was able to keep fighting to the end because of _one man_ :

**Senator Steve Daines , now my fellow Republican Senator from Montana.**

As Chairman of the National Republican Senatorial Committee (NRSC), he not only gave me the ammunition we needed to win this fight, _**but he was also instrumental in flipping four Senate seats, giving Republicans the Senate Majority.**_

[**Now I’m writing you because Steve NEEDS our help.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zjacvunqfen6hj08uabhr6ki146hgbh8fkt9lv5g_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2c1h2bs)

[**DEFEND MONTANA
DONATE NOW **](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zgiklocipltid2ob7vls4bj405ubneoojpq2ql68_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2c1h2bs)
Steve is up for re-election in 2026. Chuck Schumer and every Democrat in the nation would love nothing more than to see Steve Daines – the Republican Senate Majority Maker! – booted from Congress.

2026 is right around the corner. [**That’s why I’m asking you to rush in $25, $35, $50, or whatever you can give to help Steve take on Chuck Schumer and his radical Democrat challenger.**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2zm244nol4an56go2vomec89l5o4d3jfs6nk31rmo_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2c1h2bs)

Steve’s radical opponent has already told the media that every minute since 2024, she’s been building a plan to win in 2026. That means Democrats are already funneling money and resources into this race.

The fight to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands will be another knock-down, drag-out fight. [**Today’s the day we can help Steve prepare for the fight ahead. Will you help jumpstart Steve’s reelection campaign with a generous contribution today?**](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2ze79pcq4a1vv26soogncrqegio8uvhupcebdbahg_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2c1h2bs)

For America's Future,
[](https://e.youramerica.news/rd/9z2za1dq7922l34ak07rat1357o4m75sjed43m786i0_rp22sh2s8i6epb4chie9pj2c1h2bs)
Senator Tim Sheehy (R-MT)
Former Navy SEAL
Purple Heart Recipient

name: NEGOP
subject: Reminder: 🚨 Your Weekly Update From The NEGOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NEBRASKA REPUBLICAN PARTY](https://feyrpzhbb
body:
News, events, and action items to keep Nebraska red and growing strong.
| | | | |
---
| Letter from the Chair
---
When running for NEGOP Chair, I often spoke of the need for leadership development to "build our bench" in the Republican Party. Some are born leaders, but most are developed with time, effort, and experience.
Spending time helping others to learn new things and to build new skill sets is time well spent. Towards that end, the NEGOP has already hosted one well-attended Campaign and Candidate training day with the help of the Leadership Institute.
In July the NEGOP will lead a half-day retreat for our county leaders for more learning and networking. In addition, a full day of Campaign and Candidate training led by the Republican National Committee State Strategies will be held the following day. Other opportunities will be forthcoming in the next few months including social media training, Parliamentarian training, and much more.
Experiential learning is also being done at all levels of our party as our committees are organizing, planning, and executing our political and legislative strategies. The world of politics and campaigning changes rapidly and we will prepare ourselves for those changes as we all continue to learn and grow.
I am honored to lead this organization and to oversee the transformation around me. Just as I stand on the shoulders of those who came before me, I will add to the foundation for those who follow. And thank you all for your support as we work to elect well-prepared Republicans and to become better leaders in our communities.
Mary Jane Truemper Chairman, Nebraska Republican Party
---
---
| |
---
---
| |
# What's Happening...
---
Candidate Recruitment
The 2026 primary filing deadline is less than a year away, and the NEGOP is actively partnering with county parties across Nebraska to recruit strong Republican candidates for federal, statewide, legislative, and multi-county offices. Candidates are already beginning to announce their campaigns, and the NEGOP is committed to ensuring they are equipped with the tools and training needed to succeed. To support this effort, the NEGOP recently partnered with the Leadership Institute to host a Campaign & Candidate Workshop, a full-day, hands-on training designed to help aspiring leaders build and run effective campaigns. Attendees gained a foundational understanding of campaign strategy and left with actionable steps they can apply immediately.
As more candidates step forward, the NEGOP will continue offering training opportunities. Candidates, campaign managers, and staff are encouraged to attend our upcoming Campaign & Candidate School on July 26th in Lincoln. This full-day training, hosted in partnership with the RNC, will provide practical guidance on organizing, fundraising, voter outreach, and more.
If you or someone you know is considering a run for office -- or would make a strong candidate, please contact our Political Director, Joe Hagerty, at political@ne.gop.

## UVA President Resigns Over DEI Policies
[University of Virginia president James E. Ryan stepped down](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL-OszAQxJ8GOiNjHAOFi6-hy9deiRx7TfbkP8jewOXtT-QVrlvtSDO_ma_7ejcYMG3_TQRNPq8JzhqACMoac6XdUMFMaCsZgpqthWJWwcWNccXEvDqD4b3K1mkPIGBoQffjre_nXvGxfWppe2VgUtY95DRKoZS0k1TA5QOmnssW9eXGlZh7zpVUHX9YD4PzzvJhHNzcSA4OKZfuO2OiJ_jwzgeUzubYBv0k2msz_GvE0ojlPM_O55-rxaU3YtlzwIu_Ecsr4QGlIr3ZgWXDhIbtBSo6SMSuY0uVmYju866vAsyXHBmVV9yZcRETu6KZA2SYkNAQHlDbot1-YghY1dhIvkWD4cNHfxr10OI3AAD__yKokTY) on Friday under pressure from the Trump administration over the institution's diversity, equity, and inclusion initiatives. The Justice Department argued that the school's president failed to dismantle DEI programs and misrepresented the steps taken to eliminate them. The Trump administration's efforts have resulted in colleges nationwide, including Columbia University and the University of Michigan, [dramatically scaling back](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2upDAQhE9jMiNj8zMEDjYhm003RI3dML0yNrJ7QHP7J-YKL_tKJZWq6t9zfgIFittf2NHymuaIVwnIjHneU-EDOFNicoWBsSTnMMOsle6k6qUeZw8UPnNbebsiajQV2mbommZsejVUL6s8tGaBxYN7DO0Dur7TTaOMRtMOflQV2TtN9XpslOrbvlaLW9H41TtlBuNH0Sr0xCnX_xNFfuEaPunEXLu0V8G-mI8izB-hJ6Gn67pqt5R7xe0LPd0o9PSOdGIuxB-ZVnlS3igSyCNjIY-R5Q1bpLhJzu_9kOB3ilQ4A1OKkuKJhWn7KqGnKlt_XBQClX4Qrdp2oPCtxL_68bT6JwAA___F84wa) their diversity, equity, and inclusion messaging and programs. The DOJ stated that Ryan [refused to comply with President Trump’s executive order](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkD2OszAQQE9jOkdmIPC5cPE1dNl2S2TwmMzK2MieEHH7lXOF7Z70pDc_34_5YSlQ3L7sjoZ9miO-S0BmzPOeCh-WMyWmtbBlLGldMdsZFNylGiTo2VkK19w3znhEwK5B0473ttXtoMbmaZaxXRG1dkuH1t714jUo6x0473v7r2_I1JoaQLdKDf1wU8vqsXPeraobO6dFr9ARp3z7SRT5iT5c6cR8W9PeBPNkPoro_guYBEzxOlLhqgRMNSxgUkPlUcD0KrLeVynSibkQXzJ5eVLeKJKVR8ZCDiPLClsssk6SDumjyiuj9DntkvNrP6R1O0UBU5ONO94UApVhFL3adkvhsx__6amngd8AAAD__yQUjqM) directing public universities to dismantle their _“discriminatory”_ DEI programs.
## KFC Ranks Last in Restaurant Reviews
KFC was named the [worst-rated food chain in the country](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdI7MQgwULq6hy7VXosVeB5-MjexNIt7-F3mFvxtpRp9G37_H8sAQQ3r-xZ0M-7wk-tRIzFSWPVc-kEvIHGxlZKrZWiq4gIK7VFrCtDgM8Vz6xhlPBNQ1ZNrh3rZTq9XQbKZrwfl-HQecVr-OI1ny95UUDL0bEHUTzEVTGqZWKd3rm1qtp855Z1U3dG4SvSIXOJfb_xwSb-Tjmd9UbjbvTTQb81FF90fALGBO55ErX5WA-QILmJW-8ihgjsFT5TOSgJk3qiSxkOSNJOdDdvKTS2VZkMlJn7OTdsOQZKHK-CqYuMqQvvtXFTA3xbjjE2IMVQ-iV88dQ_ze4l-5fBv4CQAA__8UZIm2) after an analysis of 7.3 million TripAdvisor reviews of 244 restaurant brands. The Louisville-based fried chicken chain, with 4,095 locations in the U.S., had an average customer review score of 2.89 out of 5, landing it dead last in the pecking order. The crypto exchange site [ChicksX](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0UGP2jAUBOBf49xAz3aIN4ccoBC63W5X6YqtysUK9nNiamIaPwj8-4reeu55Po00mh-v-rX1wQ_dt_aEFbmoB5xSQCIc9SkmOrc0-kjeJGoJUzQGx1YLEIsZFDNRatv6cNd5ZiuHKFBmWHG14LzkBaisrxZO8gO3onRQSidbo0AeWgULZ0pnnyDz1aMNClFygCIv5nAwDqV11oBU0pYsB7Se4jg_Rj9Qjy7c4xXHuYmnLFQ90TkxuWSiZqK-jMGiwyHhI2aivkomaq3_VdM0zU3vza90ezCtmVwxwZngNbzToDom-KYJlxI-39Q6NKteYx73zUvysN9Ow_poTTh-uuvdB328bDfLzVPud0A_3ZvZvH1V--tstls2z0jxnb5sb3x9aMzkvnfupn6vnjvTMJFnY2XPkw_Bp0KxHLpT68PfUfRfT1wr8ScAAP__Vh-brw) evaluated 244 restaurant brands with at least 150 reviews. McDonald’s, with more than 14,000 locations, ranked second to last, followed by Burger King. The top-rated restaurant chain was Andy’s Frozen Custard, followed by Great Harvest Bread Company.
## List: Ranking the Most Patriotic States
Virginia was ranked [the most patriotic state in America](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGO6yAQheGnwZ2jYbBxKChu4y633RIRGGJWOEQwSZS3X2VX2hfY-ki_9J2Pkzv5XPL18t_vZDlVd6VnL8RMze21881zy5Vz6OyZeg2BmncIOI-gRzQu-lxebhqiTURIaiArl1lKIzUsw2ZDkl6aNMG8xGiOFNJ5RpiQZqV1gDRk-66BRiMB9KQPcA6JVEwxgFpUNGICiplrO3zWfOWNUnnVB7VDqPtQ7MZ860L9E7gKXJ--FOLtfn6vAleKd4HrWzL-UsYfi8BVKn2Eodl4e-ZScteLmOCy-1y-4_ynRx4WvwIAAP__kE510Q), according to a recent survey. Montana, Vermont, Colorado, and Oregon round out the top five. The survey [looked at a dozen metrics](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2O6yAQhZ8Gd0T8OBAXFLdxl9tuabFmiGcXGwsmsfz2K1LsC2w1I43m0_nOx326e0y4Pf77FRzFPG1w1AREUKY1V9o9FcyEcyVPUPM8Q_GTEurKheFqmILHdE59F1wEUKA7cNJepRykEbZb3CAHrbTw1kQwJhqQYMPV2j7oXkK4degaTRg1SCFMby7ic46gQwyz0FaHgfUCAlIul6-MGy0Q05lfUC5zXrvkFqK9Mv2PqZGpcTv3XKmdmBobmKlRmLbfmBqflTc_pkas_MzPwt9a_NeS58K3THyBApUfbXAkXvz23b664sJ-YEpYjWW9eKwe0zsH_am8l1M_AQAA__8AMYNL), including military service, voter turnout, civics education requirements, and jury participation. Arkansas ranked last in the survey, with low marks in civic engagement and the lowest voter turnout in the country at 53% in the 2024 presidential election. New York ranked second to last.

Iran** Iran’s recent threats to close the Strait of Hormuz, a gateway for 20% of the world’s oil, reminded us why the U.S. keeps up to 714M barrels in the U.S. Strategic Petroleum Reserve. When it comes to the critical minerals we rely on for national defense and consumer electronics, the situation is far worse. For example, China controls 80% of the global lithium supply, but the U.S. has no strategic reserves of these critical minerals. [M2i Global](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO3DAMQE8jd2Pob7tQEWAx3aZNKWgk2mYgWYbEmcXePvAmyAW2fY8giffr3b8HzHhsP0MBR2v1B3z0DETQfKmdzkANK2HsFAh6jRFa8JJLc-P2JhefAuZPr4fkVgAJagAnJiPEIiyfht2lSQeYIa78YeRjVdoaY2YtpiDNvCg-oLu2cSsXwbnVduSPuIJKa4pcTSotTHNISLWNvysetMOaP-sL2hhrGbLbic7O1A8m70ze8XhBp7FIHLdcHyFfWN2fVHyvzxaBqTcoATOT9oIFEj4LU29nwHQ7Q6MDWt_x_OdjKGfA7fia-C_FzG_KKP83geR6EcbyadZDc-n8wJyx24lpvl2nvh6lb9V9OfknAAD__w0tjhA) plans to fix that. They’re shoring up the U.S.’s critical mineral supplies by rolling out a three-tiered approach – revitalizing abandoned mines, recycling reclaimed scrap metal, and forging public-private partnerships across industry, academia, and government at all levels. [The federal government is actively working with them](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDuO3DAMQE8jd2Pob7tQEWAx3aZNKWgk2mYgWYbEmcXePvAmyAW2fY8giffr3b8HzHhsP0MBR2v1B3z0DETQfKmdzkANK2HsFAh6jRFa8JJLc-P2JhefAuZPr4fkVgAJagAnJiPEIiyfht2lSQeYIa78YeRjVdoaY2YtpiDNvCg-oLu2cSsXwbnVduSPuIJKa4pcTSotTHNISLWNvysetMOaP-sL2hhrGbLbic7O1A8m70ze8XhBp7FIHLdcHyFfWN2fVHyvzxaBqTcoATOT9oIFEj4LU29nwHQ7Q6MDWt_x_OdjKGfA7fia-C_FzG_KKP83geR6EcbyadZDc-n8wJyx24lpvl2nvh6lb9V9OfknAAD__w0tjhA) at Nevada’s Hawthorne Army Depot to launch the first phase of a U.S. Strategic Mineral Reserve. KFC Ranks Last in Restaurant Reviews KFC was named the after an analysis of 7.3 million TripAdvisor reviews of 244 restaurant brands. The Louisville-based fried chicken chain, with 4,095 locations in the U.S., had an average customer review score of 2.89 out of 5, landing it dead last in the pecking order. The crypto exchange site evaluated 244 restaurant brands with at least 150 reviews. McDonald’s, with more than 14,000 locations, ranked second to last, followed by Burger King. The top-rated restaurant chain was Andy’s Frozen Custard, followed by Great Harvest Bread Company. List: Ranking the Most Patriotic States Virginia was ranked , according to a recent survey. Montana, Vermont, Colorado, and Oregon round out the top five. The survey , including military service, voter turnout, civics education requirements, and jury participation. Arkansas ranked last in the survey, with low marks in civic engagement and the lowest voter turnout in the country at 53% in the 2024 presidential election. New York ranked second to last. **Good Morning!** On this day in 1928, the Democratic National Convention wrapped up in Houston with the nomination of Catholic and anti-prohibitionist Al Smith as the party’s presidential nominee. ## List: Top 100 4th of July Celebration Cities
Thirteen Texas cities, including Houston, Dallas, and Fort Worth, were ranked among [the Best Places](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJyk0LGOszAQBOCnMR2Rbdb4d-Hib-hy7ZVojTfBpw1EeAnJ25-SV7h6pJlP830ez1i4LNcvvFGU52UdFzoqkwhtI-5VynLgInWZWeiJtSaqMo1WW9fqvrVhzFj4NUKTY9I5mIai8c6YAEH7Zo6pCy6BCQGBMnQOweSUg_MJtZn-UVPiu0z3NhijDcAp9DhBZ8An73z2QYGmXGTdTjLTB3Hh1_qg7TStt4bjLHKvqvuv7KDscCAzybynd6rsQHlXdnirW5C5XS_tz86vdiKmtKGUdanKDtA702wx34_CXGrvFejrDQt_NuRvzzyi_Q0AAP__B854Pw) to Celebrate the 4th of July Rankings were based on affordability, attractions, and safety, as American households are projected to spend $8.9 billion on Fourth of July festivities. ****The highest-ranking Texas city was Houston at No. 39, followed by Dallas at No. 40. Not far behind were Fort Worth, Lubbock, and El Paso at Nos. 49, 63, and 67, respectively. ## Gov. Abbott Announces Special Election Date for State Senate Seat
Governor Abbott [announced the date of November 4](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkL2u4yAQhZ8Gd1gwxuZSUGzjLttuafEziVEIRGYSJ2-_sl_hdlN8c86n8--yXFzKqdz-ugda-lzrUnBvGYlwW9yrUSq7K9TKmgk_rjWPjcICAkYuJg5miS7l76K6aL2IRnZopR6lNMoI3a1WeokKwhSHIYD5-fHBRIhCa4PBjzp2yR5hYgIjpZBK9WZyQQ1Saa9HHbVhSmBMVLeeVjwlrvlb37j1oT66bFeiZ2PDHwYzg3nf9_6EaEv-VbCv243BfHQwmMV03JrBfDK8YXGEvD0xJJc5ZgyUauExHf-BuOF3zPnLV1dCDXcGc7fZ-NxTzqlNmilxe7iUTxX63YBvC_8DAAD___4RhaQ) for the special election to fill the state senate seat vacated by Kelly Hancock on Friday, who resigned earlier this month to become the state comptroller. Leigh Wambsganss, a former congressional staffer and longtime conservative activist on the Tarrant County GOP executive committee, announced her candidacy for the seat on Friday. Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick and Rep. Nate Schatzline, who dropped out of the race, have both endorsed Wambsganss. The 9th Senate district leans heavily Republican, with President Trump carrying 58% of the vote in 2024. The candidate filing deadline for the race is September 3, with early voting set to begin October 10. Read the [governor’s full proclamation here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAQhp8Gb7EAEygDQ9TWbYe0VTt0RBjONioxlrk4ydtXzit0-pbT6fv-n6M9upjiNLy7Exi89tlOcCkJEGGx7lwwThc3YZnGhHB1pXRQ0FtO-X5H5Y5rG1xMNyuqYDoaNKvAMLVnTAtNVTUaqkIjg3LqQUgKXQDBO9UzFxpNO8mgimZ7RiXXjFEmRK2l86JhQnVqr4LSRFAIEfNS4wh3iT7d8gpL7fOpSmZEnAtpDoS3hLdDXuv7UT3klfD2PKfsQiG87WOCjfMCZePn18ej9S5t-fbVTT77X_v9pG2ZwVtI4NG-HQ8vz3YLVbtNs55DXy0mzJeYUixSEUGHk4vp7oL_W3A1_C8AAP__knCFhg).
## Austin Reportedly Eyeing NHL Expansion
Austin is among five cities[ pursuing an NHL franchise](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkDGOwyAQRU-Du0QDxiYUFNu4y7ZbojGMYySCIzMbktuvnCts86unp6_3c_VXTDmV2zfeyfFr2XyhVjMx0-7xt3IqDQvXsmamF9Y6U-XgFajhBONJWR8x5bfXXXQzRCs7ctIMUlptwXSrA4sByfZ9GBYdA8BMENHCBcFclnjpkjtkMCorJUitz3bEoHupzWwGE40VGigm3vYzr_Q5seT39qT9HLZ7l93K_Kii_xJqEmpqrR1cDdtOByDUVNZ8LLUq1NT3MACobnfx0VLOqY5GaLjdMeWPkP-X4enUXwAAAP__Y99xCg), with the league setting expansion fees at $2 billion and hearing from hopeful markets during this week's Board of Governors meetings. Atlanta, Houston, Indianapolis, and New Orleans are also contending, but Austin [may have the edge](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLFuwyAQhp_G3rAAY1MGhi7Z0rWjdYYjRiIQmWtI3r6y-widTif9-u_77vu6XCGmmG9fcEdLr1CWjK0mJMJ9gZ9KMTfIVPOWCF9Q64qV3CK5nBifmTSLh5jei-q9Xbk3okcr9CSEUYbrfrMz6hWdMgG0c7NDNcrpA0CaaTQ-APTRHmV8lkYILpQazAxOjULpVU_aa9Mpjj5S2Qfa8IQI6V2euA-u3PtkN6JH7cbPTl46eWmtDSdSAIclhCPUycthdYwtMXw9INdYMgs7ZLfFiuzPlJ3tTLI1pnQGEPvd-kc79jrrTvHbHWI6L9P__vW08jcAAP__RZOCmA) due to its growth, lack of a professional team, and potential to add a Western Conference team. Any official announcement from the NHL on expansion is still likely years away. You can read more of what the [NHL commissioner recently said on expansion here](http://email.editor.thetexasflyover.com/c/eJykkLHOozAQhJ_GdCB7MTguXFxDl2uvRAtegnXGRngTkrf_RV7hb2dGM5_m3328Y4ghPf7iRo7fSx4TnSUSMx0jPguHdGLiktbI9MZSJio8jyChq2Vfgx09hvgZdeXdJL1VFTllOqWsttJUq1MEk7Zt23u0EgmVv5FF7xc9KaBpqYK7ymQPVimptG5sj7NulTaT6Yw3VmhJPnA-Gl7pC7HET37R0cx5q6Jbmfci2j8CBgHDeZ5N2fPBYc5XQMAQCR9PKgKGNc__6SNguCYFDGmNNb13TCXkVDPhVi9ENdRTiPGSFLT61t2U0QKG6nB-Py-n9EZo-dgwxC8E_-66l4OfAAAA__85AoKw).
