name: Free Thinker Daily Sponsor
subject: The "Invisible Scam" Nobody Knows About — Except The Big Food Companies Behind It
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e269127/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvYm1NUmp4dm1YUg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsTEU2dW5ScA/qP2hpZHM9bmM3eTd1RUtvSFBFcE5scw/gaGEh5g/s7r2795348b)
| | One of America’s top doctors is hoping you’ll read this before you set foot in another grocery store.

Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an “invisible problem” affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it’s happening — except the big food companies responsible for it.

And Dr. Gundry’s research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35.

But that’s not even the worst part.

“Because this problem has flown under the radar for decades, there are no rules to protect us. Nobody is stopping these companies from doing this to our food,” says Dr. Gundry.

He exposes exactly what’s happening — and what you can do about it — in a **[new whistleblowing video report that reveals his shocking research.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e269127/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGtwZXR0cmtuZy5jb20vS1EyWENXLzNNNkdMMTkv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsTEU2dW5ScA/qP3N1YjE9NjUwNCZfbmxpZD03WXZmRHhCVWFEJl9uaGlkcz1uYzd5N3VFS29IUEVwTmxz/gaGEh5g/sbsf4ccb218)**

**“Once you’ve seen this,” Dr. Gundry says, “you’ll never buy groceries the same way again.”**

In his free video, Dr. Gundry reveals a new method for protecting yourself and your family from this little-known problem affecting food all across America.

It’s a technique he’s been using himself — and at age 74, he says it’s the reason he looks and feels decades younger.

The video has quickly gone viral, with thousands of people saying they’ve been using Dr. Gundry’s simple discovery at breakfast every day.

And as a result, they report having more energy, improved digestion, more comfortable joints, and a slimmer waistline.

Dr. Gundry has granted permission for us to share the full video below, completely free.

“Every American should have this information,” he says. “And if this video opens your eyes to what’s happening out there, I hope you’ll share it with your loved ones.”

clean_body: | | | | | | | | | | | One of America’s top doctors is hoping you’ll read this before you set foot in another grocery store. Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an “invisible problem” affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it’s happening — except the big food companies responsible for it. And Dr. Gundry’s research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35. But that’s not even the worst part. “Because this problem has flown under the radar for decades, there are no rules to protect us. Nobody is stopping these companies from doing this to our food,” says Dr. Gundry. He exposes exactly what’s happening — and what you can do about it — in a “Once you’ve seen this,” Dr. Gundry says, “you’ll never buy groceries the same way again.” In his free video, Dr. Gundry reveals a new method for protecting yourself and your family from this little-known problem affecting food all across America. It’s a technique he’s been using himself — and at age 74, he says it’s the reason he looks and feels decades younger. The video has quickly gone viral, with thousands of people saying they’ve been using Dr. Gundry’s simple discovery at breakfast every day. And as a result, they report having more energy, improved digestion, more comfortable joints, and a slimmer waistline. Dr. Gundry has granted permission for us to share the full video below, completely free. “Every American should have this information,” he says. “And if this video opens your eyes to what’s happening out there, I hope you’ll share it with your loved ones.”

name: Sign Your Name | Left Action
subject: Sign: Pete Hegseth's incompetence is putting our troops at risk, and he needs to go
body:
| | | | |
---
| | |
# [Tell Pete Hegseth if he really cared about the troops, he'd resign](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9b2e1775-7f15-4c97-9eaa-eb9ba70090a2/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff12a6f5-f55f-416d-8c8d-a395804309d3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | There is no way in hell Pete Hegseth is qualified to be Secretary of Defense, so it's no surprise that he's done a terrible job -- [spilling top military secrets](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0485ae8d-aea4-4f65-a8df-4e49bd08691b/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) via a public chat app, yelling and screaming and making a [complete ass](https://default.salsalabs.org/T22b2d59c-9416-4d52-a3a3-eb4b6fd22217/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) of himself at a press conference, and displaying an astonishing [lack](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tb2a63479-2a74-4c2c-966c-864fc75fce61/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) of basic knowledge when testifying before Congress. Hegseth says he cares about the troops, but every day he is in his current position, he is putting those troops in danger. If he really cared about the troops, he'd resign, and join the call for someone far more competent to take over. [**Add your name: Tell Pete Hegseth if he really cared about the troops, he'd resign. **](https://default.salsalabs.org/T5c4ad9d4-693a-4d25-aa9f-e165cf848eb6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---

---

**$7.** That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. You can play a pivotal role in electing state Dems nationwide by donating today. | | | | | ---|--- $7. That’s all we’re asking from you to help elect Democrats in the states. Here’s why: Reason #1: We're facing a slew of special elections over the coming months and in November, the Virginia House and governorship are up for grabs – $7 helps win races like those and more. Reason #2: We’re up against Trump and a MAGA movement that are spending millions at the state level. When enough grassroots Democrats chip in $7, it adds up and helps Democratic candidates compete. subject: I, Peter, support President Trump’s ‘Big Beautiful Bill’
body:
If this bill fails, the chance to restore our nation’s strength and prosperity will slip away.

Peter,
America’s future hangs in the balance, and the fight to **_Make America Great Again_** is at a critical crossroads.
President Trump’s bold agenda, anchored by the game-changing **“Big Beautiful Bill,”** faces fierce opposition from establishment politicians in Washington, D.C., desperate to kill America’s comeback before it starts.
**_If this bill fails, the chance to restore our nation’s strength and prosperity will slip away._**
This is **YOUR** moment to act. Congress must **PASS** Trump’s agenda **NOW** — no delays, no excuses.

Turning Point PAC

Non-Contribution Account (For TTPAC, Inc.’s Expenditures Other Than Direct Contributions to Federal Committees)

As permitted by law, TTPAC, Inc. maintains a non-contribution account for the purpose of influencing federal, state, and local elections. Federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the name, address, occupation, and employer of individuals whose contribution exceeds $200 in an election cycle. For contributions from federal committees, corporations, and labor unions - regardless of contribution amount - federal law requires us to use our best efforts to collect and report the committee’s name and address. State and local law may require us to collect and report additional information.

Contributions to this account may be used to influence federal elections by making independent expenditures in support of or in opposition to federal candidates. Additionally, in state and local jurisdictions that permit non-individual type (e.g., corporate) contributions directly to candidates and/or committees, contributions to this account may be used for both independent expenditures and direct contributions to candidates and/or committees, as permitted by state and local law.

Individuals, federal committees, corporations, and labor unions may contribute to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account without limit. Contributions by national banks, foreign nationals (without lawful permanent resident status), and other foreign entities (e.g., foreign corporations) are prohibited. Contributions to TTPAC, Inc.’s non-contribution account are not tax deductible for federal income tax purposes. Paid for by Turning Point PAC, Inc. (www.tppac.com) and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.

Deportations ✅ Defending American jobs ✅ America First foreign policy ✅ But, it’s not all sunshine and rainbows. name: Hakeem Jeffries
subject: I’m asking you to decide.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91465?t=6&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT) **I need your full attention, friend:** House Republicans are trying to enact the largest cut to Medicaid in **HISTORY** to give massive tax breaks to billionaires.

\-- Millions of Americans will have their healthcare ripped away.
\-- Hospitals, health centers and nursing homes could shut down.
\-- Children, expecting mothers and disabled people would be abandoned because of this Big, Ugly Bill.

I'm calling for an all-hands-on-deck response.

[When Republicans look at what Democrats raised in June, this is what I want them to see: Americans -- of every age, in every zip code -- are united and ready to hold House Republicans accountable for threatening the health of our loved ones, friends and neighbors. We need them to know the consequences of their cruel agenda. That starts with committed grassroots Democrats, like you, splitting a $10 gift between Voter Protection Project and the DCCC today. Please: Will you chip in $10 and demonstrate the strength of this grassroots-powered movement and send Team Extreme a message they won't forget? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91465?t=7&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT)

The MAGA House majority is razor-thin.

We only need to defeat **THREE** Republicans to flip the balance of power and dismantle the Trump trifecta.

House Republicans have voted to enact the largest cut to healthcare and food assistance in American history. They must be defeated.

**So I’m asking you to make a choice, friend:**

\-- We can let Republicans outraise us, shamelessly enact their dangerous agenda and give their billionaire backers a massive tax break...

[\-- Or we can show strength in numbers, blow this June fundraising goal out of the water and prove that Democrats are coming for every flippable seat. Can I count on you to be one of the supporters we need to split a donation of $10 between the Voter Protection Project and the DCCC before the deadline? »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91465?t=8&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between the DCCC and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91466?t=9&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91467?t=10&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91468?t=11&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91469?t=12&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91465?t=13&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT)
Keep the faith,
Hakeem Jeffries
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20439%2E878179%2E9AeuvT) to request fewer emails. Peter,

We’re down to the final 48 hours of this quarter — and what happens next shapes how strong we show up across the board. That includes the race for the three Pennsylvania Supreme Court seats that are on the line this November.

This report is more than a requirement. It’s how we show we’re serious. It’s what national allies, donors, and yes — Republicans — will be watching to see if Pennsylvania is ready for what’s ahead.

name: The Editors at Broad + Liberty
subject: Good news for business in PA
body:
News + editorial to start your week | Broad + Liberty Weekly Reads | | | |
---
| | | Good morning and welcome to _Broad + Liberty_ 's Weekly Reads.

Stay up to date on all of this and more when you[ subscribe to our daily email list ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f62c1e621a&e=b7b3eddce2)and get the best of _Broad + Liberty_ delivered straight to your inbox.
---
|
---
|
### **1.[Billions in reserves, fewer students, falling scores — and Shapiro wants more](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ae13ce3a1a&e=b7b3eddce2)**
_By Beth Ann Rosica_
Despite the historic increases in education funding at the federal, state, and local levels, basic student proficiency in Pennsylvania is abysmal, and the Governor is asking for yet more education funding, proposing a $75 million (or one percent) increase in this year’s[ budget](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=91a8fca792&e=b7b3eddce2). Only 53 percent of Pennsylvania public school students are[ proficient](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=43c9ef0399&e=b7b3eddce2) in reading and just over 40 percent are proficient in math, while education[ funding](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ee7d58d3a0&e=b7b3eddce2) continues to increase and student enrollment declines. Over the last fifteen years, Pennsylvania school district’s revenues have increased by a staggering $14 billion at the same time that enrollment decreased by eleven percent. **Why It Matters.** Perhaps equally concerning is the fact that school districts continue to hold large sums in their fund balances while claiming to need additional revenue. The[ Commonwealth Foundation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7c05877aa0&e=b7b3eddce2) reports the majority of school districts in the state maintain large fund balances, also known as reserves, while simultaneously raising taxes. If reading and math proficiency were improving, Governor Shapiro might be able to make a case that more money solves the problem, but that is certainly not happening in the Commonwealth. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=7fc27943fc&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
### **2.[To grow again, Pennsylvania must compete](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c32e31bb70&e=b7b3eddce2)**

_By Luke Bernstein_
"Economic competitiveness” is not a phrase on most people’s minds, but it is the single most important determinant of a state’s long-term future. Every day, Pennsylvania is competing with other states to attract and retain people, jobs, and investment. And our competitiveness impacts everything – from the long-term health of our local school districts, to the viability of neighborhood small businesses, and whether our kids will have career opportunities close to home. But when it comes to competing, Pennsylvania’s story is still being written. **Why It Matters.** In virtually every national ranking that matters —[ business friendliness](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=41c4999723&e=b7b3eddce2),[ economic growth](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=4fd6251f3a&e=b7b3eddce2),[ entrepreneurship](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=c16e48f1cc&e=b7b3eddce2),[ overall tax climate](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9f9a767041&e=b7b3eddce2) — Pennsylvania ranks in the middle or near the bottom of the pack. When Intel was choosing where to build its $28 billion semiconductor plant a few years ago, they didn’t even look at Pennsylvania, in large part because we had the second-highest corporate net income (CNI) tax rate in the entire country and penalized investment due to uncompetitive net operating loss (NOL) policy. Similarly, U.S. Steel chose Arkansas over Pennsylvania for its $3 billion facility explicitly because of that state’s streamlined permitting process. At the ribbon cutting, Arkansas’ governor bragged they had finished the project before Pennsylvania would’ve even issued a permit. **[Continue Reading](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=fe36a487b7&e=b7b3eddce2)**
---
|
---
|
# **3\. Lightning Round**
* **[Richard Kosich: A profile in cowardice — why Montgomery County rejected ICE cooperation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=b70be00061&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Guy Ciarrocchi: The education experts are failing our kids — and our nation](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=d6118fb05d&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Stu Bykofsky: Is there anything really wrong with John Fetterman?](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=995fe6224c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Paul Davis: Elder abuse scams](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f60aa4f32e&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Christine Flowers: In Skrmetti, Justice Barrett explains it all](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=f263f89d22&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Kyle Sammin: New York makes the mistake Philly avoided](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=ea7294dd6c&e=b7b3eddce2)**
* **[Thom Nickels: Truth at all costs — Oriana Fallaci’s final war](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=1d36f0c1cf&e=b7b3eddce2)**

---
|
---
|
# **4\. PA Chamber reacts to socialist switch-up in NYC mayoral race**
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6e68ffbf25&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
"If you're looking for an exit plan, we'd love to have you here in Pennsylvania."

The PA Chamber had a tongue-in-cheek reaction to NYC's mayoral primary, with a clear message to NYC business owners: "Give us a call."
|
---
|
# **5\. What we're reading**
As America and Israel take action to confront the world’s leading sponsor of terror, Iran, it is worth remembering that the Islamic Republic has been a bad actor in the world for a long time — since its founding in 1979. This week at _The Free Press,_ writer (and _Broad + Liberty_ co-founder) Albert Eisenberg writes a moving piece about one example of Iranian terror that hits close to home: the murder of his grandfather and sixteen other Americans in the [Beirut embassy bombing of 1983](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=0f6e8dca15&e=b7b3eddce2). Iran, then and now, gives terrorists the means to kill and destroy throughout the world. Hopefully, that murderous regime is nearing its end.****
---
|
---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=9aae92903a&e=b7b3eddce2)
---
| **_Broad + Liberty_ is funded by readers like you.**

Your generous support ensures that _Broad + Liberty_ can bring you stories and opinions that Pennsylvania’s mainstream media would rather leave unheard. Please consider making a contribution today. If you would like your gift to be used to help us cover a specific story or subject, please let us know in the contribution form or at [editors@broadandliberty.com](mailto:editirs@broadandliberty.com).

As always, gifts made to _Broad + Liberty_ are 100% tax deductible!

Thank you, dear reader, for your steadfast support of our independent, broad-minded brand of local journalism. We could not do this without you.

With gratitude,

— The Editors at _Broad + Liberty_
---
|
---

---
| [ ](https://broadandliberty.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a45553d37b628a10a8ae35af1&id=6f265acc88&e=b7b3eddce2)
---

---

name: Deb Haaland
subject: From my kitchen to yours: green chile chicken posole
disclaimer_text: Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.
#
Hey Peter – it’s Deb Haaland. I’m running for Governor of New Mexico and State Democrats Committee said I could reach out to you.
One thing you should know about me is that **I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90883?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) _New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90883?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) _Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we will win.
**[Will you split $10 between my campaign and State Democrats Committee today? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90883?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90884?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=4&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90884?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90884?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=6&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90884?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=7&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90884?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=8&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90884?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=9&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90883?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=10&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6)
---
Happy cooking,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. **[If you make a donation of any amount to my campaign and State Democrats Committee through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90883?refcode=em20250629-9071&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=11&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6)**

Paid for by State Democrats Committee (StateDemocrats.com). Not authorized by any federal candidate or candidate committee.
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you. But, if you'd like to receive fewer emails, [you can do so here](https://act.statedemocrats.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails_state-democrats-committee/). If you need to remove yourself from our email list, [click here to unsubscribe](https://act.statedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe_state-democrats-committee/?t=12&akid=9071%2E614464%2EMNyAN6).

name: Action Required
subject: WHY won’t YOU renew your membership for 2025?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Republican State Leadership Committee
body:

name: Ilhan Omar
subject: Friend, this has never been easy
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
I’ve faced attacks and harassment from some of the most powerful people in the world
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=1691%2E791427%2EyL2-Me)

Friend — it’s Ilhan.
As you probably know, our FEC fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight.
**[I’m humbly asking for your support before tomorrow.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250629-1-180&t=2&akid=1691%2E791427%2EyL2-Me)
Friend, this has never been easy.
I was raised in a refugee camp halfway across the world. Through good luck and hard work, my family came to the US and found a good life in Minnesota.
And despite that background, I got active in my community and eventually earned the privilege of serving in office.
Since then I’ve faced attacks and harassment from some of the most powerful people in the world; the President, members of Congress, foreign leaders, oligarchs, multi-billion dollar media outlets and corporations, you name it.
I’ve dealt with the endless death threats, the insults, the people who think I’m not good enough, or not ‘from here’, and want me to hide away from public life.
**But through all of this, I’ve never backed down. Because I have you.**
This entire team and the movement we’ve built together has helped me push through and keep up the fight for our futures.
Because our progressive vision for this nation, where everyone is taken care of and provided the rights and dignity they deserve, is worth fighting for, despite it all.
So, with this crucial FEC deadline tomorrow, I’m counting on you to stand by my side, as you always have.
**[I’m humbly asking you to make a contribution of $5 or whatever you can afford today. Do it before our deadline tomorrow at midnight. It would make a huge difference.**](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/7?c0=io-em-june25.Nm0oDJ&refcode=em250629-1-180&t=3&akid=1691%2E791427%2EyL2-Me)
_If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your contribution will go through immediately:_

clean_body: I’ve faced attacks and harassment from some of the most powerful people in the world Friend — it’s Ilhan. As you probably know, our FEC fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight. Friend, this has never been easy. I was raised in a refugee camp halfway across the world. Through good luck and hard work, my family came to the US and found a good life in Minnesota. And despite that background, I got active in my community and eventually earned the privilege of serving in office. Since then I’ve faced attacks and harassment from some of the most powerful people in the world; the President, members of Congress, foreign leaders, oligarchs, multi-billion dollar media outlets and corporations, you name it. I’ve dealt with the endless death threats, the insults, the people who think I’m not good enough, or not ‘from here’, and want me to hide away from public life. But through all of this, I’ve never backed down. Because I have you. This entire team and the movement we’ve built together has helped me push through and keep up the fight for our futures. Because our progressive vision for this nation, where everyone is taken care of and provided the rights and dignity they deserve, is worth fighting for, despite it all. So, with this crucial FEC deadline tomorrow, I’m counting on you to stand by my side, as you always have. name: VoteVets.org
subject: 🪖 An important message for ALL VoteVets supporters 🇺🇸
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VOTEVETS, VOTEVETS
body:
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
#
Peter - please, don’t click away before reading.
When we think about the people who have done the most to support VoteVets over the years, it’s not the people who write the biggest checks who come to mind.
It’s the people who were there when everything was on the line.
Like you, Peter.

Your support, voice, and participation have helped us run some of the most powerful and impactful ads out there. It has helped us continue to be one of the most impactful and effective organizations in politics, even with all that Trump throws our way.
Your support helps us win races that otherwise wouldn’t even be competitive.
It’s helped us fight for things that matter most to Veterans. It has stopped more efforts to privatize the VA than we can count. It won things like the PACT Act, ensuring Veterans suffering from toxic exposures could get the treatment they need and deserve.
And now, it’s a huge part of how we are fighting back against Trump and Doug Collins as they work to dismantle the VA, piece by piece.

But here’s an interesting fact: out of almost 2 million people who have taken action with VoteVets, only 1% have made a donation online to support our work.
Today, we’re asking you to join that select group.

Our average donation is $25. Some give more, many give less. But with Trump coming for everything we hold dear, all that matters is that you’re choosing to power our work with a donation.
We’ll put it right to work fighting and fighting back against these liars and hypocrites, and defending our Constitution at a moment when it is in extreme peril.
[**If helping VoteVets lead this fight from the front seems worth an $5 donation to you, we’re humbly asking you to make a donation ahead of our end-of-quarter FEC deadline. We really need you. Thank you.**](https://act.votevets.org/go/2927?c0=vv-pac-em-june25.e5pwgQ&refcode=em250529-1-120&t=1&akid=34464%2E3013755%2EfOQ3Oz)

name: General John King
subject: Targeted by our enemies in Afghanistan and Iraq
disclaimer_text: Paid For By John King For Senate Inc
body:
I survived four IED explosions during my service in Iraq. I was a target for our enemies there and in Afghanistan. |
[](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=92596d8c61164d62aa36cc5f343d82ab&_e=az-v-EPO-nZF7RwqHiR8pNfxpI4MzxRZChqpEDoQVTpwxMdtTpvHHA07n_DK-JAkiazg0f9G9phtgebBXbJCv8mxiMKTATOLuPCaG-8aNqTLtdJcZwTB_gz5LJw41SE81amN1e_qiC-tNnd3HLcPRQ_U7hQ9g31FDMqV4fZVaqN1X8o5vUX8s9lc5eEAtB9nUHRoAGIRMoF8Xnnr9RdEzBUM_wz-0Yo6ctRhF5sJxECjds15_WQL0_sNkfhF2SeQf6rgWHDXmB-jgKUZKepYxEjbU0j2In5Wqj3OXhWKRr5W95_OWhVzDuNBQ7ttWHqCYFrGjCAQR-rPHpnKQj8_fK0JfIGNH4G7XUz5g6gsKf1gRyXIAyImrsND69oEflJDnHXdZOBOeshiQrOYda6auzh8i5ynPiLcEgYv4WjrwwmN4_E9izM-NDi8w5A3E5TslQtCVxasFHniV1sdRTLmUbgSwkW2CpqfrY41mluS_OlMakZwDebjV3b_RTo-UH07IBSVRai598PWDnQ3mYyua85NE_GUBgG1LE27_0En1wcK0I0FGXVXB0vrKaQWsTxh8JC9sJHVjbrTMlOI2ym34iJKAVhTkFyaLoPKLnCtnChefb5S03VGnW8HXIvZQ86Mt5sAh9zwQnfr94vJquHn4q7dzknqQRabV-4enSeKwsqcCKB2HNiY15RR6oWK90y_)

---
Fellow Conservative,

**I survived four IED explosions during my service in Iraq. I was a target for our enemies there and in Afghanistan.**

Tough fights don’t scare me and my service isn’t done. I’m running for the U.S. Senate at a critical moment in our nation’s history.

President Trump has taken bold action to protect American lives, secure our borders, and put our country first. Jon Ossoff hasn’t been with him any step of the way.

_Ossoff stood by while Biden opened our borders and was nowhere to be found when it mattered most during Afghanistan’s collapse._ Since the election, all he’s done is vote against supporting Israel and protecting girls’ sports.

_And by the way, he’s also said he’d support impeaching President Trump._

**Jon Ossoff is a politician who only cares about optics and keeping the party bosses happy. We can, and we must, do better than that. And I can do better than him.**

[**If you agree, I hope you’ll help send a lawman and soldier to the Senate by pitching in whatever makes sense here.**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=92596d8c61164d62aa36cc5f343d82ab&_e=az-v-EPO-nZF7RwqHiR8pNfxpI4MzxRZChqpEDoQVTpwxMdtTpvHHA07n_DK-JAkiazg0f9G9phtgebBXbJCv8mxiMKTATOLuPCaG-8aNqTLtdJcZwTB_gz5LJw41SE81amN1e_qiC-tNnd3HLcPRQ_U7hQ9g31FDMqV4fZVaqN1X8o5vUX8s9lc5eEAtB9nUHRoAGIRMoF8Xnnr9RdEzBUM_wz-0Yo6ctRhF5sJxEAT22a_esyOUi_eqSuzVYS87UT7AsrJ2KCd3Yr3JmIrktlmXG-NylPPkriMk-2Od6FjIvDI14b_a9IUX8L-LxztaGVC-kiGOlWRTcGJTK4Xqir_umQUvL-RVVIobDuaphydgYxDUgsalG3iDgmHQxw-NsPjO2C3FXAwi0cneEkrnydoaJI3Up63dwkH_BcGo8xVR36VOHHr5rGegbkxrJknX1ZJbo11dFp1Irk_-kdZTzzy3K1WKD_2Jfzppzz_mkn-k-BGL3Sx2Wn_JBEukKTkGhG5XBiLophjG3rwbtbihuQNWx958xDv8kdEBSNjjGFcgjVTwZ69ymDb6iyfDTCgKXFDlXnVI422x-B0hnNrKfj_-WJwQnCxFxD-y0GRd56-laBbasrCvVokIAmfjdiqQcXmOabMl2JiDXu7m_SmbtCWC9z0fsMjeQ20GE_xcGsSo1DPx5nP5HvD-vW8nvOE)

[JOIN THE MISSION
DONATE TODAY](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=92596d8c61164d62aa36cc5f343d82ab&_e=az-v-EPO-nZF7RwqHiR8pNfxpI4MzxRZChqpEDoQVTpwxMdtTpvHHA07n_DK-JAkiazg0f9G9phtgebBXbJCv8mxiMKTATOLuPCaG-8aNqTLtdJcZwTB_gz5LJw41SE81amN1e_qiC-tNnd3HLcPRQ_U7hQ9g31FDMqV4fZVaqN1X8o5vUX8s9lc5eEAtB9nUHRoAGIRMoF8Xnnr9RdEzBUM_wz-0Yo6ctRhF5sJxEB7xQToBQlH4FnrGBB2BfHMxNV8g0G0G1lH1NZgqQ99AOqnum-SwB8AvLMdXI9rgmDf3K6GFRKnFb1SjZnxra7HAFjGeJcT0vdHmRV4nSp6bDFCpzpmGz-ft7uWQL4pQ4QafhU9dQ1mgo4fkTMVbnnUbeEr2ThRIjN5EEohV8eMzRwTCTYicPKyDPqmI2NGmJIZug7_jOuxkw2DQJCS31xSqm9A-8EFW73wUSLeN7XaUYR9hJqr2YoLQttiSiJ5ByUYwtpxssuasrxe5vyXoQ0qOg3reOZ0GGfprCuBooWBA6SwJ-VxygpFI38ck7MaEz0alAjVjC-wNqZFuEyyrRTLKOxCT29S--Z20uibUruZXi2CnbbpSx0Z_5il5mtnwzKfD6W3hON4gevk4Yq35dR1ivY5Sx1n_R2on_SNrlNxkf9OtxMy0PN1j2AX4cbbo5yhFMPqp_RtqcOWk1E3P6WI)
Flipping this Senate seat, defeating Jon Ossoff, and sending President Trump backup is going to make for the most difficult and expensive race in the country.

Ossoff will raise and spend whatever it takes. _We don’t have to outraise him, but we must raise as much as we can as soon as we can to share my message._

And unlike Ossoff, who has elite liberal donors, I depend on patriots like you to fuel the mission. [**Will you pitch in just a few dollars here?**](http://links.justandfreegop.com/u/click?_t=8ca5ef3d31cc43bcb1fbe6968d953911&_m=92596d8c61164d62aa36cc5f343d82ab&_e=az-v-EPO-nZF7RwqHiR8pNfxpI4MzxRZChqpEDoQVTpwxMdtTpvHHA07n_DK-JAkiazg0f9G9phtgebBXbJCv8mxiMKTATOLuPCaG-8aNqTLtdJcZwTB_gz5LJw41SE81amN1e_qiC-tNnd3HLcPRQ_U7hQ9g31FDMqV4fZVaqN1X8o5vUX8s9lc5eEAtB9nUHRoAGIRMoF8Xnnr9RdEzBUM_wz-0Yo6ctRhF5sJxEDpUm7F8TSR5aW0EDrvmKyG1wCZ6iXUg6uYNzoN5Ta3vbU13ocEHIrZsvOm6LlSLxmeL4OBi-saPC-y6meD8CbZAFSlZZ2RnBw5AweDa605wKf-8BgLnvwbfL5Ql9quteQv_VrZ2lBsiso_lZDR6dd3EOBlW9X6QG3DAeSLWHtw0NI6Sr0VXsMf936WMjhiqImorQiCBs_HB5LD9lcug3k19OjbAXSCoZgNfUE5muDp5mWwNVI9ntj0W0_g1T7J6AH2qd3lCf_3PuwywraUkR6gEtgRVufPhlVrTb10Xn6kAsJew7eVq0TwnDbV8zb1WeAptjC1DYSbWSRX8680a3JWNF7xteyFCboo9Go8tnLLnucc-YrnfkQiAUokZS0fzcxlNWgTe8iO4Q0I6wB0LK1EcPL9gh8T0-JuXEuWVYe-vpn5fHq9f275s9kKuM_2KhTsG0vSkqMeJA7DYW5TdQlo)

Thank you,

clean_body: I survived four IED explosions during my service in Iraq. I was a target for our enemies there and in Afghanistan. | Fellow Conservative, I survived four IED explosions during my service in Iraq. I was a target for our enemies there and in Afghanistan. Tough fights don’t scare me and my service isn’t done. I’m running for the U.S. Senate at a critical moment in our nation’s history. President Trump has taken bold action to protect American lives, secure our borders, and put our country first. Jon Ossoff hasn’t been with him any step of the way. Ossoff stood by while Biden opened our borders and was nowhere to be found when it mattered most during Afghanistan’s collapse. Since the election, all he’s done is vote against supporting Israel and protecting girls’ sports. And by the way, he’s also said he’d support impeaching President Trump. Jon Ossoff is a politician who only cares about optics and keeping the party bosses happy. We can, and we must, do better than that. And I can do better than him. Flipping this Senate seat, defeating Jon Ossoff, and sending President Trump backup is going to make for the most difficult and expensive race in the country. Ossoff will raise and spend whatever it takes. We don’t have to outraise him, but we must raise as much as we can as soon as we can to share my message. And unlike Ossoff, who has elite liberal donors, I depend on patriots like you to fuel the mission. Thank you, Maj. Gen. John King (retd.) | General John King is a soldier, lawman, and the first Hispanic elected statewide in Georgia history. He’s running for the Senate now because Georgians need a leader who will fight for them, fight for President Trump’s agenda, and put America First. | | | Paid For By John King For Senate Inc. body:
What if I told you that I’ve been out in front for these past six months, speaking out and fighting back against the worst of what has come out of DOGE and Trump’s White House?
#

Hey everybody, Mark Kelly here.
In two days, we’re going to hit our end-of-quarter deadline. The second of the year, with only five to go before next year’s mid-term elections.
Before that happens, I’m hoping there’s something (anything) I can say to convince you to make a donation to help us hit our fundraising goals.
What if I told you that I’ve been out in front for these past six months, speaking out and fighting back against the worst of what has come out of DOGE and Trump’s White House?
What if I told you that’s put a pretty big target on my back, and it’s earned me a lot of incoming from Trump’s allies?
And what if I told you that one of the most important things that allows me to go on offense against these attacks is donations from folks like you, to emails like this? Tons of people chipping in whatever they can to help me build a people-powered effort that’s bigger than any one of us.
So, how about it, friend?
[**Can I count on you to chip in today, well in advance of our deadline on Monday? Anything helps, truly, and it adds up real fast when a ton of people are donating together.**](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=mek-em-june25/.u07CFH&refcode=em250629-1-600&t=1&akid=6105%2E6688874%2E2YkGJi)

name: Elise Stefanik
subject: A communist and raging antisemite is set to become NYC’s next mayor
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC
body:
I had to take drastic action.
| Peter,
---
I was praying I wouldn’t have to write these words...
---
**But a radical, defund-the-police, communist, raging jihadist antisemite whose supporters have direct ties to terrorist groups is all but certain to _WIN_ the Democrat Primary and is now set to become the next mayor of New York City. **
---
**_Zohran Mamdani declares victory in NYC’s Democratic mayoral primary as Cuomo concedes_**
---
[Source: _Associated Press_]
---
Like most Americans who are horrified by this, I was hoping that Kathy Hochul would finally show some semblance of a backbone and stand up to the extremism that’s taking over her party.
---
**But instead, she _FULLY_ _EMBRACED_ her party’s radical nominee, his dangerous rhetoric, and far-Left policy positions. **
---
That’s right – Kathy Hochul and New York Democrats have officially embraced not just Mamdani, but also Marxism, antisemitism, anti-capitalism, jihadism, and sheer insanity.
---
**Make no mistake, with a communist, jihaidst antisemite expected to be New York City’s next mayor and WEAK Kathy Hochul as our governor, every principle we hold dear as freedom-loving Americans will be under assault.**
---
Given the scale of the threat we now face, I had to do something drastic.**__Desperate times call for desperate measures!__**
---
**So, I called every donor I know, called in every favor I have, and secured a 500% MATCH on all grassroots contributions to help _SAVE_ New York. **
---
I’ll be perfectly honest, Peter – if we don’t FIRE Hochul in 2026 and elect a governor willing to STOP the insanity coming out of New York City, our freedom will be crushed by the most extreme Left-wing agenda imaginable.
---
_This is an existential threat to our very way of life as Americans!_
---
[**So please, if you believe New York (and America) are worth saving, Peter, I beg you: Make a grassroots contribution of ANY amount to claim your 500% MATCH and help us CRUSH our most important goal of the year before the critical FEC-mandated deadline on June 30th._ **](http://links.conservativeum.com/s/c/2iCNlMUTdu3zlZMjKrY7NHKw8VywwH01mcmKOFQIshtJit_phprXBA7Z0G4krkg0TFf0HUShrLH28YUePzOgHOhLQu5Awc6fwmGNMwN-pU9Ju2hYMjOagHM9Mz5pqGHk6aXuCyFdSdJ5vIN83xBrIR4TCZ0d64Gs8oLmu6inr9LXlBqhDjfTGlvIrlkwkfPNVI-wuCHJ_kvZdiqfcfjB7zhdrkf1AtQoNKVeiqWmdovT7tKSMi7d1Z96IMd4GZsswZvA--qKpF_S2-u4g578byWTtfqbmHl6wNLA0XOINIpHUYCOxw2mtNf0v42R8bm5nl15p7qVEN7FUKnaEQCtWb6twiPteCS2gGMUjrtmfmt19835GTsEsuRPSjdGhax_D_krlvl1DzDWMM9PhWEPWix1yFovLYnfVNUWqi6BllInIaAXsfhQTsyPOE5n2GyaJU5pS5jPqg5T7YZQ9i4Qj1D7GBaecWwXDa9qkXwiYXTWzvYosPScf_JQ5K0Ap4cvanDnsrhhAVg8uTJ1gRZmCeAnjH4KXsVqoNFa__hW-2dsJpyeuHEkd7jhIhpYgG6e3jAhrnArKQKi7u3IEZNdfEZocXH4l6F0zYnTAqq8QIFgFJjuRKeV6B8VCoAaCFv0aqry80_2QqJExl5iG-AOm7QMr1unmszmUeYd_Eolf7AaeyVDx4QtVXrp6dlMneY8C85kwztz7xeZOCuVEB5NFGVfHJs9Slr7PPIJGkNEWT6skCTc2nYjxlOzdgbMsEATB7s7CJ-D7b1H72FSsbjGvlUmXhmSih4LTig-luXlQrQx2t36RFmJSjmXiqPsLUg/b9iD3gMbGWMKAyzQCEUBJFtFQ13MpOGM/10)

But instead, she FULLY EMBRACED her party’s radical nominee, his dangerous rhetoric, and far-Left policy positions. That’s right – Kathy Hochul and New York Democrats have officially embraced not just Mamdani, but also Marxism, antisemitism, anti-capitalism, jihadism, and sheer insanity. Make no mistake, with a communist, jihaidst antisemite expected to be New York City’s next mayor and WEAK Kathy Hochul as our governor, every principle we hold dear as freedom-loving Americans will be under assault. Given the scale of the threat we now face, I had to do something drastic.Desperate times call for desperate measures! So, I called every donor I know, called in every favor I have, and secured a 500% MATCH on all grassroots contributions to help SAVE New York. I’ll be perfectly honest, Peter – if we don’t FIRE Hochul in 2026 and elect a governor willing to STOP the insanity coming out of New York City, our freedom will be crushed by the most extreme Left-wing agenda imaginable. This is an existential threat to our very way of life as Americans! Thank you, Rep. Elise Stefanik Chairwoman of House Republican Leadership Paid for by Team Elise, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Elise for Congress and E-PAC. www.elisestefanik.com PO Box 500 Glens Falls, NY 12801 |

clean_body: You clearly get it| | | Friend – your results from the last survey stood out. You clearly get it. Your insight into GOP strategy was sharp, and frankly, we need more supporters like you advising us. That’s why I’m sending you something special: I need it completed within the next 24 hours. name: Katie Porter
subject: No nonsense
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39845%2E3422442%2EsIpApY)
Dear Derek,
I’ll skip the usual attention-grabbing nonsense of political emails and get right to the point: we have a major fundraising deadline on June 30th, and we need your help.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250629_1_ak?refcode=em20250629-39845&refcode2=39845_3422442_sIpApY&akid=39845%2E3422442%2EsIpApY)
We’re trying to end this month strong because after June 30th, **we’re required to publicly report how much we’ve raised since the start of our campaign.** Our opponents and outside groups will be very carefully watching this number as they decide how to invest their resources. We want to show them that they’re better off spending their money somewhere else.
Statewide campaigns in California are pretty expensive; winning candidates regularly have to spend tens of millions of dollars over the course of the race. And because we don’t accept money from corporations, lobbyists, or executives at Big Pharma, Big Oil, and Big Banks, we can’t just count on a few big checks to raise the resources we need.
Polls show me leading the field of declared candidates—but that a plurality of voters are still undecided. We’re in a strong position, but this race is a real toss up.
If you can, consider making a donation ahead of our June 30th deadline. It will go a long way in boosting the strength of our campaign.
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250629_1_ak?refcode=em20250629-39845&refcode2=39845_3422442_sIpApY&akid=39845%2E3422442%2EsIpApY)
Thanks,
Katie

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250629-39845&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39845_3422442_sIpApY&akid=39845%2E3422442%2EsIpApY)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39845&t=4&akid=39845%2E3422442%2EsIpApY)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39845)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39845&t=5&akid=39845%2E3422442%2EsIpApY)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Chris Pappas
subject: Let’s make history together
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey
body:
I’m proud to be a part of this legacy.
|
---
| | **I'm Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire.** Andy Kim said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride. I've always admired Harvey Milk. He changed history and paved the way for folks like me when he became one of the first openly gay elected officials in America fifty years ago. Since then, there have been numerous other examples of LGBTQ+ leaders elected across the country, like Tammy Baldwin, Pete Buttigieg, and Sarah McBride, just to name a few. These leaders have broken down barriers, stood up to discrimination, and fought for a vision of our country where every American can live with safety, dignity, and equality. I'm proud to be a part of that legacy – and to carry the torch forward with this campaign. **If elected, I'll be the first openly gay man to ever serve in the U.S. Senate.** And I will work as hard as I can when I'm in the Senate to ensure _everyone_ – no matter who they are or who they love – has the freedom and opportunity to thrive, whether that means owning a home, starting a family, opening a small business, or anything else in between. This Pride Month, I'm asking for your support to power this grassroots campaign. We're on the verge of making history, but we can't win this fight without a strong foundation. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans would like nothing more than to flip this pivotal Senate seat red next November – but if we fight back, _we can stop them in their tracks._ [**Are you with me? Donate $3 now to my campaign and****Andy Kim****. Together, we can keep this seat blue and make LGBTQ+ history at the same time.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110480603/554477960/1896587427?refcode=2025-06-29-kimpappas&recurring=&amount=3&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=c25e0456-f154-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84Nzk3MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjMjVlMDQ1Ni1mMTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=vG9rVhEpYzUEgwEYO0BygXMsqs1ubXH-BLaXAOlCyus=) Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Chris Pappas and Andy Kim instantly:

clean_body: I’m proud to be a part of this legacy. | | | I'm Chris Pappas, Democratic candidate for U.S. Senate in New Hampshire. Andy Kim said I could reach out to you today with a special message about Pride. I've always admired Harvey Milk. He changed history and paved the way for folks like me when he became one of the first openly gay elected officials in America fifty years ago. Since then, there have been numerous other examples of LGBTQ+ leaders elected across the country, like Tammy Baldwin, Pete Buttigieg, and Sarah McBride, just to name a few. These leaders have broken down barriers, stood up to discrimination, and fought for a vision of our country where every American can live with safety, dignity, and equality. I'm proud to be a part of that legacy – and to carry the torch forward with this campaign. If elected, I'll be the first openly gay man to ever serve in the U.S. Senate. And I will work as hard as I can when I'm in the Senate to ensure everyone – no matter who they are or who they love – has the freedom and opportunity to thrive, whether that means owning a home, starting a family, opening a small business, or anything else in between. This Pride Month, I'm asking for your support to power this grassroots campaign. We're on the verge of making history, but we can't win this fight without a strong foundation. Donald Trump and MAGA Republicans would like nothing more than to flip this pivotal Senate seat red next November – but if we fight back, we can stop them in their tracks. = Donate Now If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll split your contribution between Chris Pappas and Andy Kim instantly: | = | = ---|--- = | = = Happy Pride Month – and thank you for standing with me as we continue making history. With gratitude, Chris Pappas | | Paid for by Andy Kim for New Jersey | This email was sent by Andy Kim for New Jersey P.O. Box 211 Marlton, NJ 08053 United States Email is an important way for Andy Kim to keep supporters like you informed about critical issues and to build a winning grassroots campaign. name: Eric Sorensen
subject: Taking no chances
body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110480904/554478921/-1812448514?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGJiMjg5Yi1mMTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rx9mPCk99uDe9_N9-mgkRzpHiW5y3omHo0s0_uW-3aU=)
Peter, I'm not the type of person to leave things up to chance. As a meteorologist, I had a responsibility to give folks in my community information they needed to prepare for the week ahead. Local parents, teachers, and businesses all depended on it. If a severe storm hit, I knew what I said on TV might be the difference between life and death. **I’m not leaving anything to chance as we close in on this critical FEC deadline, either.** Year in and year out, this district is on the frontline in the fight for House control, a bellwether of the Midwest. We cannot take the chance that MAGA _expands_ its control of Congress, let alone keeps it. Working families, good-paying jobs, science as fact, a women’s right to reproductive freedom, the future of our democracy -- it all hangs in the balance. **Today marks the last day before our deadline. As it stands we still have some work to do. ** [**If, like me, you're not willing to leave the future of our country up to chance, please send in a contribution of $3 to help us pick up the pace, keep this seat blue, and flip the House.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110480906/554478946/-1812448514?refcode=em-6.29.25-all-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGJiMjg5Yi1mMTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rx9mPCk99uDe9_N9-mgkRzpHiW5y3omHo0s0_uW-3aU=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [Chip in $10 Now](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110480908/554478969/-1812448514?refcode=em-6.29.25-all-a&express_lane=true&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS85MzkwNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyNGJiMjg5Yi1mMTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Rx9mPCk99uDe9_N9-mgkRzpHiW5y3omHo0s0_uW-3aU=)

Peter, There are folks in Washington, and even some in the media, who say I'm just talking about fixing the debt crisis... Let me be crystal clear:
* I've introduced balanced budget amendments.
* I've put forward plans to cut $500 billion from the budget.
* I've forced votes on reading the bills, exposing the waste, and opposing blank checks to bureaucrats.

That may not make headlines. name: Rob Sand
subject: I’m personally asking, Peter 🤞🤞
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
It’s Rob Sand, the Democrat running for Governor in Iowa. We’ve got loads to do this summer.
Peter, it’s Rob Sand, the Democrat running for Governor in Iowa. We’ve got loads to do this summer.
We are kicking off my 100 Town Hall Tour, we’re hiring and training staff, recruiting volunteers, attending events across the state, running a statewide digital program... it adds up, and quickly.
**_On top of all that,_ the same partisan insiders and special interests that want to drag Iowa backwards are already lobbing attacks our way, and we must be ready to respond.**
**[That’s why I’m personally asking you to split a donation of $25 between Heartland Patriots and my campaign, Peter. Your support has taken us this far, but I need to know you’ve got my back as this race continues to heat up.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90778?refcode=em20250629-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9058%2E614464%2EIKlIFP)**
**[Split $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90778?refcode=em20250629-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=2&akid=9058%2E614464%2EIKlIFP)**
**[Other amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90778?refcode=em20250629-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=9058%2E614464%2EIKlIFP)**
You might ask yourself, _“how much can my $25 really do?”_ — To which I would say, _“a whole heck of a lot, actually.”_
Your donation of $25 is what will help us go head-to-head with the special interests and partisan players hellbent on defeating me.
You chipping in $25 could mean more phone calls or face-to-face conversations at someone’s door.
And with a race that’s shaping up to be pretty close, that could mean _everything._
**Which is why I’m personally asking for YOUR support today, Peter:[Would you please consider pitching in a split donation of $25 toward our $50,000 goal before we flip the calendar to July? I promise I wouldn’t be asking if it weren’t important!](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90778?refcode=em20250629-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=9058%2E614464%2EIKlIFP)**
**[Split $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90778?refcode=em20250629-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=5&akid=9058%2E614464%2EIKlIFP)**
**[Other amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90778?refcode=em20250629-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=6&akid=9058%2E614464%2EIKlIFP)**
Thanks a bunch!
—Rob Sand
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90778?refcode=em20250629-heartland-patriots-rob-sand&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=7&akid=9058%2E614464%2EIKlIFP)

name: Mark @House GOP
subject: No matter what you decide, we still appreciate you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
My heart is broken. You’re leaving us?
Patriot, no matter what you decide to do after reading this message, I want you to know that we've cherished every moment with you.
[Recently, we discovered that your membership was expiring. And it’s expiring at the WORST possible time.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=2bf023b69fb4430ea4bb0f675a347323&_e=VJpnXh_nZnUk1AG6NylE0cBiCyFrbdlZJgisvQoc6Di1BkBmppySvyYKuEM56o8tI8_hQlFL2WbEWDPT_UNG5oc-kHPNeGEDt_sybckto5Rrsyk3RIAuHQks2XTyciiFsd3otnJ7hNrwyXaASySEtjt6q0QH0YHhaJDCixlCC0vMcZeQBINdaLTnGmrRgyjD-mLqG_pSZo9ZBbSjy7LQycJXi9vg3MgGFsMazqzqLA2q7Ao3hViaIOS0f63RzftPCzH-rMcG3CLhOSzfXvVLpx1oJBEv5X3-P8jcJMHfRMd3JHn5o66PB1jvsLKyNMpJA3ZqY7hKjjoVPpYjL91iNQueOz3kJGJ6uQgIyqYadWUnTgmb0V51B9zBGkB1EhRrCC7eOczh4lDrOfVQ72jit7ygmClW8JjV2hm268lATZ34MlsbsqGNuxbWy3VjPXPHF6sjzdUyR94AnPxe6yhyT64sOEAnYciLI1gOTxdnyMWnlQ_ugZUdkfzqJYzkI9Lx4wq_NQag_cTvf_yrjEqqkvwZb_1ccjY8wKBxkVSXr6PeSzHzATn0wKVCjIErT0PMXnqzG1_CAtWEYXqaFc93DkF6GbAWWtidBfVbLXJX31tLwIKxyp1wCvTkBihuMFvK9fO4BpDvHnVG1DWnLFsxsVsgB_FUBh3U8riDVkZ9gFpT6kJcfOLtqU6xn1frOUqFDs9mD8XHLY6y9_40tuww_KGRjMi82sT5qY2ZOzdP65A%3D)
So we reached out 1, 2, 3, 4+ times.
We asked Speaker Johnson to reach out to you.
Steve Scalise reached out to you.
Jim Jordan, Elise Stefanik, and practically the whole House GOP team tried to get you to stay - but we've heard nothing back.
Look, we get it. Fighting to save our country is hard, and every time you stand up, you risk having the radical left-wing MOB come after you.
And face it, you're busy. You have your own life. You have your own family to take care of and watch after.
So if you're too tired to keep fighting for our country, to save the GOP Trifecta, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN...
We'll be heartbroken to see you go, but we understand and we thank you for your many years of distinguished membership and financial support.

clean_body: My heart is broken. You’re leaving us? Patriot, no matter what you decide to do after reading this message, I want you to know that we've cherished every moment with you. So we reached out 1, 2, 3, 4+ times. We asked Speaker Johnson to reach out to you. Steve Scalise reached out to you. Jim Jordan, Elise Stefanik, and practically the whole House GOP team tried to get you to stay - but we've heard nothing back. Look, we get it. Fighting to save our country is hard, and every time you stand up, you risk having the radical left-wing MOB come after you. And face it, you're busy. You have your own life. You have your own family to take care of and watch after. So if you're too tired to keep fighting for our country, to save the GOP Trifecta, and MAKE AMERICA GREAT AGAIN... We'll be heartbroken to see you go, but we understand and we thank you for your many years of distinguished membership and financial support. Please, it's not too late to make things right. Sincerely, Mark @ House GOP| | Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: authoritarianism, plain and simple
body:
Peter, what Trump just did should terrify every single person who believes in democracy.
He issued an Executive Order weaponizing the Department of Justice to go after ActBlue — the small-dollar fundraising platform that powers thousands of Democratic campaigns across the country.
Why? Because he’s terrified of us.
He knows grassroots Democrats are his biggest threat — and he’s trying to meddle with our ability to fight back before the election even begins.
This is how authoritarians seize power:
1️⃣ They discredit elections.
2️⃣ They silence the media.
3️⃣ And then — they come for the money.
Trump is officially coming for the money. This is an all hands on deck moment.
This is a targeted, strategic assault on the tools we use to organize, fundraise, and win. We MUST overwhelm him with IMMEDIATE resistance. Rush a donation right now to defend ActBlue, defend grassroots power, and defend our democracy: [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-abeo?refcode=052825_1]

Married couples may together give a total of $10,000 per calendar year. Federal political action committees (PACs) can contribute up to $5,000 per calendar year. The first $5,000 contributed in a calendar year from federally permissible sources will be deposited in The Real Texas PAC's contribution account. * One of the best ways to show Republicans how PISSED we are is by hitting our end-of-quarter fundraising goal by tomorrow at midnight. Because our total will go public first thing Tuesday morning, and believe us – they'll be looking. 👀

There is still time – although not much – to show Republicans that this bill would be a disaster for the country and their careers.
This is where you come in, Derek. We're counting on YOUR help to reach our $50,000 end-of-quarter goal – because John’s fighting for the folks in PA who'll be paying for this bill, not Trump's rich buddies who'll get a sweet tax break if it's signed into law.

| Peter,

As we approach our June FEC deadline tomorrow, I want to take a moment to say thank you for everything you’ve done so far.

This race is one of the most competitive in the country and Republicans are throwing everything they have at us. They know that this seat is critical to holding onto their House majority and they're already running attack ads to try and take it back.
---
| [FIGHT BACK ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110483526/554485667/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTJiMTc4OS1mNTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SgOogVdWng1NOx4F2-67tsmN88U1qMboLDpi3oI3B0Y=)
---
**But with your support, we have the strength to defend this seat and keep fighting against their extreme MAGA agenda.** We have momentum on our side and the grassroots power of supporters like you is what will carry us to victory.

The fight ahead will be tough. The GOP will stop at nothing to reclaim this district, yet I am filled with hope because we’ve shown that we can win. And with the work we’ve done together, we have the power to keep this district blue and protect the progress we’ve made.

But I need you with me now. The deadline is tomorrow and if we fall short, we risk opening the door for Republicans to flip this seat back.

[_**Will you chip in today to help us finish this crucial push? Every dollar you contribute brings us one step closer to stopping Republican attacks and keeping this seat blue.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110483527/554485668/800699251?refcode=BLU_EM_LGC_2025-06-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NzIwMiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIyOTJiMTc4OS1mNTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SgOogVdWng1NOx4F2-67tsmN88U1qMboLDpi3oI3B0Y=)

Your contribution today would enable us to reach more undecided voters across the Commonwealth.

[_**Will you donate any amount before tomorrow's end-of-quarter reporting deadline to become a Founding Donor to my campaign for Governor?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110483621/554485965/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmEyYjE3ODktZjU1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E9qckcLYsd0HZi1qIlnx9jNJMvcUpG8Thk_hz34uLSk=)

\---------- Forwarded message ---------
From: **Abigail Spanberger**
Date: Weds, Jun 18, 2025 at 8:08 PM
Subject: Please give me a few minutes of your time to read this long but deeply personal message from beginning to end
To: <dpwillis67@gmail.com>
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110483623/554485969/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmEyYjE3ODktZjU1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E9qckcLYsd0HZi1qIlnx9jNJMvcUpG8Thk_hz34uLSk=)
---
| Peter, now that the general election is here, I wanted to take a moment to tell you how the daughter of a nurse and law enforcement officer just became the Democratic nominee for Governor of Virginia.

Please give me a few minutes of your time to read this long but deeply personal message from beginning to end.

Hopefully, you will learn something new about me, feel inspired, and follow through with a $25 donation to my campaign.
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110483624/554485970/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmEyYjE3ODktZjU1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E9qckcLYsd0HZi1qIlnx9jNJMvcUpG8Thk_hz34uLSk=)
---
I'm running to serve our Commonwealth because Virginia is my home, and it deserves a leader who cares more about bettering people's lives than scoring political points.

Growing up in Henrico County, I recognized early on the importance of serving my community and my country. Around our dinner table, I heard my mom's stories from her shifts at the hospital and my dad's from his time in the army or working cases he loved. I went to Henrico County Public Schools, graduated from the University of Virginia, and quickly decided I wanted to follow in my parents' footsteps and dedicate my life to protecting others.

I started as a federal law enforcement officer tracking narcotics traffickers and money laundering operations. Next, I joined the CIA as a case officer. I took my oath and spent day-in and day-out undercover working to keep our country safe from terrorist threats. Then, following the 2016 election, I felt a profound responsibility to help push back against the Trump Administration's efforts to rip healthcare away from millions of people.

I'd never expected to be a candidate for elected office, but in 2018, I went ahead and ran for Congress. It was a district that hadn't elected a Democrat since 1968, but guess what happened?

_I won!_

And every day as an elected representative, walking the hallowed halls of the United States Capitol, I worked with my staff to prioritize the issues that actually kept families back home up at night. We focused on lowering prescription drug prices, supporting veterans like my dad, defending reproductive rights, rebuilding infrastructure, bringing countless jobs to our Commonwealth, and much, much more.

_Through it all, I stayed focused on putting Virginians first._

And it's that same mission which motivates my campaign for Governor. The challenges facing our Commonwealth are too urgent to ignore, from skyrocketing costs to unprecedented attacks on our freedoms. And they're too serious to entrust to my opponent, Winsome Earle-Sears, who sings the praises of Donald Trump and wants to drag his destructive agenda across the Potomac and force each of us to accept the consequences.

Let me be crystal clear: **I've spent my career standing up for Virginians and working to defend our Constitution — and I won't stand by while President Trump and his allies work to dismantle it.**

As we've seen since January, Democratic Governors are the first line of defense against Trump's abuses of power. When I'm elected, I will stand strong against any attempt to restrict reproductive freedoms, limit our right to vote, or deny our LGBTQ+ friends and neighbors the joy that comes with marrying the person they love.

I wouldn't be able to carry out this campaign without my husband Adam and our three girls behind me.

I strive every day to approach this work with humility, and the truth is that we're the odds-on favorite to flip this seat. In a few month's time, we can send a message to Trump's White House at the ballot box. But we're already seeing Republicans spend over a million dollars on ads against us that aim to scare and mislead people into backing my opponent. That's simply not the campaign I intend to run.

**It's going to take every person reading this to commit some time, energy — _and yes, some money_ — to wage an honorable campaign, to counter all the attacks, and to succeed in flipping Virginia blue on November 4th.**

Now, I know that was a lot, but you deserved to hear about my journey before receiving a candid request for your donation.

[_**Peter, what do you say? Will you make a contribution of any amount (our average is $30 this month) to become a founding member of my campaign for Governor of Virginia? The contributions we receive to emails and texts fund investments in ads, organizers, and the like, and they're critical to putting our best foot forward in the general election.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110483625/554485971/-735451259?refcode=BLU_EM_ASFG_2025-06-29_1&amount=30&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMmEyYjE3ODktZjU1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=E9qckcLYsd0HZi1qIlnx9jNJMvcUpG8Thk_hz34uLSk=)

Hopefully, you will learn something new about me, feel inspired, and follow through with a $25 donation to my campaign. | = I'm running to serve our Commonwealth because Virginia is my home, and it deserves a leader who cares more about bettering people's lives than scoring political points. Growing up in Henrico County, I recognized early on the importance of serving my community and my country. Around our dinner table, I heard my mom's stories from her shifts at the hospital and my dad's from his time in the army or working cases he loved. I went to Henrico County Public Schools, graduated from the University of Virginia, and quickly decided I wanted to follow in my parents' footsteps and dedicate my life to protecting others. I started as a federal law enforcement officer tracking narcotics traffickers and money laundering operations. Next, I joined the CIA as a case officer. I took my oath and spent day-in and day-out undercover working to keep our country safe from terrorist threats. Then, following the 2016 election, I felt a profound responsibility to help push back against the Trump Administration's efforts to rip healthcare away from millions of people. I'd never expected to be a candidate for elected office, but in 2018, I went ahead and ran for Congress. It was a district that hadn't elected a Democrat since 1968, but guess what happened? I won! And every day as an elected representative, walking the hallowed halls of the United States Capitol, I worked with my staff to prioritize the issues that actually kept families back home up at night. We focused on lowering prescription drug prices, supporting veterans like my dad, defending reproductive rights, rebuilding infrastructure, bringing countless jobs to our Commonwealth, and much, much more. I strive every day to approach this work with humility, and the truth is that we're the odds-on favorite to flip this seat. But we're already seeing Republicans spend over a million dollars on ads against us that aim to scare and mislead people into backing my opponent. That's simply not the campaign I intend to run. It's going to take every person reading this to commit some time, energy — and yes, some money — to wage an honorable campaign, to counter all the attacks, and to succeed in flipping Virginia blue on November 4th. name: Jon Ossoff
subject: You deserve an explanation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
body:
#

Hi Peter —
[**I’m writing to ask, humbly, if you will chip in $5 to my re-election campaign ahead of our important FEC fundraising deadline tomorrow.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250629-1-f&t=1&akid=518%2E5691347%2EJwm5LJ)
Here’s why this request is so important, especially today:
The end of this month marks the most important fundraising deadline we’ve faced so far in our campaign, and one of the most critical tests of the movement we’ve built in Georgia.
After the deadline, we’re legally required to report our fundraising numbers to the Federal Election Commission — and shortly after, those numbers will be made public.
Everyone from Donald Trump to my Republican opponents and their billionaire allies are going to look at our fundraising numbers closely. Very closely.
If they think we look weak, you can bet they’ll flood the airwaves with even more attack ads designed to distort my record. Attacks we can’t afford this early in the campaign.
We have to show everyone that our movement in Georgia is thriving and unstoppable — that we have what it takes to build the strongest voter outreach and mobilization program our state has ever seen. Because that’s what it’s going to take to win this race.
That’s why I’m personally asking:
[**Will you make a contribution to my campaign before our critical FEC deadline tomorrow night? Every donation counts. Each one sends a powerful message that people like you have my back.**](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250629-1-f&t=2&akid=518%2E5691347%2EJwm5LJ)
**[DONATE](https://act.electjon.com/go/32?c0=ossoff-em-june25.2OdyOr&refcode=em250629-1-f&t=3&akid=518%2E5691347%2EJwm5LJ)**
Thank you for everything.
Jon

Paid for by Jon Ossoff for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Thank you for supporting Jon Ossoff. Email is a critical way to keep up with Jon and his work in the US Senate, but you can click [here](https://act.electjon.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=518%2E5691347%2EJwm5LJ) if you'd like to unsubscribe.
