name: Steve Hilton
subject: Newsom’s deranged 8-minute rant…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9177027/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvYURnYXRuTjk1cg/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsNnY3dTk4Zw/qP2hpZHM9bmNNbDZ1WjV2QzVSWHdscw/gaGFS-Q/sbn39a279b0)
| |
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-Q/sbi19209ca1)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. [**And if you feel the same way about what’s happening in California right now, then I need you to join my campaign.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-Q/s4v195e7ca5) Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... **While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant.** You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped. **** **[That’s why I’m asking you to join my campaign today.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-Q/s2na07eaa52)** These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. He’s more focused on collecting sound bites for his foolish Presidential campaign than he is on keeping Californians safe. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need **_real_** leadership in California. That’s why I’m running for Governor. **[And it’s why I hope you’ll join my campaign today.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-Q/s7j490f8ef2)** Friend, it’s not just the riots; EVERYTHING is falling apart all around us in this once great state.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
_**This election is our last best hope to save California.**_ _****_ _**We can create a new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California Golden Again.**_
So I'm calling on every proud patriot who wants to turn things around:
[**Will you chip in $26, $50, $100 or more to help me Make California Golden Again?**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-Q/s7s562cb910) Join me—and let's get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Republican Candidate for Governor of California
---
[DONATE](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-Q/s0r5ab22ada)
---
**P.S.** Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. **[Click here to donate $50, $26, or $15](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.-Q/s7o418adc81). **Even a small donation of $5 adds up if everyone chips in.
---
|
---
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9177027/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1RoZVN0ZXZlSGlsdG9uLw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsNnY3dTk4Zw/qP19ubGlkPW5jdzZaWDVrUDUmX25oaWRzPW5jTWw2dVo1dkM1Ulh3bHM/gaGFS-Q/s9g19562847) | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9177027/VaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9TdGV2ZUhpbHRvbng/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsNnY3dTk4Zw/qP19ubGlkPWd6OWJkZUpTYTcmX25oaWRzPW5jTWw2dVo1dkM1Ulh3bHM/gaGFS-Q/sfkb1e62e71) | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e9177027/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9zdGV2ZWhpbHRvbng/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsNnY3dTk4Zw/qP19ubGlkPURxQlFUZG5NaHgmX25oaWRzPW5jTWw2dVo1dkM1Ulh3bHM/gaGFS-Q/sesf75cc71a)

name: Deb Haaland HQ
subject: We’re running out of time
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY DEB FOR NEW MEXICO
body:
Let us explain.
# [](https://act.debhaaland.com/go/133?t=1&akid=2915%2E400544%2EGOYtXp)
Our end-of-quarter deadline is tomorrow, and we need to talk about why this one really matters:
1️⃣ **Donald Trump only lost New Mexico by 6 points in 2020.** That was after Republican dark money groups spent millions trying to flip our state. They got dangerously close.
2️⃣ **Those same groups are watching our campaign right now.** They’re already recruiting a millionaire who can self-fund his campaign. They’re watching our fundraising for any sign of weakness. We cannot let them think we are vulnerable.
3️⃣ **We set a goal to raise $75,000 before Monday at midnight.** If we hit that target, we send a powerful message that this grassroots team is energized, organized, and ready to win.
**[So, what do you say? Can we count on you to pitch in $5 before tomorrow’s deadline to help us reach our goal and build the campaign we need to win?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_dh_20250629_1_eoq?amount=5&refcode=em20250629-2915&refcode2=2915_400544_GOYtXp&akid=2915%2E400544%2EGOYtXp)**

We can’t thank you enough for your support.
—Deb Haaland HQ

name: Ritchie Torres
subject: I grew up next to a Donald Trump golf course.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Torres For Congress PO Box 580303, Bronx, NY 10458
body:
But not in the way you think...

| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110485943/554492660/1654258770?refcode=header-img&amount=25&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTEyN2FiNS1mOTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4DArnBRTAkQ0u4ag7IeRcOcpR4aZPY7Uco6nNUfqjw=)
---
Peter, I grew up across the street from one of Donald Trump's golf courses in New York. This one, in fact: ↘↘ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110485946/554492665/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250629_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTEyN2FiNS1mOTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4DArnBRTAkQ0u4ag7IeRcOcpR4aZPY7Uco6nNUfqjw=) Yes, really. But it was not the way I think you're picturing it in your mind — let me explain.

I didn't live in a skyrise apartment or a mansion with luxuries at my fingertips.

**I grew up in the Throggs Neck Houses, a crumbling public housing project among vermin, lead, and mold, across from Trump's Golf Course in The Bronx.** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110485948/554492667/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250629_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTEyN2FiNS1mOTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4DArnBRTAkQ0u4ag7IeRcOcpR4aZPY7Uco6nNUfqjw=) My mom was a single mom, working multiple jobs to keep food on the table. I'm so grateful for how much she sacrificed to provide for our family.

Living across from Trump's Golf Course, I had to see a reminder every day of how easily and often our government supports and enables the ultra-wealthy at the expense of working families.

You see, the New York City government shoveled over _$100 million in government aid_ to develop this golf course with Donald Trump and the corrupt Trump Organization. _They did this while New York families like mine lived in hunger and poverty across the street._

But, I always try to look at the positives — growing up smelling the stench of Donald Trump (even before he became president) has led me to where I am today: **Fighting in Congress for justice for real working families.**

When I work on legislation, I always think about the families who are struggling just like mine did. I lived that experience — it is not abstract to me. And I'll never forget it.

I hope you feel like you have a better sense of who I am and what my values are. I swear that I'm fighting for those values every day in Congress.

Right now, the threat of Trump and his MAGA cult looms large. They're determined to strip our right to vote, give tax breaks to people like Trump, and put special interests ahead of working families _– and they’re raising millions to pull it off._

But we have something they don’t, Peter: A powerful grassroots movement made up of working people, not faceless corporations. [**Can I count on you to join our coalition today by chipping in $3 toward our $25,000 Mid-Year goal? If thousands of people like you each chip in what they can afford, I know we can take on their dark money and handle whatever the GOP trifecta throws our way. »**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110485949/554492668/-935925420?amount=3&refcode=RTFC_20250629_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTEyN2FiNS1mOTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4DArnBRTAkQ0u4ag7IeRcOcpR4aZPY7Uco6nNUfqjw=) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $3 »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110485956/554492679/-935925420?amount=3&express_lane=true&refcode=RTFC_20250629_EMDF_E1_T0_AC_RS&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NjE2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZTEyN2FiNS1mOTU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=F4DArnBRTAkQ0u4ag7IeRcOcpR4aZPY7Uco6nNUfqjw=)

At Emerge, we believe in turning moments of outrage into lasting power. We don’t just react. We train. We build. We prepare women to lead.

| Peter,

Every day, we are witnessing both horror and hope.

We see the cruelty of Donald Trump’s attacks on our rights, the violence, the corruption, the deliberate efforts to strip people of their humanity.

But we also see people peacefully protesting and refusing to give in.
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110485700/554492122/1143593133?refcode=BLU_EM_EMRG_2025-06-29_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVkVNUi8xLzgxMzIxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImQ4MTI3YWI1LWY5NTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=tkbh2vta2YvvNpvP4MZ2eZmhRojZyw-IMBAfDttZh1w=)

clean_body: At Emerge, we believe in turning moments of outrage into lasting power. We don’t just react. We train. We build. We prepare women to lead. | Peter, Every day, we are witnessing both horror and hope. We see the cruelty of Donald Trump’s attacks on our rights, the violence, the corruption, the deliberate efforts to strip people of their humanity. But we also see people peacefully protesting and refusing to give in. = That tension of grief and resilience is where our work lives. At Emerge, we believe in turning moments of outrage into lasting power. We don’t just react. We train. We build. We prepare women to lead. And right now, we have a rare opportunity to double down on that mission. = | | | = | = | = | = | = This is how we meet the moment: by turning outrage into action and hope into lasting change. Thank you for being part of this work. We need you with us. In solidarity, A’shanti F. Gholar President & CEO, Emerge = * | | = Paid for by Emerge America Emerge America 818 Connecticut Avenue NW, Suite 450 Washington, DC 20006 United States | = =

| | We're going to keep hammering this home, Team,**** because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever. President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail. **For background:** After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular _._ He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. So of course, this order directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to “take all necessary action” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day. This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast. [**We've got to keep fighting and work to protect our elections and our fundamental right to vote. Step up with $25 or whatever you can today and help us defend vote by mail across the country >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110486495/554493777/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=KgRYYoo4qZauya2nSXhcEbJSKgOcS5xlv/M4G+BMIKbhX+Ls/WPiwXq5cD8XDt9FToFudIFuKzG1HwOEjmPPsaetRxxdRKceOl1cpz4Dq8g=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1MjgzZGRjLWY5NTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=txIUZx1279n-bflBSWfKK_2q_w8bd_tSmn1h_YmPIZc=&emci=29f5b631-ed54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f5283ddc-f954-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)

| | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail. Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ _There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters._ ” [**Opponents of voting rights have proven they'll go to any length necessary to stop people from voting and make sure that they stay in power. Will you chip in $25 or whatever you can to fight their unending desire for control and protect mail-in voting? >>**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110486504/554493785/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=KgRYYoo4qZauya2nSXhcEbJSKgOcS5xlv/M4G+BMIKbhX+Ls/WPiwXq5cD8XDt9FToFudIFuKzG1HwOEjmPPsaetRxxdRKceOl1cpz4Dq8g=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImY1MjgzZGRjLWY5NTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=txIUZx1279n-bflBSWfKK_2q_w8bd_tSmn1h_YmPIZc=&emci=29f5b631-ed54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=f5283ddc-f954-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)

Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.

Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. [**Your support is crucial to our efforts. clean_body: Democracy Docket: With New Order, Trump Tries to Kill Off Vote By Mail | | | | | | | We're going to keep hammering this home, Team,** because the mainstream media continues to ignore this executive order and how it will change our elections forever. President Donald Trump's massive anti-voting executive order has sent lawmakers, election officials, and voting rights advocates into a frenzy. One provision focuses on a goal that for years has been a borderline obsession for MAGA: Cracking down on voting by mail. For background:** After every election in which he's been a candidate or in power, Trump has raged over the use of mail-in ballots in general and ballot deadlines in particular . He's tried to claim fraud for every single ballot counted after Election Day. So of course, this order directs Attorney General Pam Bondi to “take all necessary action” against any states that count absentee or mail-in ballots received after Election Day. This order makes it clear that the MAGA crew will do anything they can to codify their power permanently and silence the will of the people by suppressing and eliminating the votes we cast. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | We all know that mail-in voting laws are about ballot accessibility, making it easier for voters to participate in our elections. Elderly voters, the disabled, our military service members -- they all vote by mail. Mail-in voting has happened dating back to the Civil War. It's always been safe and secure, mail-in voting fraud is supremely rare. States have spent millions of taxpayer dollars investigating voter fraud since 2020's "big lie" and found virtually nothing. It's been used widely in some states for decades and in most of the country since the pandemic. Our partners at VoteAmerica said it best: “ There is no good-faith reason to limit vote-by-mail access, reject ballots without postmarks, or refuse to count ballots that arrive after Election Day. If the administration moves forward with these proposals, they will effectively disenfranchise older voters, rural voters, and military voters. ” | | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code. A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.Paid for by Integrity First Voter Action Project, www.voteractionproject.org, and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee.Integrity First Voter Action Project P.O. Box 19294 Portland, OR 97280 United States

name: Elizabeth Warren (via Democrats.org)
subject: Our budgets show our values
body:
---
Derek, Our budgets show our values. Plain and simple. Trump and his Republican allies have shown us their values loudly and clearly: Cut Medicaid for millions so that their billionaire allies don’t have to pay their fair share. Trump’s Big Ugly Bill that the Senate is debating slashes health care funding for an estimated 16 million people. Let’s put that into perspective: Nearly half of all newborn babies today get their health care through Medicaid. People with serious disabilities who have a home health aide, or a wheelchair, or a breathing apparatus, rely on Medicaid for this care. About half of all seniors in nursing homes rely on Medicaid. Cuts to Medicaid could mean that local hospitals don’t get reimbursed when these folks show up in the emergency room. The consequence of unreimbursed care could mean a number of hospitals just completely shut down. Then it's not just the people who receive benefits from Medicaid who get hurt. It's everybody in the community who then has to drive farther and farther out to receive the care they need. It’s all of us. Republicans know that this plan is deeply unpopular. They’re going to try to pass it anyway. That's why it is so important — right now — to speak up and fight back. We have to. **So I’m asking for your help. Keep speaking out, keep showing up at rallies and town halls near you, maybe even consider running for office yourself.**[And if it makes sense for you, split a contribution between my campaign and the DNC to keep up our fight for working families and support Democrats’ work organizing across the country.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-dnc-warren-split?refcode=em_20250629_3822_fr&amount=10&refcode2=3822_22930333_VBpoZd&akid=3822%2E22930333%2EVBpoZd) Thank you for being a part of this, and more soon, Elizabeth Elizabeth Warren
U.S. Senator, Massachusetts

_If you gave recently via check or mail, our system may not have yet processed your gift. We are appreciative and thank you greatly for your support._

Young Republican congressman Kevin Kiley **[clashed with Trump-deranged Rep. Jamie Raskin](https://substack.com/redirect/49334ebe-7264-45df-8a0a-9817c830879a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** for his party's failure to take responsibility for promoting the violent anti-ICE riots in Los Angeles.
He calls Raskin out to his face!
[Click TO Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/49334ebe-7264-45df-8a0a-9817c830879a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/49334ebe-7264-45df-8a0a-9817c830879a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
Raskin took aim at Trump during his floor speech for apparently not taking appropriate action during January 6, **["He sat and he watched it, eating hamburgers or whatever!"](https://substack.com/redirect/49334ebe-7264-45df-8a0a-9817c830879a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** He lashed out at Republicans' condemnation of the LA riots, crying hypocrisy.
"And now they want to bring a totally partisan resolution to the floor, deploring violence thousands of miles away and you've got members of congress from California saying they're not capturing what actually happened there!" he exclaimed.
Kiley fired right back at Raskin's emotional tirade, "As to my colleague from Maryland's claim that this resolution is set up in a partisan way, nothing could be further from the truth!"
"The resolution simply condemns acts of violence, we oppose sanctuary policies, **[we're opposed to putting a target on the back of our federal officers](https://substack.com/redirect/49334ebe-7264-45df-8a0a-9817c830879a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** and frankly to defunding the police, and it's not our fault that those who have allowed this violence,... all happen to belong to one party!" he added.
Watch the heated exchange here:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/49334ebe-7264-45df-8a0a-9817c830879a?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's Push For America First](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against.
**[Read The Great American Reset now.](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Yours Truly,
**SEAN HANNITY**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
[ Click To Learn More](https://substack.com/redirect/7b6a2906-688d-43a5-b8ac-0402548c6db7?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
# Trump celebrates after 'Big Beautiful Bill' overcomes senate barrier
The Senate **[voted 51-49 along party lines Saturday night](https://substack.com/redirect/8f118744-6f96-43a2-a881-cbf7a78a7781?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** to advance President Donald Trump's massive tax and spending bill, with only two Republicans opposing the measure as Democrats vowed to force a complete reading of the 940-page legislation to delay its passage.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/8f118744-6f96-43a2-a881-cbf7a78a7781?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The bill passed a crucial 51-49 vote along party lines with only two Republican defectors** \- Sen. Ron Johnson dramatically flipped from 'no' to 'yes,' calling it a "necessary first step" to fiscal sustainability, while only Sens. Thom Tillis and Rand Paul voted against unlocking debate on the 940-page legislation.
* **Democrats are using procedural tactics to delay and oppose the bill** \- Senate Minority Leader Chuck Schumer called it a "radical bill" released "in the dead of night," while Democrats plan to force a complete reading of the entire 940-page document on the Senate floor, with Sen. Elizabeth Warren saying they'll hold the floor "all night" to fight back.
* **Trump celebrated the vote as a "great victory" and praised supporting Republicans** \- The president specifically thanked Sens. Johnson, Scott, Lee, and Lummis on Truth Social, calling them "Republican Patriots" who "truly love our Country" and expressing pride in the party while emphasizing goals like growing the economy and securing the border.
* **Republicans frame the bill as cleaning up Biden-era problems while aiming for July 4 passage** \- Supporters like Sen. Rick Scott said they're putting the nation "on a path to balance the budget after years of Democrats' reckless spending," while Trump wants the legislation on his desk by July 4, with the bill still needing to pass the House after Senate approval.

* * *
# IDK takes out Hamas leader, Oct 7 planner
The Israeli Defense Force reportedly killed Hakham Muhammad Issa Al-Issa, a senior Hamas military leader and co-founder of its armed wing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/a7ff352f-cfde-4af7-9295-953d8b1d75b6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **Issa was one of the key planners of the October 7 massacre** and led Hamas' force build-up and training operations, while also advancing the group's aerial and naval attack capabilities against Israeli targets.

* **Issa was instrumental in Hamas' military structure and terrorist training programs** \- He co-founded the Izz al-Din al-Qassam Brigades' military academy where he trained thousands of terrorists and helped shape the military wing's organizational structure after arriving in Gaza from Syria in 2005.
* **The strike is part of Israel's broader campaign to eliminate Hamas leadership following recent operations** \- Issa's death comes just days after the IDF and Shin Bet killed Asaad Abu Sharia, head of the Mujahideen Brigades responsible for kidnapping and murdering hostages, as Israel continues its mission to "locate and eliminate all terrorists involved in the October 7 massacre."

* * *

name: Dominic Rapini
subject: The Winning is Out of Control
body:
We are living in great times

| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://us16.campaign-archive.com/?e=8763c56857&u=ebcefd906ec01db66e79c886c&id=b9c04eb658)
---
|
---
| | | | |
---
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | “History is written by the victors.” – Winston Churchill
---
| | | | | | | | | | |
---
| **“Winning doesn’t just silence critics—it renders them irrelevant.”**
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
|
# Opinion | The Week the Resistance Lost Everything
---
| _By Dominic Rapini, American Businessman and Political Commentator_
I Call it karma. Call it payback. Call it the revenge of the forgotten men and women. Or better yet, call it what it is: **Winning. So much winning,** it’s honestly starting to get a little embarrassing—though not for us.
After years of being called every name in the book, after being told that tariffs would wreck the economy, that NATO would collapse, that peace in the Middle East was a pipe dream and that Donald Trump would never govern seriously—the scoreboard just exploded.**This past week wasn’t just one of the greatest in recent presidential history. It was one of the greatest in American history.** And it wasn’t brought to you by the Ivy League think tanks or the D.C. permanent class. It came straight out of the MAGA playbook.
Let’s recap the carnage.
Cease-fire in Iran—yes, that Iran. The same regime that’s been the centerpiece of Beltway anxiety since 1979. Gone is the nuclear saber-rattling. In its place? Silence. Peace. Maybe even an opening. Turns out when you hit the ayatollahs hard enough, they pause to think. Who knew?
Then there’s the **revival of the Abraham Accords,** now roping in even Syria and Lebanon—two of the last holdouts in the Middle East. We’re not talking about nice words and platitudes. We’re talking about actual movement toward peace—real, tangible normalization. For the first time in our lifetime, maybe ever, the Middle East might not be on fire. And it’s not because someone held hands in Geneva—it’s because**American strength finally means something again.**
Oh, and while the foreign policy elite was busy choking on their Chardonnay, Trump **defanged Iran’s nuclear program** —a feat previous presidents only dared to drone on about. All without starting a war. Imagine that.
Meanwhile, in Africa, a region Washington remembers every few years when Bono sends a letter, a **30-year war in the Congo has been brought to a close**. Six million lives lost over decades—and now, a pivot from bullets to business. Commerce over conflict. And in the process, we secured mineral rights that just so happen to boost our economy and loosen China’s grip on rare earths. **Double win.**
* The economy? Booming.
* Stock market? Record highs.
* Inflation? Controlled.

Tariffs? No longer the dirty word of 2018. In fact, some economists (the same ones who mocked Trump back then) are e**ating crow on CNBC** and admitting: the tariff policy worked. Maybe—just maybe—he saw something they didn’t.
**NATO? Unified.** Spending has skyrocketed to 5% of GDP for member nations. That’s not charity, folks. That’s buy-in. It’s the biggest defense investment surge in decades and it didn’t come from begging—it came from backbone.
Then came the **Supreme Court hat trick:**
* Parents reclaimed sovereignty over what their kids are exposed to in classrooms.
* Activist judges got benched, reined in from overruling elected leaders with every personal whim.
* And finally, the bombshell: a constitutional correction decades overdue. No more birthright citizenship for the children of non-citizens. An American right, restored to Americans.

Even the FCC got in on the action, laying down rules to protect conservative voices from ad industry blacklisting. You know it’s a good week when the **bureaucrats start fighting for free speech instead of throttling it.**
And while he’s not wearing a red hat, **RFK Jr. is scoring wins too** , with food producers stripping out the toxic ingredients he’s been warning about for years. Vaccine policy? Getting the adult treatment after decades of pharma babysitting.
But perhaps the biggest shift of all? The **reemergence of American military might.** After the humiliations of Afghanistan under Biden, we’re finally seeing a military that projects force, not apologies. And trust me, Putin, Xi, and every two-bit dictator just felt that ripple. We’ve entered the **FAFO phase of U.S. foreign policy.**
Here’s the kicker: the Democratic Party has nothing to say. No ideas. No leadership. No pulse. Just grumbling from their coastal clubs while the world changes without their permission. **Winners focus on winning. Losers focus on winners**
**The resistance? Resisted nothing.**
The retribution? It’s not revenge rallies or viral tweets. It’s success. It’s progress. It’s **America First turning into America Winning.**
And yes—the winning is out of control.
God help us if we win much more. Actually...**God is already helping us, isn’t he?**

Controlled. Tariffs? No longer the dirty word of 2018. In fact, some economists (the same ones who mocked Trump back then) are eating crow on CNBC and admitting: the tariff policy worked. Maybe—just maybe—he saw something they didn’t. NATO? Unified. Spending has skyrocketed to 5% of GDP for member nations. That’s not charity, folks. That’s buy-in. It’s the biggest defense investment surge in decades and it didn’t come from begging—it came from backbone. Then came the Supreme Court hat trick: Parents reclaimed sovereignty over what their kids are exposed to in classrooms. Activist judges got benched, reined in from overruling elected leaders with every personal whim. And finally, the bombshell: a constitutional correction decades overdue. No more birthright citizenship for the children of non-citizens. An American right, restored to Americans. Even the FCC got in on the action, laying down rules to protect conservative voices from ad industry blacklisting. You know it’s a good week when the bureaucrats start fighting for free speech instead of throttling it. And while he’s not wearing a red hat, RFK Jr. is scoring wins too , with food producers stripping out the toxic ingredients he’s been warning about for years. Vaccine policy? Getting the adult treatment after decades of pharma babysitting. But perhaps the biggest shift of all? The reemergence of American military might. After the humiliations of Afghanistan under Biden, we’re finally seeing a military that projects force, not apologies. And trust me, Putin, Xi, and every two-bit dictator just felt that ripple. We’ve entered the FAFO phase of U.S. foreign policy. Here’s the kicker: the Democratic Party has nothing to say. No ideas. No leadership. No pulse. Just grumbling from their coastal clubs while the world changes without their permission. Winners focus on winning. Losers focus on winners The resistance? Resisted nothing. The retribution? It’s not revenge rallies or viral tweets. It’s success. It’s progress. It’s America First turning into America Winning. And yes—the winning is out of control. God help us if we win much more. Actually...God is already helping us, isn’t he? | | | | Copyright (C) 2025 Dominic For CT. All rights reserved. You have signed up to be a support of mine. Our mailing address is: Dominic For CT 4 Mariners Way Branford, CT 06405-4481 USA Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or |

name: Team Fight Like Hell PAC
subject: Keeping Michigan moving forward
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC
body:
This deadline is a test of strength for the movement we’re building together |
#
---
Team, We’re heading into a critical moment: the final 36 hours before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Thanks to supporters like you, we’ve made real progress in Michigan — from protecting reproductive freedom to lowering costs and fixing infrastructure that’s long been neglected. These wins didn’t happen by accident. They happened because we organized early, built smart campaigns, and fought for working families in every corner of the state. Now, we’re working to build on that momentum — and lay the groundwork for the future. **Governor Whitmer is fighting like hell to protect our progress in Lansing, and she’s also working hard to recruit the next generation of leaders who will carry this movement forward.** That means training new candidates, supporting smart, tough organizers, and investing in people who are ready to step up and deliver for their communities. But these programs only work if we have the resources to sustain them. That’s why this end-of-quarter matters: it’s a measure of strength, and a chance to show we’re ready for the fights ahead. If we come up short, GOP funders and billionaires like the DeVos family will seize on that as an opportunity — and flood the state with the millions of dollars they need to flip the state red and roll back everything we’ve fought for. **[Can we count on you to chip in today and help us close the gap before the deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110488503/554499058/-1809995021?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20250629_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmNlMmY0MTQtZmM1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NvYV_VF6B98QEbVSYSprkHXqaGY3niKcdHJWN0t6Otk=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110488504/554499059/-1809995021?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_FLHP_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC90_20250629_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDY0NjIiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYmNlMmY0MTQtZmM1NC1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=NvYV_VF6B98QEbVSYSprkHXqaGY3niKcdHJWN0t6Otk=)

clean_body: This deadline is a test of strength for the movement we’re building together | Team, We’re heading into a critical moment: the final 36 hours before our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline. Thanks to supporters like you, we’ve made real progress in Michigan — from protecting reproductive freedom to lowering costs and fixing infrastructure that’s long been neglected. These wins didn’t happen by accident. They happened because we organized early, built smart campaigns, and fought for working families in every corner of the state. Now, we’re working to build on that momentum — and lay the groundwork for the future. Governor Whitmer is fighting like hell to protect our progress in Lansing, and she’s also working hard to recruit the next generation of leaders who will carry this movement forward. That means training new candidates, supporting smart, tough organizers, and investing in people who are ready to step up and deliver for their communities. But these programs only work if we have the resources to sustain them. That’s why this end-of-quarter matters: it’s a measure of strength, and a chance to show we’re ready for the fights ahead. If we come up short, GOP funders and billionaires like the DeVos family will seize on that as an opportunity — and flood the state with the millions of dollars they need to flip the state red and roll back everything we’ve fought for. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = We’ve proven what’s possible in Michigan, and with your help, we’ll have an even brighter future ahead. — Team Fight Like Hell PAC Fight Like Hell PAC PO Box 15093 Lansing, MI 48901 United States ** | mailto:info@fightlikehellpac.org| | Paid for by Fight Like Hell PAC. Republicans are working hard to pass their Big Ugly Budget, which doesn't prioritize affordable housing or reducing everyday expenses. Instead, they're making attempt after attempt to go after our public lands. The places we treasure for hunting, fishing, and enjoying the beauty of nature are under threat of being taken away and sold off in a fire sale. The threat goes beyond environmental concerns; it's an assault on the essence of New Mexico's heritage, economy, and way of life. I'm steadfastly committed to ensuring our public lands remain accessible to all, safeguarding them from being privatized and lost. [_**We have to fight for our public lands but, we need robust grassroots support to show the depth of our support. With the FEC deadline fast approaching, your contributions are crucial to fueling Martin Heinrich’s campaign as he continues to champion New Mexico's treasured landscapes and our cultural legacy. The concerted effort by Republicans to sell off cherished parts of our nation would not only crash real estate markets, it would forever hurt future generations — depriving them of these treasures that belong to all of us.
These lands are not just landscapes; they are our heritage, our public resource, and a testament to our commitment to both America’s past and future.
Martin is committed to protecting the lands that we hold dear, so [_**if you’re with him in this commitment, will you pitch in today?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110488609/554499429/-1386246667?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_EOQ_AC_20250629_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmODI1NGQ2MC1mYzU0LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=KiT06tEgKtJiKVBLn_IIbx_Q8iJZRZ9bUndgkqOlhFs=)

name: Lindsey Graham
subject: This would make a huge impact.
body:
Hey Fellow American, Lindsey Graham here. I need your help. We’re almost halfway through 2025, and just days away from my federal filing deadline. Right now, we’re not where we should be for digital fundraising. In fact, we’re falling behind. |

Hey Fellow American, Lindsey Graham here.

I need your help.

We're almost halfway through 2025, and just days away from my federal filing deadline.

Right now, we're not where we should be for digital fundraising. In fact, we're falling behind.

**I am not trying to be dramatic, but this couldn't come at a worse time for two reasons.**

**
1. A radical Leftist just announced she's running against me in 2026.
2. Democrats are already outraising us by millions, and we're over a year away from Election Day.
**

# [Tell Republicans to put country over Trump & vote against his horrible bill](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc0caee7f-cbfb-43f6-a804-cf8fb31eac1f/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T1154911a-3454-4f6f-9602-ac5c5558c113/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| | | Trump's "big bill" is horrible for America, and [Republicans know it.](https://default.salsalabs.org/T7c3f631b-b751-4139-a2d4-11f8dc55a8d7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) And some are even saying it out loud, and voting against it. Even Elon Musk, who's been hiding under a rock the last few weeks, is back to [condemn](https://default.salsalabs.org/T945beabe-9e59-4c91-a759-cab09e98fb41/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) it. **[We can kill this terrible bill](https://default.salsalabs.org/T75262257-ba8f-4568-92b6-c5a5dd5b14dd/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9), if even a handful of Republicans in the Senate or House put country over Trump, and vote against it. ** This is a wildly unpopular bill, and many Republicans could lose their seats if it passes -- which is the one thing that could get them to break with Trump. And with the even the _potential_ of Musk's unlimitted wealth being used against them in the next election, that actually could trump Trump. [Send a message, spread the word, and kill this terrible bill. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T59ea1b06-3e3a-45e4-8614-95eb905f66e1/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) [**Tell Republicans to put country over Trump, and vote against his horrible bill.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tf214ccff-639b-4837-86f6-fd47915cb4a9/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

body:
I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of.

| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110490057/554503113/1328794144?refcode=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NDQ2MWUyLWZlNTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Buhv2bJNUKm_TyxL3eC5vNJOYmRMVUj6VNKonuVHqZ0=&emci=ce16c0c1-9952-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=4823105)
---
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110490059/554503114/2105508926?refcode=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NDQ2MWUyLWZlNTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Buhv2bJNUKm_TyxL3eC5vNJOYmRMVUj6VNKonuVHqZ0=) Hey there, it’s Mary Trump. You probably know me as the niece of Donald Trump — the twice-impeached, convicted felon who also happens to be President of the United States. I truly believe few people know my uncle better than I do. I’ve watched him lie incessantly, exploit his power, and push this country closer to authoritarianism. Amidst all of the chaos he creates, it’s easy to forget the pain he’s caused, but what scares me even more? He’s not doing any of these things alone. There’s an entire army of MAGA Republicans — in Congress, in statehouses, in places they hope we aren’t paying attention to — working with billionaire donors and Big Oil to drag us backward on everything from the books our kids can read to the air we breathe. And the effects are everywhere. We feel it in the record-breaking heat. We see it in the wildfires, the floods, and the rising toll on frontline communities. And still, too many leaders in Washington act like we have time to spare. **That’s why the work that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is doing is so important. Their mission is simple: Invest in those leaders brave enough to stand up to polluters, authoritarians, and extremists alike.** These races might not make national headlines, but trust me, they are on the frontlines of the fight for our future. And I’m proud to stand with them. This work is powered by ordinary individuals doing extraordinary things. **So today, I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of.** **[Can I count on you to join me in supporting the Jane Fonda Climate PAC by chipping in $5 before midnight? They have an ambitious goal to raise $75,000 by tomorrow at midnight — and with just hours until their end-of-quarter deadline, they’re counting on their most dedicated supporters to chip in right now.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110490061/554503116/2105508926?amount=5&refcode=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NDQ2MWUyLWZlNTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Buhv2bJNUKm_TyxL3eC5vNJOYmRMVUj6VNKonuVHqZ0=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [**DONATE $5**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110490064/554503117/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NDQ2MWUyLWZlNTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Buhv2bJNUKm_TyxL3eC5vNJOYmRMVUj6VNKonuVHqZ0=) | [**DONATE $25**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110490065/554503118/2105508926?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ms=ea.994461e2-fe54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjk5NDQ2MWUyLWZlNTQtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=Buhv2bJNUKm_TyxL3eC5vNJOYmRMVUj6VNKonuVHqZ0=)

We’ve seen time and again that candidates who reject Big Oil are the same ones defending reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, public education, and so much more.
It’s up to us, all of us, to meet this moment with the urgency it demands and help elect the next generation of climate leaders.
Thank you for everything,
Mary Trump

clean_body: I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of. | = Hey there, it’s Mary Trump. You probably know me as the niece of Donald Trump — the twice-impeached, convicted felon who also happens to be President of the United States. I truly believe few people know my uncle better than I do. I’ve watched him lie incessantly, exploit his power, and push this country closer to authoritarianism. Amidst all of the chaos he creates, it’s easy to forget the pain he’s caused, but what scares me even more? He’s not doing any of these things alone. There’s an entire army of MAGA Republicans — in Congress, in statehouses, in places they hope we aren’t paying attention to — working with billionaire donors and Big Oil to drag us backward on everything from the books our kids can read to the air we breathe. And the effects are everywhere. We feel it in the record-breaking heat. We see it in the wildfires, the floods, and the rising toll on frontline communities. And still, too many leaders in Washington act like we have time to spare. That’s why the work that the Jane Fonda Climate PAC is doing is so important. Their mission is simple: Invest in those leaders brave enough to stand up to polluters, authoritarians, and extremists alike. These races might not make national headlines, but trust me, they are on the frontlines of the fight for our future. And I’m proud to stand with them. This work is powered by ordinary individuals doing extraordinary things. So today, I’m turning to you to help us take another step toward forging a future we can be proud of. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = We’ve seen time and again that candidates who reject Big Oil are the same ones defending reproductive freedom, LGBTQ+ rights, public education, and so much more. It’s up to us, all of us, to meet this moment with the urgency it demands and help elect the next generation of climate leaders. Thank you for everything, Mary Trump | = | = = Follow along: | | | | | ---|---|---|---|---|--- Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee. Jane Fonda Climate PAC 600 Pennsylvania Ave SE #15180 Washington, DC 20003 United States

name: PBS + NPR Protection Alert via Our Revolution
subject: Demand the Senate Save NPR and PBS
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Trump's plan to defund NPR & PBS could be coming undone. On Wednesday,
crucial swing-vote Senators Murkowski and Collins spoke out in a critical
hearing – meaning just one Senate vote is all we need to Save NPR & PBS!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32177?source=email-20230629&t=1011&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Headline: Murkowski pushes back on White House rescission of public
broadcasting funds

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32177?source=email-20230629&t=1012&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]There are just DAYS LEFT before the Senate votes, and we need everyone
who loves NPR and PBS to speak up. Add your name to demand Senators stop
Trump's plan to defund NPR and PBS!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32177?source=email-20230629&t=1013&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]ADD YOUR NAME

Make no mistake: Public broadcasting plays an irreplaceable role in
American society, holding powerful interests accountable and informing our
communities. Trump's proposal slashes the Corporation for Public
Broadcasting (CPB) budget – repealing essential public funding that
supports more than 1,500 local public radio and TV stations nationwide.

Millions of Americans rely on public media for high-quality journalism,
objective news coverage, and vital educational programming for families.
But if Trump's cuts pass, DOZENS of stations could be forced to close.

Trump understands perfectly well how valuable independent journalism is,
and he's targeting it directly because he sees honest reporting as a
threat to his political agenda. We can't let that happen.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32177?source=email-20230629&t=1014&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Headline: Conservative Activists have waited decades to defund NPR and
PBS. They are finally getting their chance

Senators from both sides of the aisle have expressed concern about these
drastic cuts – but concern alone won't be enough. Members of Congress need
to feel overwhelming grassroots pressure to stand up to Trump and reject
these devastating cuts.

Our Revolution has been mobilizing the grassroots, rallying outside of NPR
HQ, and bird-dogging members of Congress to put them on the spot about
these cuts. Now it's time ALL of us take action to protect the strength
and independence of American public media before it's too late.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32177?source=email-20230629&t=1015&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Tell your Senators: Reject Trump's assault on public media. Fully fund
NPR, PBS, and local public broadcasting now!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/32177?source=email-20230629&t=1016&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]ADD YOUR NAME

Public broadcasting stands as a powerful force for truth, accountability,
education, and democracy – but only if we fight to defend it. With
critical Senate votes approaching, our collective voice must be heard loud
and clear: America's public media is not negotiable.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/9?t=1001&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Facebook | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10?t=1002&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Twitter | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/11?t=1003&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Instagram | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2355?t=1004&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Youtube | [ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/2356?t=1005&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Website |
[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/10247?t=1006&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Sign Up

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26879?c0=email-20230629.Rfmyx0&t=1007&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Our membership swag

Our Revolution is the largest entirely grassroots funded progressive
group in America.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26880?c0=email-20230629.YDXpRT&t=1008&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]Help us defend democracy and take the fight directly to the
establishment by committing to be a Movement Builder with a recurring
donation of just $5 or more a month!

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26881?c0=email-20230629.X7T6JF&t=1009&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]GIVE MONTHLY

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/26882?c0=email-20230629.W7FW8s&t=1010&akid=8941%2E5885482%2EWpbrHW ]GIVE ONCE

name: Adam Schwarze, former Navy SEAL
subject: Do they speak for you?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Schwarze for Senate
body:
I don’t come from money or a political legacy. I come from grit, faith, and a calling to serve. That’s what drives me now. | [](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a3d2868c457243f39f4340e11ba446f7&_e=rz6eU2oNah1oxjRhI-WlDR1G9ddkoGB_4mg65H_SMF9Ub94mDX5V1wVllN3Fek1QaStV4sOezHaNpA0dhoBhbvf4t-Q1_H2B_mk7pKIrGjE7IL3TgCiroJhISEMBJ4UHXdZVB9XtJwiHCLTnipAkzZwKdRKXYhhi2mG529FzM-3qTVdorzUany4ZuQVVEyVyz2b4eRpVfLzAyYsV0yqqvf-Lc3Z-0hK32F5mk9CSFiX7tuzfuB-qFV4__iiJsddY5DdVFnl4wj5aXr1iEu266ws7QSreq0xgk2vj2z3uFk1URAkZJ_qwaLXCTvNq65DFGFyJf_RZ6FB6bqHvbn_u1BZ99624pJzs0U8-xa_UrfJlFBahTkJzN9zuJ7VnIihpN0Ba078yq-D5lCEtFrivCtG3Dh7dP3pQV-lh495jdk0LJ8-u4YRzoA5jI393wVOooQ4E3HOYw5yj76u6VoZLw808v7aUXymPcZlinhp0z4ls-Zf6gQcPxfYOrB1fb7iaYKUsN10XFuBJ407HaEfFASNad9dqnLAhdr1zYsEfVYKCcbZDRIk76vqBA23VPl05krQVvVrt3zBFQanx_6Q04IwOuTz2SY7oWlG-oi-zgNISQxia45enc3Oj-4g8jGDILvDDMOXFoxYIdzxEU96LE4S9KYe2StZwXdqFGy6nhldqIAsaOuwR1AQHJw2NcbriXWyK20W2k3VBC-VuuI5OVsPeT2OdS_j0exEvPKDg7QOpdDoehfUz_Piz_QDOTex8)

---
Peter,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan.

I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve this great country. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate. But when I returned home and saw what was happening to Minnesota—when I saw the radical left rising—I knew I had to step up.

_**And now I need your help.**_

The same Democratic Socialist movement that just **[hijacked New York City is gaining ground here in the Midwest.](http://links.freedomtrainalert.com/u/click?_t=2d4f229f156142619b4e4f956d2d65c9&_m=a3d2868c457243f39f4340e11ba446f7&_e=rz6eU2oNah1oxjRhI-WlDR1G9ddkoGB_4mg65H_SMF9Ub94mDX5V1wVllN3Fek1QaStV4sOezHaNpA0dhoBhbvf4t-Q1_H2B_mk7pKIrGjE7IL3TgCiroJhISEMBJ4UHXdZVB9XtJwiHCLTnipAkzZwKdRKXYhhi2mG529FzM-3qTVdorzUany4ZuQVVEyVyz2b4eRpVfLzAyYsV0yqqvf-Lc3Z-0hK32F5mk9CSFiX7tuzfuB-qFV4__iiJsddY5DdVFnl4wj5aXr1iEu2663FPov8oz0Day41gyy3IbCU77TTPBhSdHuZJKXCGTTXAUz2L_-qYIH45D_rrc0B2KtzjLwFjDIn9a-KNmmRkn0nGu_GTgMOdzspXnc2EzR-VsEy7YUF_yBNgsyW0oYnRp6U8APflcDFpm1t8hRNTTXNO0iDSUhw56Q8iVAYSQlNq_6j35IkMHAgoMOGtKHZiuhmiMbDKc7A2_A8O8Jnjxju0XqFWqd6fptRJK7uJWj6RCCSJHTZy-VlmIoPtjHRsqL8ADzTUr8sY-IOeQIDMw1I3ScSbWeaOH_1vFpXNDdKXhtMq4WKNt13xxBZMJ99CHWND0XMPEyHop7K8w57QDBkG-Or5YZzNRrrORtu3GBR-FOoz7RbSWwPScnRpBBJ8z_xeHOxKzv82wyOONgTW9SQp90UbHSKIjjWDDOziq7TEjwP-f8wW-oWwT8IM-iT_HgjTo8CaWKkodDiWXfY4pernSAC94F7bOZFD2mKQxbrI) **This week, New York Democrats nominated a man so extreme that he promised to arrest the Israeli Prime Minister and replace city police with social workers. If that sounds insane, it is.

_**But don’t think it’s limited to the coasts.**_****

My opponent—the lieutenant governor of Minnesota—isn’t far behind. She openly aligned with violent unrest in 2020, **pushed to dismantle our police, and filed lawsuits against law enforcement as our communities burned. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos.**

This kind of radicalism isn’t an outlier anymore. It’s the new blueprint of the left. And if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota, it will keep spreading.

The Minnesota I grew up in—where you respected your neighbors, honored your country, and stood for law and order—feels like it’s slipping away.

**I didn’t wait to serve my country after 9/11. I enlisted on my 18th birthday and spent over 20 years protecting American freedom abroad. Now I’m fighting to protect it at home. **

I don’t come from money or a political legacy. I come from grit, faith, and a calling to serve. That’s what drives me now.

_**It may be too late for New York, but there is still hope for the rest of us.

That’s what drives me now. | Peter, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve this great country. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate. But when I returned home and saw what was happening to Minnesota—when I saw the radical left rising—I knew I had to step up. And now I need your help. The same Democratic Socialist movement that just This week, New York Democrats nominated a man so extreme that he promised to arrest the Israeli Prime Minister and replace city police with social workers. If that sounds insane, it is. But don’t think it’s limited to the coasts.** My opponent—the lieutenant governor of Minnesota—isn’t far behind. She openly aligned with violent unrest in 2020, pushed to dismantle our police, and filed lawsuits against law enforcement as our communities burned. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. This kind of radicalism isn’t an outlier anymore. It’s the new blueprint of the left. And if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota, it will keep spreading. The Minnesota I grew up in—where you respected your neighbors, honored your country, and stood for law and order—feels like it’s slipping away. I didn’t wait to serve my country after 9/11. I enlisted on my 18th birthday and spent over 20 years protecting American freedom abroad. Now I’m fighting to protect it at home. I don’t come from money or a political legacy. I come from grit, faith, and a calling to serve. That’s what drives me now. It may be too late for New York, but there is still hope for the rest of us. This election isn’t just about one Senate seat. It’s about stopping a national wave of socialist extremism that threatens to bankrupt small businesses, rewrite our values, and destroy what millions of Americans fought and died to defend. New York may have fallen to it. But Minnesota doesn’t have to. If you’ve ever felt like your voice doesn’t matter anymore, it does. The radical left is organized, loud, and well-funded. Dear Friend, New Mexico is making a name for itself, but not in a way you’d expect. This year, in addition to the politically motivated prosecution of Officer Brad Lunsford, there is yet _another_ New Mexico police officer being wrongfully charged and this time it’s for **_first-degree_ _murder_.** An anti-police pattern is clearly emerging and corrupting New Mexico’s justice system. A dangerous pattern that will quickly lead to less policing and an increase in violence and crime in communities. [**Which is why I need to ask for your support today.**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuYHsscHmwGFZhxy6XVXZaqv2ghzGTlzhQAwk2n-_IkK5zOHN9-bNM2HsvfuqiKwJwNnjRAAIfyEA17_3EJf_4cc-vf16r9Nr8R7ydQuvG3qDJ3zpzPFUf5jxz8Sn0v7z11iXN_bE56_RPuEtNLPB-H5VpU6w4g6pSGzFZM6AAWcqOVeOI3WCdkxZKqQ9Oi4ULZEjpXmBiImvgEJOCyhZnjMhMyZKZxDl8SgU56CIoI-czAQbfWfYNN9NjMMQsm4ISV-d53mcHo81BJrJdku0mblYHOaVIND0tkdHoOFOCYe5TCkTPBUlVakyMk-V6FAoboUs8vUKb5Y5tNOwxM4Srmu9Tw-7TwLFKgeLfgmE693PTelMGI0_XQjXWxfZ1nrfvu3edNNq_doedp_tx--XQ7qOzTXbGB4OJUR7jyyJFY533_d-KiQR9PQovVa8VfAdAAD__255kFE)

Let me introduce you to Deputy Jacob Diaz, his fiancée (who is also a deputy), and their 3-year-old son in the picture I’ve sent you. Jacob is a three-year veteran of the Otero County Sheriff’s Office, and he grew up in a law enforcement family proudly serving their community. Now, he faces life in prison for doing his duty and following his training. Friend, this charge is shocking, and even ridiculous once you know the facts. In June 2024, Deputy Jacob Diaz responded to a late-night report of a young man walking in an intoxicated manner along the median of a busy highway. When Diaz arrived on the scene, the individual repeatedly ignored his instructions to stay back and show his hands. Instead, the young man quickly walked towards the deputy and drew out what appeared to be a firearm raising it shoulder high. In response, Deputy Diaz followed his training and fired his weapon. Even after falling to the ground, the individual continued to ignore the officer’s order to remain still and started moving towards the perceived firearm. Once again, following his training and fearing for his life, Deputy Diaz discharged his firearm and the individual was killed. An administrative investigation on behalf of the New Mexico State Police was completed and submitted – **finding Deputy Diaz had followed his training and had sufficient cause** to stop the young man and defend himself after the perceived threat to his life. And because the investigation cleared him, Jacob was reinstated as an officer on the force. **_But out of the blue, an anti-police prosecutor charged Deputy Diaz with first-degree murder._****** You can imagine the absolute shock Jacob and his fiancée had when receiving the news. After four months of being cleared of any fault and being back on the force, if convicted, he faces life in prison. Tearing a 3-year-old little boy away from his father for the rest of his life. Friend, that’s something no child should have to endure. But this isn’t the first time a good officer in New Mexico has been targeted with a false charge. You will remember Soros-funded Attorney General Jose Garza is trying to lock up Officer Brad Lunsford under phony charges of manslaughter. These politically motivated attacks against our men and women in blue must stop. That’s why the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has committed to supporting Deputy Diaz in his fight for justice. [**As a faithful supporter of law enforcement, can I count on you to renew your support and stand with Deputy Jacob Diaz?**](https://email.email.america1stwarroom.com/c/eJw8j0GPmzAQhX-NuYHsscHmwGFZhxy6XVXZaqv2ghzGTlzhQAwk2n-_IkK5zOHN9-bNM2HsvfuqiKwJwNnjRAAIfyEA17_3EJf_4cc-vf16r9Nr8R7ydQuvG3qDJ3zpzPFUf5jxz8Sn0v7z11iXN_bE56_RPuEtNLPB-H5VpU6w4g6pSGzFZM6AAWcqOVeOI3WCdkxZKqQ9Oi4ULZEjpXmBiImvgEJOCyhZnjMhMyZKZxDl8SgU56CIoI-czAQbfWfYNN9NjMMQsm4ISV-d53mcHo81BJrJdku0mblYHOaVIND0tkdHoOFOCYe5TCkTPBUlVakyMk-V6FAoboUs8vUKb5Y5tNOwxM4Srmu9Tw-7TwLFKgeLfgmE693PTelMGI0_XQjXWxfZ1nrfvu3edNNq_doedp_tx--XQ7qOzTXbGB4OJUR7jyyJFY533_d-KiQR9PQovVa8VfAdAAD__255kFE) Your donation of $35 or more will help provide:
---
* Expert witnesses on use of force
* The best attorneys available
* And cover any other court expenses Deputy Diaz will be faced with

---
| | Because without your support, even if Jacob wins his trial, he and his loved ones will be left with astronomical court fees and crippling debt. Everyday our officers put their lives on the line when they go out to protect our streets, just like Deputy Diaz did that night in June. And if we don’t support them, what will happen to our communities? We already know exactly what will happen – just look at the current state of L.A. Our country is once again being faced with a decision – will we be a nation of law and order or a nation of lawlessness and disorder. I pray that you continue to stand by our nation’s values and those who defend them.
---
Sincerely,
---
---
Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund
---

clean_body: | | | | That’s not the momentum we want heading into a busy spring in the courtroom. | | Dear Friend, New Mexico is making a name for itself, but not in a way you’d expect. This year, in addition to the politically motivated prosecution of Officer Brad Lunsford, there is yet another New Mexico police officer being wrongfully charged and this time it’s for first-degree murder. An anti-police pattern is clearly emerging and corrupting New Mexico’s justice system. A dangerous pattern that will quickly lead to less policing and an increase in violence and crime in communities. Let me introduce you to Deputy Jacob Diaz, his fiancée (who is also a deputy), and their 3-year-old son in the picture I’ve sent you. Jacob is a three-year veteran of the Otero County Sheriff’s Office, and he grew up in a law enforcement family proudly serving their community. Now, he faces life in prison for doing his duty and following his training. Friend, this charge is shocking, and even ridiculous once you know the facts. In June 2024, Deputy Jacob Diaz responded to a late-night report of a young man walking in an intoxicated manner along the median of a busy highway. When Diaz arrived on the scene, the individual repeatedly ignored his instructions to stay back and show his hands. Instead, the young man quickly walked towards the deputy and drew out what appeared to be a firearm raising it shoulder high. In response, Deputy Diaz followed his training and fired his weapon. Even after falling to the ground, the individual continued to ignore the officer’s order to remain still and started moving towards the perceived firearm. Once again, following his training and fearing for his life, Deputy Diaz discharged his firearm and the individual was killed. An administrative investigation on behalf of the New Mexico State Police was completed and submitted – finding Deputy Diaz had followed his training and had sufficient cause to stop the young man and defend himself after the perceived threat to his life. And because the investigation cleared him, Jacob was reinstated as an officer on the force. But out of the blue, an anti-police prosecutor charged Deputy Diaz with first-degree murder.** You can imagine the absolute shock Jacob and his fiancée had when receiving the news. After four months of being cleared of any fault and being back on the force, if convicted, he faces life in prison. Tearing a 3-year-old little boy away from his father for the rest of his life. Friend, that’s something no child should have to endure. But this isn’t the first time a good officer in New Mexico has been targeted with a false charge. You will remember Soros-funded Attorney General Jose Garza is trying to lock up Officer Brad Lunsford under phony charges of manslaughter. These politically motivated attacks against our men and women in blue must stop. That’s why the Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund (LELDF) has committed to supporting Deputy Diaz in his fight for justice. Your donation of $35 or more will help provide: Expert witnesses on use of force The best attorneys available And cover any other court expenses Deputy Diaz will be faced with | | Because without your support, even if Jacob wins his trial, he and his loved ones will be left with astronomical court fees and crippling debt. Everyday our officers put their lives on the line when they go out to protect our streets, just like Deputy Diaz did that night in June. And if we don’t support them, what will happen to our communities? We already know exactly what will happen – just look at the current state of L.A. Our country is once again being faced with a decision – will we be a nation of law and order or a nation of lawlessness and disorder. I pray that you continue to stand by our nation’s values and those who defend them. Sincerely, Jason C. Johnson President, Law Enforcement Legal Defense Fund | | More such officers who sacrifice so much for will face similar fates unless we speak out and stand up for the brave men and women in blue. Hi friend, thanks for opening this email. I just have a short, personal request for you.
I’m nervous about our big end-of-quarter deadline tomorrow. Call it the Sunday scaries: after tomorrow, our fundraising numbers will be public for the first time since winning the Democratic nomination for Attorney General, and we can't afford to show my opponent any weakness.
This year’s elections in Virginia will be one of Democrats’ first chances to reject the Trump agenda and elect a new path forward. This will set the stage for the 2026 midterms and beyond.
We need a massive surge of grassroots support now to show that Miyares, Trump, and his MAGA Republicans will be defeated.
So I'm humbly asking: Will you contribute any amount to help me reach my end-of-quarter fundraising goal and show Republicans the strength of this campaign?
Here's a secure link you can use to support my team now: actblue.com/donate/JJ4AG-EOQ-dpwillis67@gmail.com [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/loc_jones_gen-election-launch_em_q22025]
Thank you for your support, and have a good rest of your weekend!
– Jay

Williamsburg, VA 23185

As one of InvestorPlace's top analysts, Louis Navellier has called major moves in Apple, Amazon, and Nvidia long before they became household names. What he's seeing now is even bigger... You'll want to see his full message below.

name: (5) Missed Messages
subject: So many Senators have reached out to you
body:
Please see a special message from our sponsor:

Unsubscribe
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xul=2qq8ny363wdaxf3eu1ztoj205e90ute12actztnb3pe6r5b84vhv66ei4hh67lug7zocufrz7fgq4cz1jdajw31o5g02rp70zdy4ne6xu&__stmp=symkin&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh

Please see a special message from our sponsor:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=symkin&__onlt=t

Dear Fellow American,

I am enclosing a survey on a very urgent matter.

It will only take a moment of your time, but the topic is vital to our nation's future.

A movement is growing, led by progressives—but supported by many well-meaning Americans—to change the way we elect our president. In effect, it seeks to do away with the Electoral College as devised by the Framers of our Constitution.

That's why Hillsdale College is conducting a National Survey on Presidential Selection.

By completing this survey and returning it to me as soon as possible, you will help Hillsdale College more clearly understand the views of mainstream Americans concerning this issue—views we will make available to policymakers and opinion leaders.

You can complete the National Survey on Presidential Selection by using the link below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jjlojg9sp92wrmhheoundq3m0c6aalrls9ifxfm7ghsixvhw4hoed1al3t6r3rttbrws4zekm0a65xk6p0hf914s71p50dn60ftnwvlg23v8htn6ev4nodx5cxmfkdskd9gk8abt1ma6ema9q25n&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=symkin&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=symkin&__onlt=t

Do you think that most Americans understand how the Electoral College works and its role in preserving free and representative government?

YES
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=symkin&__onlt=t

NO
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=symkin&__onlt=t

For most of our nation's history, the Electoral College, as devised by the Framers of our Constitution, was not controversial. Indeed, it was considered essential to preserving free and representative government.

But today, more than a dozen states have joined together in an attempt to undermine this constitutional bulwark of liberty.

This movement to undermine the Constitution has grown largely because of the failure of America's schools to provide young people with a proper grounding in American civics—too many Americans simply don't understand the importance of the Constitution, including the Electoral College, to liberty.

Because of this, Hillsdale College has expanded its educational mission on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states.

These efforts, which aim to counter the Left's domination over most of our schools, include:

Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101" and "The Great American Story: A Land of Hope;"

Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis, Hillsdale's free digest of liberty;

Promoting constitutional education through social media outlets popular with young people;

Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens and K-12 schools across America; and

Restoring excellence to K-12 education by helping establish and guiding classical K-12 schools nationwide and providing, free of charge, Hillsdale's American classical K-12 curriculum (including American civics) to thousands of American educators and homeschoolers.

Your answers to the National Survey on Presidential Selection will help Hillsdale form the most effective strategy to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty—including the importance of the Electoral College.

And this is especially important in this critical time for America's future.

So please share your views on this urgent topic by completing our National Survey on Presidential Selection and returning it to me as soon as possible. It will only take a few minutes of your time.

You can take the survey using this secure link I've provided below:

http://trk.victorymailings.com/?xtl=17x64w94u6jjlojg9sp92wrmhheoundq3mmp94idpg8749mlzh182drgxth2lkjx5tm0m4w0ivxoye578foauttba165lahzq6hk63jby5jwo6r20sqvwd6r0pgs7jld7rruwdrx0v3vwn15osiopi9ldwncxb&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=symkin&__onlt=t
http://trk.victorymailings.com/?&eih=kzm8nstj6prmj7bhz7sjvvnysq73bagh&__stmp=symkin&__onlt=t

And after you take your survey, I hope you will also consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

Since 1844, Hillsdale has been "pursuing truth and defending liberty." Today, it does so through its extensive educational outreach efforts while refusing to accept ONE PENNY of government funding—not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

The support of private citizens like you is essential to our work.

Please represent your state and take the National Survey on Presidential Selection today. Thank you for your time and attention—and for your friendship and support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn

President, Hillsdale College

Pursuing Truth and Defending Liberty Since 1844

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110491552/554507906/753003349?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxZGYyZTEzOS0wMjU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=hWvHdHbllBkavxhcqKE5vkKYd-Gxd5L9mlVqBKilvl8=)
We’ve been sending you a lot of messages lately, friend. _(Sorry about that!)_

You’re probably wondering – why do we need your support now when the midterm elections aren’t until next year?

**The truth is National Republicans are hoping to catch us off guard after last November’s re-election win – and that means we expect to see early attacks and outside spending against us.**
