body:
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110491563/554507945/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGNjYzU1ZS0wMjU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rnne_M6N6AHQ1QUb3YBtDJw9Z1OAcALTYz47RWX5jW8=)
Hi folks, by now, I’m sure you’ve seen the news: **Trump has recklessly decided to bring the United States into conflict with Iran.**
His decision is outrageous in so many ways — but let’s start with this: _**It’s unconstitutional.**_
Congress must be consulted and authorize military action before the President can order it, but last night, Trump decided the rules don’t apply to him.
[**We can’t let this violation of our Constitution go unchallenged. That’s why I’m asking you to join me in doing just that by adding your name to my grassroots petition condemning Trump’s attack on Iran right away. Can I count on you? >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110491566/554507947/603340728?refcode=250629_RG_Accountable&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGNjYzU1ZS0wMjU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rnne_M6N6AHQ1QUb3YBtDJw9Z1OAcALTYz47RWX5jW8=&emci=834cef87-7552-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=58ccc55e-0255-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=16877361)

Trump’s unconstitutional action risks a broader, unauthorized conflict.
_**The intelligence committees were not briefed. Congress was not consulted. And the American people’s elected representatives were left completely blindsided.**_
That should concern all Americans. Preventing a nuclear Iran must involve strong diplomacy, not unconstitutional shadow wars conducted at Donald Trump’s whim.
[**Join me in calling out Trump’s destructive recklessness by adding your name to my petition condemning the bombing of Iran. We need to stand together at this pivotal moment. >>**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110491581/554507960/603340728?refcode=250629_RG_Accountable&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1OGNjYzU1ZS0wMjU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=rnne_M6N6AHQ1QUb3YBtDJw9Z1OAcALTYz47RWX5jW8=&emci=834cef87-7552-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=58ccc55e-0255-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=16877361)
Thank you,
Robert

body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250629_susan_eoq7_act [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250629_susan_eoq7_act]
Hi folks,
It’s Susan, Michael Bennet’s wife.
Right now, Michael is in Washington, D.C., going up against President Trump and Republican leadership as they try to pass a bill that would strip working Coloradans of their healthcare, cut vital programs like SNAP, sell off our precious public lands, and dig our children deeper into debt—all to pay for tax breaks for billionaires and corporations.
Michael is working day and night to fight Trump’s corruption and defeat his so-called ‘big, beautiful bill,’ so I told him I would step in to help his campaign reach its fundraising goal before their FEC deadline tomorrow.
Friend, if you can, consider making a donation now. Truly, no donation is too small to make a difference in this campaign. >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/upl_mfb_email-25q2-g?refcode=X_250629_susan_eoq7_act]
Michael fights hard for us as our Senator—just like he fought for us as Superintendent of Denver Public Schools, and just like he’ll fight for us as Governor of Colorado.
He’s supported working families by expanding the Child Tax Credit, lowering health care costs, and ending surprise hospital bills. He’s pioneered bills to protect our kids on social media and take on Big Tech. And he’s invested in our future by securing over $16 billion in funding to support Colorado infrastructure and protecting hundreds of thousands of acres of Colorado public land.
Now he’s ready to bring his experience, leadership, and vision back home to Colorado.
He knows our best solutions will come from all of us working together at home, here in Colorado— they won’t come from Trumpism’s divisiveness or Washington’s broken politics.
I’m right there with him, and I know he’d love it if you were too. So while Michael is fighting for us back in D.C., would you consider chipping in a few bucks to help his campaign hit its fundraising goal before tomorrow? clean_body: [] Hi folks, It’s Susan, Michael Bennet’s wife. Right now, Michael is in Washington, D.C., going up against President Trump and Republican leadership as they try to pass a bill that would strip working Coloradans of their healthcare, cut vital programs like SNAP, sell off our precious public lands, and dig our children deeper into debt—all to pay for tax breaks for billionaires and corporations. Michael is working day and night to fight Trump’s corruption and defeat his so-called ‘big, beautiful bill,’ so I told him I would step in to help his campaign reach its fundraising goal before their FEC deadline tomorrow. Friend, if you can, consider making a donation now. Truly, no donation is too small to make a difference in this campaign. >> [] Michael fights hard for us as our Senator—just like he fought for us as Superintendent of Denver Public Schools, and just like he’ll fight for us as Governor of Colorado. He’s supported working families by expanding the Child Tax Credit, lowering health care costs, and ending surprise hospital bills. He’s pioneered bills to protect our kids on social media and take on Big Tech. And he’s invested in our future by securing over $16 billion in funding to support Colorado infrastructure and protecting hundreds of thousands of acres of Colorado public land. Now he’s ready to bring his experience, leadership, and vision back home to Colorado. He knows our best solutions will come from all of us working together at home, here in Colorado— they won’t come from Trumpism’s divisiveness or Washington’s broken politics. I’m right there with him, and I know he’d love it if you were too. So while Michael is fighting for us back in D.C., would you consider chipping in a few bucks to help his campaign hit its fundraising goal before tomorrow? [] DONATE [] Thank you, Susan Daggett [] [] [] Bennet for Governor PO Box 270117 Louisville, CO 80027 United States WWW.MICHAELBENNET.COM [] | INFO@MICHAELBENNET.COM [info@michaelbennet.com] | PRIVACY POLICY [] Paid for by Bennet for Governor. I’ll keep you posted on what happens next. — Mantra Dave Finance Associate, Josh Harder for Congress *

name: Ayanna Pressley
subject: The humanity behind this work
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250629-1402-foote&t=1001&akid=1402%2E342411%2EbCl9I8 ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

I want to be real with you for a minute. Alexandria, Ilhan, Rashida, and
I, our families, and our staff face personal risks every day doing this
work.

And sometimes people say to me, “Well, that’s what you signed up for.”

Last month, the White House came after me for calling out their BS. Last
week, MAGA Twitter personalities attacked me with degrading slurs. Next
week, it’ll be someone else. There’s something about taking up space in
the halls of power as an unapologetic, bald Black woman that really gets
under their skin – but I digress.

Their tired playbook is the same as it’s always been. Racist dogwhistles
and thinly veiled threats.

And every time this happens, my staff and I face an increase in physical
threats.

To be clear, no person in any profession – and certainly no public servant
– signed up for the vitriol, abuse, harassment, physical threats, and
violence that come with this job. No one deserves that. Any rhetoric that
creates a permission structure for people to resolve political differences
with violence should be vigorously condemned.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250629-1-movement.Q5Qnm-&refcode=em20250629-1402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1402%2E342411%2EbCl9I8 ]If you’re able, you can show your support by making a donation right
now. Your contribution will fuel our fight and ensure we can keep speaking
truth to power.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250629-1-movement.Q5Qnm-&refcode=em20250629-1402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1402%2E342411%2EbCl9I8 ]Contribute ››

Y’all know me – I’ll continue to speak up and fight back with every tool
available. But I do want to say this:

My team, my colleagues, and I make innumerable personal sacrifices for
this movement. We spend more time with each other than we do own families,
all because we care about this work. All because we believe in the power
and the possibility of a better world and the transformative impact that
government can have in our lives.

Every empty attack on me is an attack on all of us. On our families. On
our ability to show up and be accessible to constituents in the world
every day.

I'm not afraid, I'm not deterred, I won't be silenced. I know that the
vile acts of political violence – the attacks on Minnesota lawmakers, the
dehumanizing bodyslam of Senator Padilla, the lawless arrest of
Congresswoman MacGyver – were simply because they were doing the jobs they
were elected to do.

None of this is happening in a vacuum. This is all coordinated. It is
meant to silence us. It is meant to discourage, to dissuade, and to
marginalize.

Well, we're not backing down. We will continue to do the work that people
deserve for us to do on their behalf.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250629-1-movement.Q5Qnm-&refcode=em20250629-1402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1004&akid=1402%2E342411%2EbCl9I8 ]I’ve got my movement family behind me. They have nothing on us. Will
you pitch in today to help fight back against Trump’s lies and blatant
disregard for our humanity?

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250629-1-movement.Q5Qnm-&refcode=em20250629-1402&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1023&akid=1402%2E342411%2EbCl9I8 ]Contribute ››

In Solidarity,

Ayanna

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1402%2E342411%2EbCl9I8

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Hi friend — It’s Zuma Crow, reporting for duty!

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

My dad is paw-ssionate about working hard to get things done for Coloradans (people and animals alike). And while I wish I could do more to help him, the only tricks I know are to sit, roll over, and send emails — so here I am!

As the official campaign spokespaw-rson of Team Crow, I’m here to tell you that we’ve been really busy getting ready for our big fundraising deadline tomorrow. My dad is ready to continue working for all Colorado families (+ dogs!), but he needs your help to reach his goal.

I spend most of my time 1) eating treats, 2) bugging my dad for treats, and 3) playing fetch to earn more treats. In case you didn’t know, I love treats.

And my dad promised that if I could help him close the gap on tomorrow’s goal, he’d give me even more treats. So can you paw-lease throw me a bone by helping my dad today? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025]

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

name: Watson Coleman HQ
subject: Fighting back hard
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bonnie Watson Coleman for Congress
body:
| Hi there – did you see Bonnie’s last message? With the end-of-quarter just 1 day away – and House Republicans passing the “Big Beautiful Bill” that slashes Medicaid, SNAP, and so much more – every bit of resistance matters.

Bonnie’s fighting back hard, but she can’t do it alone. **[Will you chip in whatever you can to help her close our $2,965 gap?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110493174/554512583/-1223924300?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250629_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_WatsonColemanHQ_NA_NA_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGI2MGQ4MC0wMzU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fa5TDLHYU31Pg2WrTEXL9XxNcETsQZhdupQwuPGLaho=)** | | [**DONATE**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110493175/554512585/-1223924300?amount=10&source=EM_NBI_BWC_20250629_FR_EOQ_0_3MO_WatsonColemanHQ_NA_NA_4&refcode2=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDY4NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI1MGI2MGQ4MC0wMzU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=fa5TDLHYU31Pg2WrTEXL9XxNcETsQZhdupQwuPGLaho=)
---
* * *
_**Begin Forwarded Message:**_

Hi there,

I believe that I was sent to Congress to make the government work for those in need — from overworked caregivers, to single parents balancing kids and a paycheck, to first-generation students - all Americans deserve a fair shot. And I’m here to make sure they get it.

But if we’re going to protect what’s left of the safety net — and build something better — we need to make critical early investments right now.

clean_body: | | | Friend, We’ve got 24 hours left to hit our End-of-Quarter goal — and we’re still short of our $25,000 target. Our campaign is the only thing standing between Lauren Boebert and another term of cruelty, fear, chaos, and rubber-stamp Trump votes. She supports expanding ICE powers to go after political opponents. She voted to cut Medicaid while ballooning the debt. She doesn’t live here — and she doesn’t care who gets hurt. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: This moment matters. We can rise to meet it. —Team Padora John Padora is a manufacturing engineer and candidate for Congress in Colorado’s 4th District. He’s running to bring commonsense leadership to Eastern Colorado—fighting for farmers, working families, and real solutions, not political theater. Paid for by Padora for Colorado

clean_body: | = Friend, I know the start of summer is a busy time for everyone -- so I promise to make this the shortest email in your inbox. Tomorrow night marks our FEC fundraising deadline, and my finance team tells me we are roughly $8,000 short of our target. I’ve said this before, but your donations are critical to our campaign. It’s what fueled our historic victory to elect the first woman to CA-30, and it’s how we’ll do our part to usher in a new Democratic majority in Congress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | **= | = ---|--- = | = = | =** Thank you for your support. Georgia has been at the center of the fight for our democracy, and we’re going to be at the center again in 2026.
But we can’t wait until next year to get moving. We have to lay the groundwork now.
That means organizing in every county, building voter protection teams, and preparing to turn out every voter who believes in justice, accountability, and the rule of law.
But we can’t afford to slow down while Trump and his allies are already using every tool they have to consolidate power.

name: Justice Democrats
subject: Anti-Oligarchy Wave
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Something is happening across America,
Peter. Can you feel it?

Energy for progressives who take on the corporate oligarchy is surging as
people become fed up with establishment Democrats defending the status quo
while failing to stand up to Trump’s dangerous agenda.

You can see it in New York City, where Zohran Mamdani shocked the nation
by defeating Andrew Cuomo and his corporate Super PACs in the Democratic
primary for mayor.

What started as a long-shot campaign by a Democratic Socialist became a
runaway victory because of his commitment to centering the working class
and making New York more affordable for everyone — no matter the millions
spent attacking him from real estate developers and AIPAC donors.

You see it in the town halls that Justice Democrats in Congress continue
to pack with thousands of people – oftentimes in some of the reddest
districts in the country.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250629?refcode=em20250629-36802&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36802_1203867_qVdYu2&akid=36802%2E1203867%2EqVdYu2 ]A picture of Justice Democrat Rep. Greg Casar standing on a stage with
Sen. Bernie Sanders and Beto O’Rourke. There is a crowd of supporters
behind them.Justice Democrat Rep. Greg Casar rallying progressives last
week with Sen. Bernie Sanders and Beto O’Rourke

The people are tired of Republicans ignoring them and do-nothing Democrats
selling them out. They are ready for candidates with a bold vision for the
future – exactly the type of leaders Justice Democrats fights to elect.

We are committed to keeping this progressive wave going into the 2026
midterms and beyond. If we want real change in this country, we have to
build it together.

Justice Democrats is doing everything we can to pack Congress with as many
bold progressives unafraid to take on the billionaire elite as possible.
We’ve already endorsed State Rep. Donavan McKinney in Michigan’s 13th
district, and more endorsements for working-class fighters are on the way.

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250629?refcode=em20250629-36802&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36802_1203867_qVdYu2&akid=36802%2E1203867%2EqVdYu2 ]Can you donate $5 or more to fuel our fight and elect
more progressives across the country before tomorrow’s end-of-quarter
fundraising deadline?

[ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-em-20250629?refcode=em20250629-36802&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&refcode2=36802_1203867_qVdYu2&akid=36802%2E1203867%2EqVdYu2 ]Contribute $5

In solidarity,

Justice Democrats

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20250629-36802-footer&t=1002&refcode2=36802_1203867_qVdYu2&akid=36802%2E1203867%2EqVdYu2

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1003&akid=36802%2E1203867%2EqVdYu2

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

Hearing Delawareans’ stories and their hopes for the future is what keeps me motivated. Whether we’ve had the chance to meet or not, each and every member of this team is critical to powering my fight to hold Trump accountable in the Senate. [**That’s why I’m personally asking: Will you chip in $8 (the price of a small Thrasher’s fries!) to help me reach my big end-of-quarter deadline and continue fighting for you in the Senate? subject: We’re fighting a fascist who is kidnapping people off the streets

body:
They are attempting to spread fear while stripping our communities of our rights and the resources we need to survive. | | | [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.X6XUC7u8ppFLNtMO_55SZlNseb7gEYIOhm_EWnhzEOZKmTtnV3k2h4V2x_O3H7rdW2az5rgktBwzxQ8Ml9Wgkmv85qW-UsBonL4KRa0bcNqdICU6T3NBDdNIZG7w7wEWLb7wKyK_TlZ5vAsXDKyb0qduK5B87oX-qkjbIWpNKk0V4YpeQMUR1qgj0srJPhkWBNpIAYoSurYUvtg26_fySiaz6FT2sseUpb5YyDYgql4FA22zA3Num_8DDRNWUeBQMrmEXoIkl7wPRcIYGDIDwj1uOhtfHILmOZp4jIIAhq41Suk1mTC9UnFFn_ssMUDZHK7FbzxW6qDS2MkD1CaRUuDQcnkdnKBgHMfqORyXjvr34uWYeGbuvhc7ViWw-9eN/4hr/p3OkAEpWQJeX1JLR-cFU3w/h0/h001._Gfp41LmiTNFolNekLRdEAOMHQRL3q8hKVNTbsrdOJs)

Friend, Together, we’re speaking truth to power. Millions of people showed up in communities across the country on June 14, not to celebrate Donald Trump’s birthday but to remind him that he’s not a king. Showing up in the streets and protesting, that is our power. **We’re fighting back against a fascist who is kidnapping people off the streets** , who is ignoring court orders and the rule of law, who is ordering illegal military strikes that endanger millions of lives, and who is stealing from our communities to build a government of, by, and for the billionaires. Together, we’re showing this wanna-be king what real courage is. And **courage is contagious** , with people getting inspired by their neighbors and getting out in the streets defending our neighbors and recognizing our shared humanity. Our movement for peace and equity keeps growing. I supported Congressman Al Green’s attempt this week to advance impeachment articles against the president for his unconstitutional actions. I also recently had the honor of speaking at No Kings rallies in my district and I’d like to share one of those speeches with you. [**Click here to watch this one-minute speech, then donate before tomorrow’s June 30th end-of-quarter fundraising deadline to show the power of our progressive anti-fascist movement.**](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxWc2DZUn8UKJ0D6a9xOTyvnSa2Cb4_KkV5yAAeXQjLMCTSOI8edcoi48KB4h2ag5Mv-Ryb4AO1YRs-oLEM8P6VurkNnCdEt93VgDh8sbMAQ73aB7Y084ddISKFFLFmxWNwguFWA4dsk6P8DL12rvl5abzKHNQbga3kHbfwvRitPWfbHYrxdEIyTncj0hSMEwMob25iVCBWl3Jd-42Y8TpYqcdIqJWrLyI_mA3EoJkUe5jQbxOzWE00YQIu1HgGdgYuiolybHHQXKEdWuMNSmgyOjM9qRV0Fv_TL2FyAWm8G4lUDKMpenKYQmUkyEgE8AauD0JRXqtFVDShDiOxBE_2fXxeTxRTNGBNQT2iw1SqllGyEAdS7bDnF5YI1hZzYvAvEXXvA9gYXyRGTeQlkhR/4hr/p3OkAEpWQJeX1JLR-cFU3w/h1/h001.TsxWxjg6wgoSHtvI8Zj107m1MOGqUzK3I2QMaDamuUA) **[](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxWc2DZUn8UKJ0D6a9xOTyvnSa2Cb4_KkV5yAAeXQjLL0RM6r3afuiLM9bZg8u3uo_nEzkGYps1rX961b01V4W7N-sShraIaWVK250O9v2IOQtjeqcIqyJ4pHLKRIREu1HgUEUozWNT8g3966Rv5xkF9TzB8ccB7RsdsrDGWvrJOWIbbhTe4HT5yEhROeARh6TLrM7j-MVM6UXdwM5G2kX_gGDfKuam0TC7YvdmKp6gXzIuaNjL5-_6TPskblbvp0d9GDa747vumYyZd3SNsBBVWlzwty5cFxOsStZ2sn700UQoWy2xksxysnP3HyZd4bMJCl-bmlQl40FvMN7_qzrrF-aGokpz9AwDUKabIr6WuBLaTmyDhIsf36T8EZKrrfcfMYW3MhxOtbFhjunNH6s/4hr/p3OkAEpWQJeX1JLR-cFU3w/h2/h001.o73XsuN4HH9YFN6OoMaPbu9bg4YXPX8PFgsZcGVlxiA)** | [WATCH & DONATE](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.iIBo0N5fSFzEFL40Tn-vtbMETCUYClkOrOh9-SNJfquxWc2DZUn8UKJ0D6a9xOTyvnSa2Cb4_KkV5yAAeXQjLOvVaFnmklnbwwCHS5oFu1HS52y0G82iveJ4iM39FV2ND84aHXeu7rAYqMhB3LkJWWabGixUkItqPcC5peQKRrJlh3EUiZ-WXj4KSt7YhDwEv0swQtRT_EjTFY3UY5chtGoc6Xk1_RqTlkW7dxaubQNCPGb-_23HQDUsQds-dkuGQV7CTM7GrnxJnCmTjSjUarYqQnQZsdGhHHMNmi7D10S0JDoJaMBCIPFFZXuH9SVBgNumTURB-3b0z8NQFYHmERpJdGK_Y45CPJsNREs0MYCi3eSL0bd_c0UDNlYrpvGtV0GR9OhAzfRug0RFEytG152uMpuxYpuhPzxh2n2HTApAj6caW17Nia8GVC_WTHVJ/4hr/p3OkAEpWQJeX1JLR-cFU3w/h3/h001.QWO_8g3MG43zdjSCUWXEpJ0Yb60prP-Eaf4Z7mYIiTw)

Donald Trump has constructed a cabinet of billionaires who are ruling for the richest 0.01%. **They’re attempting to spread fear and racist hate to distract us from the ways they’re stripping our communities of our rights and the resources we need to survive.** They’re taking away our healthcare and nutrition benefits in order to give themselves more tax cuts.
These billionaires are attacking programs like Head Start and Job Corps, which are critical to addressing inequality—today and for generations to come. They’re detaining and deporting U.S. citizens and legal permanent residents because their immigration policies were never about the “law,” they’re about attacking communities of color.

That’s why they implemented a new Muslim and African ban. And it’s why they are kidnapping immigrants and deporting them to foreign soil where they have fewer rights—including the notorious Guantánamo Bay prison.
**I recently led a letter with my congressional colleagues demanding the Trump administration permanently close Guantánamo Bay and immediately stop using the prison for migrant detention.**
We’re pushing back against government officials who take our tax dollars for war, detentions, and deportations—while saying we can't have money for housing, clean water, reparations, schools, child care, and universal health care.
Our collective action is not only patriotic, it is what democracy looks like.

clean_body: They are attempting to spread fear while stripping our communities of our rights and the resources we need to survive. | | | Friend, Together, we’re speaking truth to power. Millions of people showed up in communities across the country on June 14, not to celebrate Donald Trump’s birthday but to remind him that he’s not a king. Showing up in the streets and protesting, that is our power. We’re fighting back against a fascist who is kidnapping people off the streets , who is ignoring court orders and the rule of law, who is ordering illegal military strikes that endanger millions of lives, and who is stealing from our communities to build a government of, by, and for the billionaires. Together, we’re showing this wanna-be king what real courage is. And courage is contagious , with people getting inspired by their neighbors and getting out in the streets defending our neighbors and recognizing our shared humanity. Our movement for peace and equity keeps growing. I supported Congressman Al Green’s attempt this week to advance impeachment articles against the president for his unconstitutional actions. I also recently had the honor of speaking at No Kings rallies in my district and I’d like to share one of those speeches with you. | Donald Trump has constructed a cabinet of billionaires who are ruling for the richest 0.01%. They’re attempting to spread fear and racist hate to distract us from the ways they’re stripping our communities of our rights and the resources we need to survive. They’re taking away our healthcare and nutrition benefits in order to give themselves more tax cuts. These billionaires are attacking programs like Head Start and Job Corps, which are critical to addressing inequality—today and for generations to come. They’re detaining and deporting U.S. citizens and legal permanent residents because their immigration policies were never about the “law,” they’re about attacking communities of color. That’s why they implemented a new Muslim and African ban. And it’s why they are kidnapping immigrants and deporting them to foreign soil where they have fewer rights—including the notorious Guantánamo Bay prison. I recently led a letter with my congressional colleagues demanding the Trump administration permanently close Guantánamo Bay and immediately stop using the prison for migrant detention. We’re pushing back against government officials who take our tax dollars for war, detentions, and deportations—while saying we can't have money for housing, clean water, reparations, schools, child care, and universal health care. Our collective action is not only patriotic, it is what democracy looks like. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | You will always find me with a bullhorn, speaking truth to power. In solidarity, Rashida Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . CBS NEWS: Medicaid cuts could devastate hundreds of rural hospitals in GOP states, Democrats say
**_CBS NEWS_ : Medicaid cuts could devastate hundreds of rural hospitals in GOP states, Democrats say**

_"The warning from Senate Democrats, outlined in a letter sent to President Trump and Republican congressional leaders, comes as senators are now wrestling with the budget package that Mr. Trump dubbed the "big, beautiful bill," which narrowly passed the House last month."_ Peter,

House Republicans already voted to gut Medicaid, slashing more than $800 billion from the program, threatening coverage for 8 million Americans, _and somehow still managing to increase the deficit by trillions._

Now, Senate Republicans want to go even further by slashing Medicare, too. But this isn’t just about policy or politics, it’s about real people and entire communities losing access to doctors, hospitals, and basic care.

These cuts would devastate 338 rural hospitals already at risk of shutting down. In Kentucky alone, more than two dozen hospitals could close — forcing families to drive hours for emergency care or the birth of a child...and Trump and his allies simply don’t care.

With the stroke of a pen, they’re willing to cut the only hospital for miles, leaving entire towns without an emergency room, maternity ward, or anywhere to turn when someone gets sick. _**And for what?**_ So they can keep calling their bill “big” and “beautiful”? We can’t let this happen, not without a fight. We’ve set a critical $30,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal to defend vulnerable communities and the care they rely on. [**If you believe every family deserves access to life-saving care, chip in now before tomorrow's midnight deadline. clean_body: The GOP is getting ready to pass its disastrous budget bill | | | Friend, The GOP is getting ready to pass their disastrous budget reconciliation bill that Donald Trump calls a "Big, Beautiful Bill." But it's actually a "Big, Beautiful" Betrayal. We have to fight back against this betrayal. But the only way to put a stop to Trump and the GOP’s harmful agenda is to take back the Senate for Democrats. Reaching our fundraising goals is critical to ensuring we have the resources to win the crucial battleground races we need to flip the Senate in 2026. But right now, my team is still falling $5,377 short of our end-of-quarter goal ahead of the FEC deadline at midnight tomorrow. That's why I'm humbly asking for your help: = If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | | = | | = | | = Thank you. Jacky | | = A note from Sen. Jacky Rosen: Friend, I’m fighting tirelessly in the Senate to deliver progress for people across Nevada and our country. But with Donald Trump in the White House and Republicans in control of both houses of Congress, I need your grassroots support to keep up the fights that matter most. Senate Democrats like me are the only thing standing in the way of Trump's extreme agenda that will hurt everyday Americans. That's why I need people like you on my side to help defend our progress and take back power from the GOP. = You can also =** to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive updates from my campaign. Thank you, Jacky By entering your mobile number, you agree to receive periodic text messages from Rosen for Nevada. Message and data rates may apply. Text STOP to quit or HELP for help._

body:
here’s where we stand one day before our crucial end-of-quarter fundraising deadline

|
---

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110495662/554520832/-331871909?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOQ5_250629_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgwYzBiMC0wNzU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SULvTjDeXV0LO4zdnG2Nq90PCvlz9UwMz5I4Cfs7tH8=) Derek,

I just spoke with my finance team, and it looks like we’re still $24,301 short of our $75,000 online goal – and time is running out for us to catch up. I wouldn’t ask again if this wasn’t so important. Can I count on your donation before tomorrow’s critical end-of-quarter deadline? **[RUSH A $25 DONATION NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110495663/554520833/-331871909?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOQ5_250629_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgwYzBiMC0wNzU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SULvTjDeXV0LO4zdnG2Nq90PCvlz9UwMz5I4Cfs7tH8=)** Here’s the reality: I’m a top GOP target in next year’s election. Republicans believe they can defeat me to expand their majority in the Senate. That means we need to be prepared for Trump and his billionaire allies to spend whatever it takes to defeat me. This could very well be my most expensive campaign yet.

So I'm counting on donations from grassroots supporters like you to fight back. **If we want to run a winning campaign, protect my seat from Republican attacks, and flip the Senate for Democrats so we can put a check on Trump’s corruption, we need to hit this goal.**

Here’s a link to give before our deadline tomorrow, if you can: [_**https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mw-email-250626-eoq**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110495664/554520834/-331871909?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_EOQ5_250629_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMjgwYzBiMC0wNzU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SULvTjDeXV0LO4zdnG2Nq90PCvlz9UwMz5I4Cfs7tH8=)

Thank you for stepping up when it matters most. Together, I know we can get back on track.

Mark Warner

clean_body: Will you rush a 5X-matched $7 gift right now to help hit our end-of-quarter fundraising goal to elect state Dems and show MAGA Republicans that we’re NOT backing down? | | | | | ---|--- We’ve been in awe of how organizers and supporters like you have rallied behind our democratic values, our collective goals, and our shared future. We want to thank you for powering our end-of-quarter goal to elect state Democrats who will stand up in the face of division, fear, and authoritarianism. You’ve shown up for our party, so we want to do a little something to stand with you: A coalition of donors has agreed to match all gifts to the DLCC Victory Fund FIVE times. That means by working together, every grassroots contribution will be 5X as impactful through our end-of-quarter deadline. The stakes in the states are high, and they’ll continue to rise ahead of this fall’s consequential elections in Virginia. State Democrats are competing in ultra-competitive races in the coming months, and we need to be ready to compete and win nationwide. We’ve fallen short of our fundraising goals all quarter – but if we work together, we can hit our $150,000 EOQ goal to power Democrats to victory and show the GOP we’re not backing down. Don’t miss this opportunity to optimize your gift to the DLCC. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | | If we fall short of our goal again , we may not have the resources in place to beat our extreme opponents in upcoming elections. Our future is worth standing up for, and it starts with folks like you taking action today. Together. subject: Let’s finish strong

In the past few months, many of you have reached out asking me how you can help. I’ve heard from you at the No Kings rally, I’ve heard from you in the over 13 Town Halls we’ve hosted since January, and I’ve even heard from some of you in the grocery store and on the streets.
You’ve seen the destruction wrought by the Trump Administration firsthand, and you want to be part of the solution. So here’s what’s next: everything we do from today onward must be about winning back the majority in 2026. That majority will give us the tools and gavels necessary to defend against the actions of the Trump Administration and reassert Congress’s Constitutional responsibility to check and balance the Executive.
Today, we are just one day away from our end-of-quarter deadline. The work ahead isn’t easy, but it starts now, and every dollar counts.
Will you help us meet our second quarter fundraising goals and help pave the path to a Democratic majority in 2026? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/blu-sefc-q2-2025-em?refcode=blu_em_sefc_2025-06-29]

name: Vivek Ramaswamy
subject: A story about my dad
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO
body:
I love this photo of my dad and me at my Harvard graduation.
He didn't just chase the American Dream - he passed it down. [](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1aa9b61591734e10b6df3670601c9055&_e=Tu-Ov26wMqL4cMEMRZUWk_yMlv0lv0MZA4Ga41J6cfZ-75yZYzMDG_lgbxT6dXvLY3dHx-UbrZ_hTJrQFQKQR-Qdf1a_JB6wid6sd0WOO_lRsjnI2ZC22TxYswkDgQxavVnK4Glq-EsEOr0xSu_r2qK8TEDY3zCxCM7gKtDz_KtoBqkc0tYpb8YogOcbkOmg9Pvpgf8y10fixh4NXq_4RrFEI9eIFCtHjnrl76rguI2qhUjS6Znkg7JlfhX1C2V6MP8XV0AUUO4JwdecqrxJCLxqf3mRd-JQOGW3ARhXy0_CCk_1WkF-wpoI0VN8fhQvHcUnDXHvj6jRMu5WB-vt2rzDibweAxO30fMoidb1HvbCLzI2oA8qEraWntvnxK5jPGthDUc54jGuRMX51l7o8kogxLAdH31R-HB7SD-LZ0VBjZV9Ba05BPQJqBageQghtPmSZ_fMaDPHc6bYRH08ZBQU1KlgmPrRS7rJsHZp4FfZEnroMDkyYY-VygTlnB8hQOq5s507ub_0ioE3NWDa6Tagw6mUko7Nq03zKaCxQNl6iyzjyWJfeYSc-WtKxaZwWVrwRSuA7qeTZYgp8zldRQUHQW06BYR8HPaX-59odcOp3-nmt9Cr6dik5sk4FwO2CzwGscMWVPDgWxScnSFz5-aqzmgv5X3RcE7UKF-_h73ECM6nAfmL9nkuV6ydHjhX_4jbwXbFG7tuifrQKXZC0J_dbXN6XPhx3GMWfamOvZMgYSJyelCh4mRrVgGIg_MMlbFuKQf8AjCrtniIoi4fO8JVZQlR5tVZfbCa03RCAms%3D)[Now, I’m running for Governor of Ohio to honor that sacrifice and keep the dream alive for the next generation.](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=1aa9b61591734e10b6df3670601c9055&_e=Tu-Ov26wMqL4cMEMRZUWk_yMlv0lv0MZA4Ga41J6cfZ-75yZYzMDG_lgbxT6dXvLY3dHx-UbrZ_hTJrQFQKQR-Qdf1a_JB6wid6sd0WOO_lRsjnI2ZC22TxYswkDgQxavVnK4Glq-EsEOr0xSu_r2qK8TEDY3zCxCM7gKtDz_KtoBqkc0tYpb8YogOcbkOmg9Pvpgf8y10fixh4NXq_4RrFEI9eIFCtHjnrl76rguI2qhUjS6Znkg7JlfhX1C2V6MP8XV0AUUO4JwdecqrxJCLxqf3mRd-JQOGW3ARhXy0-YRPwK-c1cvOLhc40YCYc0gfp1LXynNnaCb5hYdSNXR0NTTcejfJ3fY4Ewx4AjL0fDCP8JZ5XtOaBYCN0i-eU1A9POPoZ8URDf6ylu-g6wTRRXW0P4c361ZPOMUH56rec1Z5T8Y_04UclcENZ1b7eZjtRLw8UJ5gOa9YqDDD7hdlaJLEhTSmi-6bM4GPt8HCuP5GFTtCS-fWQCw5NRcLzLeZeHv2IO7-hOGtt0UZCsMsq0uHl_keru5P5t-7rxqqaoSJubmnOOGPiGvl5X8uKOCZrOtvDuUIRhYwysbsyGtC1Ydp6OVwpM1OCEDVNncBt3yaab9GhS6xIRlxotmznDBM5msQbbDAzOaQcqNaFrvIX3AXHns-8L1WtUZ7OFtYJRuEj9J3CVk-SBSh_Lu33u_lnu7Xj8HLvuPvZ3UmH4ZuZkZzKxpfEl0jLzCJL1QKMaJfeELT9ZiL0nAL8YPOV-Xto_COPk-38eRPfV941dcmp3Tcj2HGumQt7LaiBbgA4%3D)
Hey, this is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'd like to share a personal story with you.
When I was in middle school, my father got laid off from his factory job at the General Electric plant in Evendale, Ohio. He was one of the hardest workers there, but like thousands of other good men and women, he was laid off without warning.
Most people would complain, whine, and stomp their feet, saying, "It's not fair!".
But not MY dad. He didn't cry about victimhood or racism.
Instead, he picked himself up, dusted himself off, got a new job, and enrolled in night school law classes for the next four years.
But because money was tight, he and my mother couldn't afford childcare. Every day after middle school, my dad would pick me up and we'd drive for 45 minutes to the University of Kentucky across the river.
I'd sit in the back of his law school classes every night.
Most kids my age would hate the idea of spending all day at school just to go to ANOTHER school at night. But not me.
I was FASCINATED, learning about the Constitution, the principles of law, and Supreme Court decisions.
So why do I even share this story with you in the first place?
Because that time in my life taught me a lesson I've never forgotten: Every hardship is an opportunity - if you're willing to work for it.
That mindset is the foundation of my campaign.
I don't believe in a culture of victimhood. I believe in the American Dream. I believe in merit over DEI. In hard work over handouts. In family, faith, and responsibility, not grievance and blame.
Right now, we have a real opportunity to reverse Radical Leftist policies. An opportunity to show how the nuclear family is the best form of governance. An opportunity to showcase how capitalism lifts people out of poverty. An opportunity to reinstate the American Dream.
And I know that you're one of the dedicated American Patriots who believe in that vision.
That's why I need you with me, Fellow American.
[If you can, please consider donating $10 to my campaign for governor today. clean_body: I love this photo of my dad and me at my Harvard graduation. He didn't just chase the American Dream - he passed it down. Hey, this is Vivek Ramaswamy, and I'd like to share a personal story with you. When I was in middle school, my father got laid off from his factory job at the General Electric plant in Evendale, Ohio. He was one of the hardest workers there, but like thousands of other good men and women, he was laid off without warning. Most people would complain, whine, and stomp their feet, saying, "It's not fair!". But not MY dad. He didn't cry about victimhood or racism. Instead, he picked himself up, dusted himself off, got a new job, and enrolled in night school law classes for the next four years. But because money was tight, he and my mother couldn't afford childcare. Every day after middle school, my dad would pick me up and we'd drive for 45 minutes to the University of Kentucky across the river. I'd sit in the back of his law school classes every night. Most kids my age would hate the idea of spending all day at school just to go to ANOTHER school at night. But not me. I was FASCINATED, learning about the Constitution, the principles of law, and Supreme Court decisions. So why do I even share this story with you in the first place? Because that time in my life taught me a lesson I've never forgotten: Every hardship is an opportunity - if you're willing to work for it. That mindset is the foundation of my campaign. I don't believe in a culture of victimhood. I believe in the American Dream. I believe in merit over DEI. In hard work over handouts. In family, faith, and responsibility, not grievance and blame. Right now, we have a real opportunity to reverse Radical Leftist policies. An opportunity to show how the nuclear family is the best form of governance. An opportunity to showcase how capitalism lifts people out of poverty. An opportunity to reinstate the American Dream. And I know that you're one of the dedicated American Patriots who believe in that vision. That's why I need you with me, Fellow American. Don't let our nation turn into one full of victims. Help me turn it into one of victors, just like my dad. Thanks for your support. God Bless,Vivek Ramaswamy This is Vivek. I'm building a movement to make Ohio the state of American excellence -- Reviving our schools. Reclaiming our values. Restoring pride in our country. But I can't do it alone. I need your voice behind me. | | | | | PAID FOR BY VIVEK RAMASWAMY FOR OHIO 350 E 1st Ave Ste 100 Columbus, OH 43201

name: Guzman for Virginia
subject: Defending marriage equality
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Elizabeth Guzman
body:
| | | 10 years ago this month, the Supreme Court legalized same-sex marriage nationwide in _Obergefell v. Hodges_.
Virginia has a dormant same-sex marriage ban in the state Constitution - putting marriages at risk if the right-wing Supreme Court undermines or overturns _Obergefell_.
This year, Democrats in the Virginia General Assembly passed a Constitutional amendment to _protect_ marriage equality.
But to become law an election must pass, and the General Assembly must approve it a second time before it is approved by referendum.
This November, Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates.
**Elizabeth Guzman will vote for the Constitutional amendment to PROTECT same-sex marriage, and she’s running against a MAGA Republican that _deliberately skipped_ the marriage equality vote.**
******[Defend Obergefell and close Pride Month strong. Democrat [Elizabeth Guzman](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/u001.xqm-apKpWqGuZCDDu9wrxXA8maWDG4HvFsLVwyj62A8orXDqRdwJRZjHFdvU_Aj_T2Ig2L6HSSgqUZMqW22GeJzxvH1TwsMWeGkNaGm0iNEsmTYed5wyZ8ha3C2rnBDR8s5cW1SBnjGJGxbZfaSpEkUlJ77ruB_BQEwcimctELO7dO7pojQfXrdvIuEI22ErACxTGp7aCxGAWj1l1vzOYX8F-LiJdqh8pC6lJ3Pnsr8KWbwNez5HuWsdCO6D1JSlXANMOlN7uPZ0ziYz9auwcBOQRlhmgrdnSQrIyYHEx60/4hr/a3bAta4ZRXi_CjcwV_0gEg/h8/h001.1Op-yjzkaR_6GcMmxS4_afcdA0Tr1nta-FQhGq1H4Mo) is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. clean_body: | | | 10 years ago this month, the Supreme Court legalized same-sex marriage nationwide in Obergefell v. Hodges. Virginia has a dormant same-sex marriage ban in the state Constitution - putting marriages at risk if the right-wing Supreme Court undermines or overturns Obergefell. This year, Democrats in the Virginia General Assembly passed a Constitutional amendment to protect marriage equality. But to become law an election must pass, and the General Assembly must approve it a second time before it is approved by referendum. This November, Democrats are defending a 51-49 majority in the Virginia House of Delegates. Elizabeth Guzman will vote for the Constitutional amendment to PROTECT same-sex marriage, and she’s running against a MAGA Republican that deliberately skipped the marriage equality vote. **** If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. Thanks for your support, Team Guzman | Democrat is running for Delegate in Virginia's 22nd District. name: The Real Texas PAC
subject: They're trying to steal Georgia — again. We MUST fight back!!
body:
Georgia has been the tipping point in some of the biggest political fights of the last decade. Next election WILL be the same.
We've JUST learned that Trump’s allies are plotting a full-scale power grab in the MOST CRUCIAL SWING STATE of Georgia... and it’s ALREADY in motion!!!
A new report just revealed that Gov. Brian Kemp is quietly working to boost Trump’s preferred Senate candidate.
The goal? Flip Georgia red and cement Republican control of the Senate.
We’re doing everything we can to stop it — including launching a $60,000 fund to help shore up resources in Georgia and other battleground states. But we’re still $13,638 away from hitting our goal - can you help close the gap? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?refcode=061825_4]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation to The Real Texas PAC will go through immediately: DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-georgia?express_lane=true&refcode=061825_4&amount=5]

name: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
subject: Before Pride Month ends.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress
body:
The Trump administration has been attacking LGBTQ folks since day one of his presidency.
#
_**Content warning:** this email mentions suicide and suicide prevention._
Since day one, Trump has been trying to erase LGBTQ folks: declaring that the United States only recognizes two sexes, reinstating the ban on trans service members in the military, and more.1
Now the administration has announced that, starting next month, **the National Suicide and Crisis Lifeline will no longer offer specialized support for LGTBQ+ people.**
****
This specific service within the 988 suicide prevention hotline began after studies showed that the LGBTQ+ community suffers from disproportionately high suicide rates, and has been stewarded by The Trevor Project — a nonprofit organization dedicated to youth LGBTQ+ suicide prevention, whose empoyees are represented by the Communication Workers of America.
So today, [we’re asking this community to support The Trevor Project, so they can continue saving lives](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250629-trevor-project.jIeJ_U&refcode=em20250629-9201-P_FND_CHA_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8) with free, confidential, 24/7 services for LGBTQ+ youth, who are more than four times as likely to attempt suicide than their peers.2
The 988 hotline for LGBTQ+ youth receives an average of 2,100 contacts per day and has received over 1.3 million calls, text, and chats since 2022.3
**Help us power this vital lifeline for so many of our nation’s youth.**
[Will you make a $5 contribution today to support The Trevor Project? Mental health is a crisis that impacts so many communities, and we must stand with LGTBQ folks against the MAGA movement’s attacks.](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250629-trevor-project.jIeJ_U&refcode=em20250629-9201-P_FND_CHA_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)
**[Contribute $5](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250629-trevor-project.jIeJ_U&refcode=em20250629-9201-P_FND_CHA_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)**
_100% of your contribution will go to The Trevor Project._
The Trump administration is relying on us giving up. **Hell no.**
We’re going to keep standing with trans people.
We’re going to keep standing with the LGBT community.
Thank you for standing with us.
In solidarity,
Team AOC
**[Donate to The Trevor Project →](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/14659?c0=aoc-email-20250629-trevor-project.jIeJ_U&refcode=em20250629-9201-P_FND_CHA_HDL&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)**
1 - [**ACLU of New York:** Your Rights in New York After Trump’s Anti-Trans Executive Orders ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/33064?t=23&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)
2 - [**Communication Workers of America:** Suicide Hotline Workers Condemn Cuts to LGBTQ+ Crisis Services](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/33090?t=24&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)
3 - [**NY Times:** Trump Administration Will End L.G.B.T.Q. Suicide Prevention Service ](https://act.ocasiocortez.com/go/33065?t=25&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/aoc-email-20250629-trevor-project?refcode=em20250629-9201-P_FND_CHA_HDL&t=26&refcode2=9201_2526796_pAF6o8&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)** | **[Merch](https://shop.ocasiocortez.com/?utm_source=em-footer-20250629-9201-P_FND_CHA_HDL&t=27&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)**
---|---
[](https://www.facebook.com/OcasioCortez/?t=28&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8) | [](https://twitter.com/AOC?t=29&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8) | [](https://www.instagram.com/aoc/?t=30&akid=9201%2E2526796%2EpAF6o8)
---|---|---
Email us: [speak@ocasiocortez.com](mailto: speak@ocasiocortez.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, PO Box 680080, Corona, NY 11368.

name: Greg Abbott, Governor of Texas
subject: A challenge I need your help to overcome
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT
body:
My accident didn’t end my life, it defined it.
---
| | | | | | | Untitled Document [](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ee132aaf4048d6b89ae3c24283a0af&_e=UkYujpo1HRZs0TFVZ829L5RqPV7z1ulIf13V5EmnNip4Av9p0RiL6s22Kyrh7Xc43QxbOFbRusUwmp5z9g92ZndDAr829Onr0GCllNzPNptAg_PBN8s8seUtw5WbxbNgmEvssm1W1BFeHDOI6Nhw_xFJNGXDjCJWwsSuCf-d3DK9k9t_KxCoLqwb467qkl11yexMqeOueboOFO4w-X5hsm4Pmc6qVqPHIP2Ulvta7CkRF-4Eb48KLIKaU8DfiGPpjjLdyB2zNeHSSG7vTKfyiuG0KU5MsgsVJQvOTJp9GgAA2EvvFY6Me9MGexDTcNVkJ5gakuW7Nrpl5RCDBQ-5iSqgw82j9bEsMNaDsjGBuU6JRe8stL4a8sgq-QbfiJRM5o5Wb2iDZZD_nplkiZCUjkei87nEc-iBKikyTTwUZsCmOGfhuSnHZnPzuzjdhmkWKWQvdPa1DIgeIhN2MhXYWYrC8LiPxsaA1S-qWBco0t5-uEVK0Zw-Vsu69hTJP_igu5kkpUwevy8WMjFch9tkmOn0faHauNNbwq1uy88TTzewcOAZyutergDKyxUtcKPk54v1OFH-86SMBgkFcRJ7cTLbCJWqehS32qQ-3PsL0WCvG5dzFplZtakwDRMxkvVUfPJJkYVfU9fzstQT3o2ZGW6MV3nQ9_asVx4CcDFFAQmtnvQjsqLpv-6fHsJBVDvm)
Patriot,

If you were wondering how I ended up in a wheelchair, the story goes back just over 40 years. When I was 26 years old, a massive tree fell on me while I was out for a jog.

In an instant, my back was broken, and I was left paralyzed from the waist down.
[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ee132aaf4048d6b89ae3c24283a0af&_e=UkYujpo1HRZs0TFVZ829L5RqPV7z1ulIf13V5EmnNip4Av9p0RiL6s22Kyrh7Xc43QxbOFbRusUwmp5z9g92ZndDAr829Onr0GCllNzPNptAg_PBN8s8seUtw5WbxbNgmEvssm1W1BFeHDOI6Nhw_xFJNGXDjCJWwsSuCf-d3DK9k9t_KxCoLqwb467qkl11yexMqeOueboOFO4w-X5hsm4Pmc6qVqPHIP2Ulvta7CmjQ9qvpTEGOnPzVUvEt89WWz-n8yvhP4SVGZRo_UooRgjMANL2qwBpff4--oTy1RmNM66AnaTHzBPsu5kcLB79EREEVtk8EMkB1tJlbZm7UsjdfOZ7tQwA_vjTbUJ9PftJNvf8OZNPW3Xg0UNv6IBR6hBmo86XqSQ0JiWKa38fzHxbaU6ZtWQOwjH1tBDl9GhopmSr-6bvVAkxd29zh2gKBXKCahYMsttSOjXRRF4UU67sdcY4IvzeJz305l28bcIioPLuYHIWUDf9GKUH47Nu4-ggHA_881t_jGy6epDuQzdZilTj4-9X8Ry73oU9R1l3ozzURwZBWGPsHx0uS4a34Mgvv68MDmxn5Ira8iP0lnxkpV8QxfcLmo_1zwy9FHb0LnMlRQFUBQW4XxZYuy6w0-wO66AbIHpTW8YntzRvbDbdau0rNnX_zFI3ivshz8Ug10K4gfi1TXrAmrSgbNHa)
Doctors told me I'd never walk again. But, that didn't stop me.

Through months of grueling rehab, and with the support of my family, faith, and steel rods in my spine, I learned how to keep moving forward.

My accident didn't end my life. It defined it. It taught me how to fight through pain. How to endure. How to lead.

It drove me throughout my legal career and service to Texas as Attorney General and a Supreme Court Justice.

That same spirit is what drives how I lead Texas today as Governor.

Right now, we face a challenge that requires every ounce of the same determination, and I'm asking for your help to overcome it:

**The fundraising freeze for Texas lawmakers just lifted and we now have just days before our first fundraising report of the cycle is filed for all to see.**

That's the shortest window in modern history to show the strength of our conservative movement before the numbers go public, which is why I'm asking for your support in a BIG way.

**[Will you pitch in $5, $15, or whatever you can spare before the End-of-Quarter deadline?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ee132aaf4048d6b89ae3c24283a0af&_e=UkYujpo1HRZs0TFVZ829L5RqPV7z1ulIf13V5EmnNip4Av9p0RiL6s22Kyrh7Xc43QxbOFbRusUwmp5z9g92ZndDAr829Onr0GCllNzPNptAg_PBN8s8seUtw5WbxbNgmEvssm1W1BFeHDOI6Nhw_xFJNGXDjCJWwsSuCf-d3DK9k9t_KxCoLqwb467qkl11yexMqeOueboOFO4w-X5hsm4Pmc6qVqPHIP2Ulvta7CmgEewt-2sU_MMpFmLuUEAE5uXXiHcNeDvldeZGWNCeJiUHkI6qpdt3M9jMfgpeh9gYfRf3t6awkSAPnU3hOL5NS_yAp2uhN5-LjMFYXfOlZb0lNfgZHEQVSOP5ihR5mchLZKt5ewrUaZgG5dn_kImjE57i1hnMvZl82LGxTdjF4YowzI0EXs_NmoFryVeLFYOeXk4NDvqKQ_nXM0SEIvT8xZx0eRdvFY3ZXm_pRDKYA_u9Ky7_QuXXH5XoEvwId4d0w9myQ6cwrtVbZIdm0Tx3tWxdSFStMz6kP8BKML7qZGNKe-7JUfQFdZZl0QAMSMVq3vhGm2hGk4M24K4pGNeIIazdNM2uvqVkj_lpKakKsphjrTZ2lOXB2euX1NZ6pT3acpV3y8FkHFLuBCXYpZNlkgj4vogb6Ca6PcKJ1hMfUE0CAiBC69m7edmlBdQOBWRoqMYXzvsqJcsTykgkSlVU)**

We've delivered historic wins this legislative session -- school choice, property tax relief, election integrity, stronger border security and bail reform that makes our communities safer -- but the Radical Left is already organizing to roll it all back. _We can 't let them gain ground._ **[If we’re going to keep Texas strong and conservative, I need you in this fight. Can I count on you to rush in a donation today?](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ee132aaf4048d6b89ae3c24283a0af&_e=UkYujpo1HRZs0TFVZ829L5RqPV7z1ulIf13V5EmnNip4Av9p0RiL6s22Kyrh7Xc43QxbOFbRusUwmp5z9g92ZndDAr829Onr0GCllNzPNptAg_PBN8s8seUtw5WbxbNgmEvssm1W1BFeHDOI6Nhw_xFJNGXDjCJWwsSuCf-d3DK9k9t_KxCoLqwb467qkl11yexMqeOueboOFO4w-X5hsm4Pmc6qVqPHIP2Ulvta7CnEKGSIWKbABJ2K-Cz2VdwS7g3peFlkWJ2ny4dC7413phri792UCbei845PMFsF89NjPI7sE2wjatqBRtfFntSnOGgkiP29XScH0oO4epwxCRQpQbTUbib9_RcmLb3OUQBLl-tHRlKroL6FXoesOEF22eQUDRKdYDIb1qoTLWf2QlLrAOP11FgBh20CTB6r7HvXwX28ei9nChX1vlxCP_A_wWAC0KCoNFpSblFZ2bNdSAcux-JLfV5B1DEprW93zm36T8TXVRtDTDhx-83lX7slCSNk9MIvO90GruISVcbqlmadkQYi7X6Re4hVzFm07RNEKjD86HXo-OwG7V1FIub8LH4jJq-oYJPpwuFTyanL_kOwBAVebkGzudHY8nhdVKeCzC7kCMEOjMho2v79uRn4NX3RsjP9Vby2HARWN_0ah71NKgjWgcKSvv7SNmb_7hGkuxZtXfRb1dO-lDAvuKKB)**
[RUSH SUPPORT ⇒](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ee132aaf4048d6b89ae3c24283a0af&_e=UkYujpo1HRZs0TFVZ829L5RqPV7z1ulIf13V5EmnNip4Av9p0RiL6s22Kyrh7Xc43QxbOFbRusUwmp5z9g92ZndDAr829Onr0GCllNzPNptAg_PBN8s8seUtw5WbxbNgmEvssm1W1BFeHDOI6Nhw_xFJNGXDjCJWwsSuCf-d3DK9k9t_KxCoLqwb467qkl11yexMqeOueboOFO4w-X5hsm4Pmc6qVqPHIP2Ulvta7CnAxOPC8Ui8R_Ztc9C46ZOpRBeqsFFC90mG4-aahO5CKxBa1E8aO-nm4aj7vPXh9z0ai0pAVu0obugOzHT5qCCwQqHmo4S3Re4XbGqF3s_t8WEJbJuFPO_CgdaFedkYDoLO9IMetvx7g3fF8lUXRm7_OS8l24KrAIbN7mNPwIxop1Nyt9gQ1CLgh8QHin_HHN95qSaxirFi97LCSPO7g4kc5j2IsT8G8MQM4E7WE00OZ2JCKjM7LaB7OfzitUE18oSbdcydnXYUygVKpAeGMaNlteDKC-k2VEJom5SbFm28OWuxv7kux4Z0rlxNjKHBeCpA0OIV7g7uqR0pzSmLkdhyKPO9AypwUtLrcQawvN5LA26ADgTfiv_swnzyFkz0PF9jQKlwKkI_ET8PDp9u0NfjXeEmSaehjpYzLBNW4imtjR2tIjHFCzqrS35mLvmH49N0ggDJWiOjJRp2uYochc7n)
We've overcome challenges like this before, and with your help today, we'll do it again.

Thank you in advance for your support,

[](http://links.conservativesdefendingfreedom.com/u/click?_t=91d01aa68bbe4105984439520ca0f0af&_m=d9ee132aaf4048d6b89ae3c24283a0af&_e=UkYujpo1HRZs0TFVZ829L5RqPV7z1ulIf13V5EmnNip4Av9p0RiL6s22Kyrh7Xc43QxbOFbRusUwmp5z9g92ZndDAr829Onr0GCllNzPNptAg_PBN8s8seUtw5WbxbNgmEvssm1W1BFeHDOI6Nhw_xFJNGXDjCJWwsSuCf-d3DK9k9t_KxCoLqwb467qkl11yexMqeOueboOFO4w-X5hsm4Pmc6qVqPHIP2Ulvta7CmidW9vqaVWxRaLeexNf1A6ECBWsDs86Ix4zA05wYN2CyBxMiuhbQMiJ7BrmRmvb3YrEQ2o3xZ7DzcIoamPAN4VDbGhxlsYinK4MIVopDVYFBLUV0z1hxe51Io3PMaI_sOS6v-Zh43H9f7ml9_TNZWkE3ySFFDOFwFWrocwbd6O4YuWLOdtT6y7FNUvgukaZ9k8ectLciwUwbr8guau2FrpTyODZpXw02VP3Kz5Q6yUAt2wZd9FXKhzJtNWBWY_tvqLHbyN9G4wha_PjR_43CjpZjHrIIrGzdthLs4rvGnDpQ5YvFM9AugRM9INeuJxT2KbPvTYgMmDb0a-C9OhpPBDoLCt6UMhM1BbQx65xPicoW2WjOHyaP3-UrEdg3B2Och8LD-gibSYVcYIhZ0Uk_KzI_ipE6Wq1Xb3FOUTmtl81jaW-aFZKnlVxsI2U_7pKLECIzBQP0SGUVVfRNAYr3tk)

clean_body: My accident didn’t end my life, it defined it. | | | | | | | Untitled Document Patriot, If you were wondering how I ended up in a wheelchair, the story goes back just over 40 years. When I was 26 years old, a massive tree fell on me while I was out for a jog. In an instant, my back was broken, and I was left paralyzed from the waist down. Doctors told me I'd never walk again. But, that didn't stop me. Through months of grueling rehab, and with the support of my family, faith, and steel rods in my spine, I learned how to keep moving forward. My accident didn't end my life. It defined it. It taught me how to fight through pain. How to endure. How to lead. It drove me throughout my legal career and service to Texas as Attorney General and a Supreme Court Justice. That same spirit is what drives how I lead Texas today as Governor. Right now, we face a challenge that requires every ounce of the same determination, and I'm asking for your help to overcome it: The fundraising freeze for Texas lawmakers just lifted and we now have just days before our first fundraising report of the cycle is filed for all to see. That's the shortest window in modern history to show the strength of our conservative movement before the numbers go public, which is why I'm asking for your support in a BIG way. We've delivered historic wins this legislative session -- school choice, property tax relief, election integrity, stronger border security and bail reform that makes our communities safer -- but the Radical Left is already organizing to roll it all back. We can 't let them gain ground. We've overcome challenges like this before, and with your help today, we'll do it again. Thank you in advance for your support, Governor Greg Abbott POLITICAL AD PAID FOR BY TEXANS FOR GREG ABBOTT PO BOX 308, AUSTIN, TEXAS 78767 This message reflects the opinions and representations of . You are receiving this email because you signed up as a member of Texans for Greg Abbott's online community.

subject: Hey Peter
body:

I need your help.

We're almost halfway through 2025, and just days away from my federal filing deadline.

Right now, we're not where we should be for digital fundraising. In fact, we're falling behind.

**I am not trying to be dramatic, but this couldn't come at a worse time for two reasons.**

**
1. A radical Leftist just announced she's running against me in 2026.
2. Democrats are already outraising us by millions, and we're over a year away from Election Day.

| Peter, I’m sure you’re getting messages about “end-of-quarter deadlines” this time of year. I am, too! To be clear, these deadlines are a _very_ real thing. And failing to hit our goals has _very_ real consequences. Here’s why: 👀 At the end of this month, our fundraising numbers will go public. ❌ This means Republican PACs, potential opponents, and far-right billionaires trying to buy elections will be able to see how much momentum our campaign has. 🤡 I’ve been pissing off a certain billionaire who has pledged to spend BIG to unseat me in 2026. This deadline is one of the few opportunities to show him the power of grassroots supporters coming together – and that this seat isn’t for sale. But Peter, if we don't hit our fundraising goal... the far right and their billionaire friends will see a vulnerable campaign to target for the next 2 years. | _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tff0b7d7e-282c-4ea3-89c6-3ad5e46175b7/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

| URGENT: Trump AG Pam Bondi warns Jasmine Crockett to ‘tread very carefully’ in what she says about Elon Musk [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T490112c2-e8ad-4cf0-90ba-6f73da78018d/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) I’ll be blunt: MAGA Republicans are trying to scare me into silence. But here’s the thing: I REFUSE to be silenced by Pam Bondi or ANYONE else! [I will continue standing up to Donald Trump and all the MAGA extremists if it’s the last thing I do — and no one will silence me. But I need you with me to keep up the fight, so if you’re proud to stand with me on the right side of history, chip in any amount right away. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/Tc62e40d0-4e84-4aba-b89b-47d0c8232614/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | | | Pam Bondi and Donald Trump think it’s terrorism to criticize Elon Musk and his companies. But if Pam Bondi has such a problem with terrorism, she should speak to her boss, who pardoned the January 6th domestic terrorists who desecrated our democracy and tried to pull off a coup. We need to show this administration that we won’t be scared into silence or cowed into submission. That starts with making sure Democrats like me have the funds we need to fight back and take a stand. [So please, if you’re on my team, chip in any amount, and let’s continue bringing the fight to MAGA Republicans every day. >>](https://default.salsalabs.org/T89314ac0-9562-4e4b-920c-222d5b67e827/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

| | | About Blue Amp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. **And savvy grassroots activists like you know, just like we do, that we can’t stop watching the people we help elect:_ after the elections, we have to keep organizing support for the policies we like and pushing back against the ones we don’t._** **__When the public tunes out between elections and the only people our elected officials hear from are the paid lobbyists of wealthy corporations, our government stops being accountable to the needs of ordinary families.__** **Democracy never sleeps, and neither can we.** So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! — _You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T0f74da0b-5cc5-4a3f-a28c-6d23cf49946c/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)._

clean_body: I need you to sign your NumbersUSA “Deport 1 Million” petition right away.| | | | | | | | My Fellow American,If you’re a Patriot who knows that we MUST accelerate the pace of deportations, Or at least in the next 48 hours. My team at NumbersUSA has 29 years of experience and success in harnessing the power of grassroots armies of American Patriots to defeat the open-borders activists.And we are launching a nationwide petition drive built around 3 simple steps to reach 1 million deportations by year end: 1. Ban all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens 2. Shut off income for illegal aliens through “E-Verify” 3. Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law President Trump has closed the Southern Border, but we still have most of the 8 million Biden Border Crashers (and at least 15-17 MILLION illegal aliens total)......costing taxpayers an estimated $150 BILLION dollars a year.Our hospitals are overcrowded, our public services are overextended, and millions of Americans have been replaced by illegal workers. We literally cannot afford to delay. The Radical Left seems fixated on creating societal upheaval by overwhelming our borders and immigration system. That’s why they’re using the courts to stall and stop all deportations –- because it would take at least 15 YEARS to provide each illegal alien in our country all the extra reviews and appeals the open-borders radicals are demanding. They want to make this invasion permanent, and they are sabotaging the deportation operation at every turn......but our BAN, SHUTOFF & UNLEASH steps will trigger a wave of deportations and self-deportations that the Radical Left will be powerless to stop, and it’ll snowball from there.We start with 1 million and then keep on going. Patriots in the Trump Administration like JD Vance, Stephen Miller, and Tom Homan are going to battle every day to:Carry out the requirements for deportations that are contained in laws passed by previous Congresses ... Battle state and local governments that violate federal laws by shielding illegal aliens and the outlaw businesses that hire them....And Resist pressure from corporate media and lobbies to protect the illegal workforce.In other words, these patriots are fighting to deliver on their promises. , my name is Roy Beck, and I’m the founder of NumbersUSA—the largest single-issue grassroots advocacy group in the nation.NumbersUSA brings together a grassroots network of millions for one purpose: America First, lower-immigration policy.We have the experience, the scale, and most importantly, we have a plan to make sure the Trump administration hits its deportation goals.But I need your help to execute these three simple steps for deporting at least 1 million in Year One. Let me explain those 3 steps in a little more detail: 1\. Ban all local and federal rewards for illegal aliens. Until we cut off all the taxpayer subsidies to illegal aliens of housing, health care, and tuition... ...and stop granting them driver’s licenses, Social Security numbers, and other privileges of a U.S. citizen, illegals have no reason to leave. 2\. Shut off income for illegal aliens through nationwide “E-Verify.” Most illegal aliens will eventually go home if they can’t obtain U.S. jobs. “E-Verify” has long been available through the Department of Homeland Security. It allows employers to ensure they are hiring Americans and not illegal workers. But nobody is required to use it, so the anti-American employers don’t. Mandating E-Verify for all employers is an obvious first step Congress must take to make sure sanctuary governors and mayors aren’t helping illegals to take jobs from American workers and undercut their wages. 3\. Unleash ICE to the full extent of the law. We’re already seeing many illegal aliens choose to leave on their own terms instead of in handcuffs with an ICE agent...But we need more of this.Sanctuary Cities, uncooperative local officials, and anti-ICE activists keep impeding ICE’s critical work. To overcome their resistance, we’ll need more funding and more public pressure.......and more laws passed by Congress so a future President can’t open the floodgates ever again. We’ve already seen the entire radical Leftist apparatus mobilize nationwide, foreign-flag-waving street demonstrations in favor of illegal immigration.The fiery images of the demonstrations show how passionate they are for the right of all foreign tourists, guest workers, and illegal aliens to stay and work in our country forever. So, you know they will never consent to 1 million deportations. And they’ll definitely never consent to the largest deportation operation in history! there is no better group to organize it than NumbersUSA. Putting pressure on Congress is what we at NumbersUSA have been doing for a quarter-century.Back in 1996, we pioneered the tactic of masses of voters using the newly accessible internet to pressure elected officials directly. Then in 2007, when Ted Kennedy and sellout Republicans wanted to import millions more foreign workers and give amnesty to millions of illegal immigrants, NumbersUSA mobilized citizens in such numbers that they shut down the Congressional switchboard. The New York Times credited us (or maybe blamed us) for blocking that bill. All told, NumbersUSA has reduced possible immigration to the U.S. by over 40 MILLION through our many grassroots victories.We know how to give the American people a voice on Capitol Hill that no lawmaker or talking head can ignore.So if you’re frustrated by the well-funded and organized protests slowing down deportations... If you’re worried about all the illegals still here... And if you want to make a difference right now... Because you understand how urgent this is, I’m asking you to consider making a gift of $27, $50, $100 or even as much as $500 or $1,000 when you submit your petition today.With a donation of $27, you can become a member of NumbersUSA and join the millions of Americans across our great land demanding an America First lower-immigration policy. If you can’t afford $27 today, consider just $3.97—the approximate cost of processing your petition.But of course, larger gifts will accelerate our petition drive’s nationwide roll-out and intensify the pressure on Capitol Hill. To kick the deportations into overdrive, we need to light a fire under every open-borders politician and bureaucrat who’s holding things up. Thank you for reading my email today. It’s Patriots like you who give me hope for our country’s future. | | Roy Beck FounderNumbersUSA | | | P.S. Click the button below to access your Deport 1 Million Petition. I need you to sign and submit it to NumbersUSA right away, along with your best donation. Remember, with a donation of $27 or more, you will join the 8 million members who already call NumbersUSA home. | | | | | NumbersUSA is a nonpartisan, nonprofit organization that believes better immigration policy is possible and needed. As America’s largest single-issue advocacy group, NumbersUSA is focused exclusively on immigration reform. NumbersUSA empowers over 8 million grassroots supporters spread across every congressional district to impact immigration policy with information, tools, access, and influence. ../../Downloads/NumbersUSA.com | | | ---|---|--- | | NumbersUSA Education & Research Foundation1201 Wilson Blvd 25th FloorArlington, VA 22209 |

name: Lauren Lalonde, PramilaForCongress.com
subject: Following up
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Everything from Pramila’s re-election to our nationwide organizing efforts depends on reaching these goals.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20250629-5194-footer&t=1&akid=5194%2E420207%2E7qo4gm)
Peter, as we near the end of the month, I wanted to follow up on Pramila’s message from yesterday.
We saw a surge of grassroots support after Pramila’s message last night, but we’re still about $9,000 short of our goal for this month, so we can’t let up now. Everything from Pramila’s re-election to our nationwide organizing efforts depends on reaching these goals. [**Can you donate $3 or anything at all to help us close the gap?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250629-1?refcode=em20250629-5194&amount=3&refcode2=5194_420207_7qo4gm&akid=5194%2E420207%2E7qo4gm)
Like Pramila said below, if just 1 out of 15 people reading this donates, we’ll hit our goal in no time.
Thank you for your support,
Lauren Lalonde, Campaign Manager
Pramila for Congress
\-------- Forwarded message --------
Date: June 28, 2025
From: Pramila Jayapal
Peter,
**We're still short of where we want to be on our $75,000 fundraising goal for this month.** Because we’re approaching a critical end-of-quarter deadline (the first full quarter with Trump back in the White House), it's even more imperative that we reach every fundraising goal we set for this campaign.
Every year, campaign fundraising always dips during the summer. But Peter, we can’t let this trend continue with Trump doubling down on his authoritarian agenda — [**please step up with a donation today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250629-1?refcode=em20250629-5194&amount=3&refcode2=5194_420207_7qo4gm&akid=5194%2E420207%2E7qo4gm)
**I wouldn't reach out to ask for your help today if grassroots contributions weren't so important.** The money raised from emails like this helps keep me in Congress, fighting for our democracy and for social, economic, racial, and environmental justice. And it helps me fight to grow our progressive movement and organize nationwide. I don't take a dime of corporate PAC money — supporters and donors like you are the beating heart of our movement.
[**Can you chip in $3 or any amount right now to help us pick up our fundraising pace and hit our end-of-quarter goal? No matter the amount you can give, it makes a big difference — if just 1 out of every 15 people reading this email donated, we’d catch up in no time!**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250629-1?refcode=em20250629-5194&amount=3&refcode2=5194_420207_7qo4gm&akid=5194%2E420207%2E7qo4gm)
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20250629-1?amount=3&refcode=em20250629-5194&refcode2=5194_420207_7qo4gm&akid=5194%2E420207%2E7qo4gm)**
It’s crunch time, Peter, so thank you for your support. And thank you, as always, for being a part of our people-first movement for bold and transformative change.
In solidarity,
Pramila
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20250629-5194-footer&t=2&refcode2=5194_420207_7qo4gm&akid=5194%2E420207%2E7qo4gm)**

Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
