name: Ryan Crosswell
subject: Donald Trump asked me to ignore the law. I said no.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Ohio House Democratic Campaign Committee, 545 E Town St
body:
My name is Ryan Crosswell, and today, I am officially launching my campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th District in Congress.

|
---
Donald Trump asked me to ignore the law. I said no. Every citizen who cares about American democracy must have a line in the sand that cannot be crossed. My name is Ryan Crosswell, and today, I’m officially launching my campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th District in Congress — because Donald Trump crossed my line. [**If Donald Trump has crossed your line, please consider splitting a donation between Ohio House Dems and my campaign to help me reach my Launch Day Digital Goal. Every dollar we raise sends a message to Donald Trump that this is our country, and we’re going to fight for it.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110498676/554531433/-576296379?refcode=250629_Crosswell_Honor2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBkYjc1Yi0xMDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FLw90uyQZcRIKRlutzppuAq_BYAkSXcBVmcO0M1MmHQ=) | **[DONATE NOW>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110498677/554531434/1810887588?refcode=250629_Crosswell_Honor2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBkYjc1Yi0xMDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FLw90uyQZcRIKRlutzppuAq_BYAkSXcBVmcO0M1MmHQ= "https://secure.actblue.com/")**
---
I grew up in Pottsville, Pennsylvania. Motivated to serve because of 9/11, I joined the Marine Corps, where I learned the code of Honor, Courage, and Commitment.
I kept that code during my time as a federal prosecutor under Presidents Obama, Biden, and Trump.
I locked up child predators, took on drug traffickers, and took down corrupt politicians — until the day Donald Trump decided to weaponize the Department of Justice to go after his political opponents and let his friends off the hook.
He wanted the prosecutors in my section to drop a case against his political ally. He wanted me to break the code and ignore the law, and that’s something I would never do.
**So I said no and resigned from the Department of Justice — then, I fought back.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110498678/554531435/-576296379?refcode=250629_Crosswell_Honor2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjZDBkYjc1Yi0xMDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=FLw90uyQZcRIKRlutzppuAq_BYAkSXcBVmcO0M1MmHQ=)**

clean_body: My name is Ryan Crosswell, and today, I am officially launching my campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th District in Congress. | Donald Trump asked me to ignore the law. I said no. Every citizen who cares about American democracy must have a line in the sand that cannot be crossed. My name is Ryan Crosswell, and today, I’m officially launching my campaign to represent Pennsylvania’s 7th District in Congress — because Donald Trump crossed my line. = | = "" I grew up in Pottsville, Pennsylvania. Motivated to serve because of 9/11, I joined the Marine Corps, where I learned the code of Honor, Courage, and Commitment. I kept that code during my time as a federal prosecutor under Presidents Obama, Biden, and Trump. I locked up child predators, took on drug traffickers, and took down corrupt politicians — until the day Donald Trump decided to weaponize the Department of Justice to go after his political opponents and let his friends off the hook. He wanted the prosecutors in my section to drop a case against his political ally. He wanted me to break the code and ignore the law, and that’s something I would never do. So I said no and resigned from the Department of Justice — then, I fought back. = I testified publicly in a congressional hearing about the threat Donald Trump’s agenda poses to our justice system, the integrity of the federal government, and our democracy itself. I do not have the deep pockets of the big corporations that are ripping us off while hardworking Pennsylvanians fight like hell just to get by, or the influence of the corrupt politicians who keep the game rigged against everyday Americans, or the power Trump has forcibly seized for himself. But that will not stop me from fighting back against him again — with Honor, Courage, and a Commitment to the real people and families of Pennsylvania’s 7th. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" Thank you. Fellow Conservative,

I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan.

I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve this great country. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate. But when I returned home and saw what was happening to Minnesota—when I saw the radical left rising—I knew I had to step up.

_**And now I need your help.**_

The same Democratic Socialist movement that just **[hijacked New York City is gaining ground here in the Midwest.](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=06ad6d37e7f341c9b90ab6c6d04cee84&_e=fHJJKXYw8GRvsFacIhWq-CCkSRs4t3OZE-LeZSxxVxvfx61yFM34YDCydFsBOZ39ng6lzDknCN5pFuext998P6esIF3uIQA4MWkmjZbuUQI_02byn0_v8ZCl9Bq4BqxdaKjYBT6z2v0WELAlQUsyxI8dgZjHAgxbWMqjZTUmpuTnYEzrTv0BqG2p_bdjWjHtTfa7yr8z9NzLvJTjBrjwrXKCG8M2Hcvd1SK5Sl41vv8jLPLn6IU99O9A6LxuTm4bTR3i04tbCjmVJQito6CflGWqXx7NArDkPcTavdk3XFugH43OXW6UApfzkoJCGnzVIWlAMZG5XtmcpaV7ilaXeqpmIwVNXIyF5QySLngpqtB0iWZySfMygdJ-hTxS7ww3m1VMR8ZISnNRy6tbPxvGDsfztm05JDemX05iyCjUXZ0Q8nPiWuh-QEuCUFETSNhS5iJy4HP3QsprrEntK-KAfIQrPiXm9fGHQtyF6Ixz6aTG48FR92lOBXW1c-NKdAbYNUV4516MQNILnuCuQK5OfqdrLUAcluLXTHg83TqPQ31GzJBFDUWSs22yZxd1yPGw7w-9esyj0WjeOnXz0VpViSIbsrFqcUqjDRTrnFrk6275dOrj8NvRsTAuOFwUdxiqiIDSnE8HuX36J6TCqBiNVmqyL5J93S0YmaKCNUSWUQyhPheBlgWsz9bmRGIVo9qxQYgNKKzPxIE5QUUuYIeEYM2xBRhMBdVZAVXLIMaxn-B5angD35Vkf9Zo1kHJIz5e) **This week, New York Democrats nominated a man so extreme that he promised to arrest the Israeli Prime Minister and replace city police with social workers. If that sounds insane, it is.

_**But don’t think it’s limited to the coasts.**_****

My opponent—the lieutenant governor of Minnesota—isn’t far behind. She openly aligned with violent unrest in 2020, **pushed to dismantle our police, and filed lawsuits against law enforcement as our communities burned. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos.**

This kind of radicalism isn’t an outlier anymore. It’s the new blueprint of the left. And if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota, it will keep spreading.

The Minnesota I grew up in—where you respected your neighbors, honored your country, and stood for law and order—feels like it’s slipping away.

**I didn’t wait to serve my country after 9/11. I enlisted on my 18th birthday and spent over 20 years protecting American freedom abroad. Now I’m fighting to protect it at home. **

I don’t come from money or a political legacy. I come from grit, faith, and a calling to serve. That’s what drives me now.

_**It may be too late for New York, but there is still hope for the rest of us.

[**HELP ME STOP SOCIALISM IN MINNESOTA**](http://links.freedomfirstalert.com/u/click?_t=9ca143e971904d26a973d002cb0ae7f7&_m=06ad6d37e7f341c9b90ab6c6d04cee84&_e=fHJJKXYw8GRvsFacIhWq-CCkSRs4t3OZE-LeZSxxVxvfx61yFM34YDCydFsBOZ39ng6lzDknCN5pFuext998P6esIF3uIQA4MWkmjZbuUQI_02byn0_v8ZCl9Bq4BqxdaKjYBT6z2v0WELAlQUsyxI8dgZjHAgxbWMqjZTUmpuTnYEzrTv0BqG2p_bdjWjHtTfa7yr8z9NzLvJTjBrjwrXKCG8M2Hcvd1SK5Sl41vv8jLPLn6IU99O9A6LxuTm4bTR3i04tbCjmVJQito6CflGdJImoeBx8-g5g6LZd1ijRaeP306Se6r3ioc2ULn9qgfrI8xIh2e2mQglQsIdV6I95m8Kd2Nc9ezKWRizKmTmO66YuLGgOnC79lf1OQjiWIyWnPIDj9xvXk9J4H8PxcxJPotv4U1q9dAHHAGlYR480_NFeqbgpyo53LEOh4LKQUGKzfh4kTCfiiXGEVoRee7NeapufCs-61NMLJ1ndlO1IQTleJ3skFG1w5paEV9Nz_EOE_uNNyYNaDtdWD9keE62zhVM3H77Tzf4vPquTBfCg9DVqtDXrQerdIVvRWni5Kk13rpN5AluHLNwUS1HGfV7r1ouIRuSkIgxIWFcOyg_lXDMMGrOl288-9S58nw5d2_aqoCL9jUmLws6nsfW7RQJIpJY3pnilGSQGZZSDh2Zgim9UhkiC9sgK4faXF0_5PUphGbnNEP7tj34gF03Cv-bmfOPol8yH9MSc9QxCnBYCAUzAO5h4LGImisViU-tWk) **_

This election isn’t just about one Senate seat. It’s about stopping a national wave of socialist extremism that threatens to bankrupt small businesses, rewrite our values, and destroy what millions of Americans fought and died to defend.

New York may have fallen to it. **But Minnesota doesn’t have to.**

If you’ve ever felt like your voice doesn’t matter anymore, it does. The radical left is organized, loud, and well-funded. But they don’t speak for most of us.

**We need a new kind of leadership—rooted in service, not self-interest.**

clean_body: It may be too late for New York, but there is still hope for the rest of us. | Fellow Conservative, I’m Adam Schwarze—former Navy SEAL Officer, Marine Corps veteran, and proud Minnesotan. I’ve deployed nine times to 70 countries to serve this great country. I never expected to run for the U.S. Senate. But when I returned home and saw what was happening to Minnesota—when I saw the radical left rising—I knew I had to step up. And now I need your help. The same Democratic Socialist movement that just This week, New York Democrats nominated a man so extreme that he promised to arrest the Israeli Prime Minister and replace city police with social workers. If that sounds insane, it is. But don’t think it’s limited to the coasts.** My opponent—the lieutenant governor of Minnesota—isn’t far behind. She openly aligned with violent unrest in 2020, pushed to dismantle our police, and filed lawsuits against law enforcement as our communities burned. While Governor Walz tried to save face, she doubled down on chaos. This kind of radicalism isn’t an outlier anymore. It’s the new blueprint of the left. And if we don’t draw the line in Minnesota, it will keep spreading. The Minnesota I grew up in—where you respected your neighbors, honored your country, and stood for law and order—feels like it’s slipping away. I didn’t wait to serve my country after 9/11. I enlisted on my 18th birthday and spent over 20 years protecting American freedom abroad. Now I’m fighting to protect it at home. I don’t come from money or a political legacy. I come from grit, faith, and a calling to serve. That’s what drives me now. It may be too late for New York, but there is still hope for the rest of us. This election isn’t just about one Senate seat. It’s about stopping a national wave of socialist extremism that threatens to bankrupt small businesses, rewrite our values, and destroy what millions of Americans fought and died to defend. New York may have fallen to it. But Minnesota doesn’t have to. If you’ve ever felt like your voice doesn’t matter anymore, it does. The radical left is organized, loud, and well-funded. But they don’t speak for most of us. We need a new kind of leadership—rooted in service, not self-interest. If you’re not ready to donate today, that’s okay. But if you believe—like I do—that Minnesota and America deserve better, With deep gratitude, Adam Schwarze Retired Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate - Minnesota Former Navy SEAL officer Marine Corps Veteran Proud Minnesotan FOLLOW ADAM ON SOCIAL MEDIA** | | Paid for by Schwarze for Senate Adam Schwarze is a former Navy SEAL and Marine. Use of his military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

body:

Friend,

We’re 24 hours out.

Tomorrow night at midnight, the books close on my first quarterly FEC deadline since re-launching this campaign — and what we report will shape the rest of this race.

**_This is one of the most closely watched House races in the country._** What we raise right now will send a signal — to the media, to outside groups, and yes, to Susie Lee — about whether this campaign is built to win.

And because I refuse corporate PAC money and special interest checks, that signal will come from one place: _**_you_**_.

I’m not doing this to pad a résumé or play political games. I’m doing this because I care deeply about where our country’s headed and because I believe southern Nevada deserves better than a representative who puts illegal immigrants above the needs of our communities.

**If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to help —**this is it.****

👉 [**Rush in your most generous contribution now »**](http://links.martynevada.com/u/click?_t=3a5223257aca4a93ac027b228c2c976d&_m=9f6aa7d2b6ee462ba0fc2ba70f0514eb&_e=H7x72uGmKFAXAMo95upicusbXRziz2qvP9sHh0qQ7IZ-T3Db2hYbH6Jfz4Sehik6VbCZ2r33cP9rgQo4YZsTmAVroD3QHWZFKmZZ-2p5ngLJ0pPPWegCbihMMjeKUy9r85GQsAPeatfgtmLo-uIe9bWUjSz1GEpuewj_zYteHIu2vdjHpyE3XylOU8hwZIg1NmtsvPpWjhEwrwILl5WOGLwSJogYLfT3BFILVhB0KmWcWNVIBrugivT96n8e8Hpa2OAaDFjRUn_iXjb2Hm0732TRxt_MQF2f50abh1qO8iJntXQjWfWDv9B5O_2srGTRaZ5QBA4x_yHWC6cUhXX9wzUNcx_VdmpuqjGDG60lYvrqYAntW575y0t-gqeqvSB5qif9YMdppTjLiqZh0jPm5wwLRk5fyVae05wPrJIppxBss9Du0GcPwRZhRiMB1dhDY19r3Swf5EtWK8wlHBc3pJqrBZ2xhV52DD1_4OBRD3Ox-PfTRVEhaa4Fhjt_z7BqL17N-At91wfLQZbUitNKbxx5a_IY9JP6MG6HaSLNQ-tqcHoC1n7C7JMrbZpQDmDC5SFFUTjz0C0SIoM-YWnDe0Fye4_bKXN8_kG9IODB0AVCyTOZV2ef0mNyrcmdxmooFpGobP8hWGM0NKAppwzQkTFF_wkqIgMwAl7ZyvRMQnM6ZQL8XeqPtOIkSP3DdTwJ8q2nOROsVE_hNWVYkB1rgto3QXYlrYzR8lmVnPCbGBDPI3Ofzp7wIu0xq3zAwUD3qK3LuiKT2qoEuv6a_vnMLw%3D%3D)

There’s no backup plan. There’s no second first impression. What we raise between now and midnight tomorrow is going to be seen by everyone.

Let’s finish strong.

**— Marty O’Donnell**

| **ABOUT MARTY**
**Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician** and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans.

**Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems.** He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC.

**Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families.** As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government.

And because I refuse corporate PAC money and special interest checks, that signal will come from one place: you. I’m not doing this to pad a résumé or play political games. I’m doing this because I care deeply about where our country’s headed and because I believe southern Nevada deserves better than a representative who puts illegal immigrants above the needs of our communities. If you’ve been waiting for the right moment to help —this is it.** 👉 There’s no backup plan. There’s no second first impression. What we raise between now and midnight tomorrow is going to be seen by everyone. Let’s finish strong. — Marty O’Donnell | ABOUT MARTY Marty O’Donnell isn’t a politician and he’s not taking any corporate PAC money. Marty will give us a voice – not special interests or Wall Street. It’s time to turn our nation around to make life better for Nevadans. Marty O’Donnell has an ear for solving problems. He’s an award-winning composer who wrote the iconic soundtracks for the video games Halo and Destiny. Marty will cut through the noise in DC. Marty O’Donnell will be a champion for Nevada families. As a husband, father, and grandfather, Marty can’t sit on the sidelines as local families struggle because of the problems created by Big Government. | PAID FOR BY MARTY FOR CONGRESS** Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

body:
[1]Powered By People

Tomorrow’s end-of-quarter deadline is approaching fast — and how we close
this quarter determines the strength of our movement and what we’re able
to do next.

When we meet our goals, Powered by People has the resources to host town
halls, mobilize grassroots support, and hold those in power accountable.
These aren’t symbolic efforts — they’re real conversations with Texans
that turn into real action and build political power from the ground up.

This is how we build a movement that reflects the people — not the
powerful.

But make no mistake: Greg Abbott and his allies are watching closely.
They’re doubling down on extremism and silencing Texan voices every day.
They’re working to curb our efforts and roll back the progress we’re
fighting for.

That’s why this deadline matters so much. Falling short means scaling back
the work that makes the biggest difference. And that is simply not an
option.

body:
Don’t ignore this message.
Don’t get distracted.
Don’t help Republicans by clicking away.

As of 2pm today, we’re only 391 Democratic Memberships away HITTING our end-of-quarter goal!
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_df_fliphouse?amount=7 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_df_fliphouse?amount=7]391 MEMBERSHIPS AWAY FROM OUR END-OF-QUARTER GOAL: PITCH IN $7 TO FLIP THE HOUSE » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mc_dotl_q22025_df_fliphouse?amount=7]

Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa _by just 0.19 points_ after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- **they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to _0.15 points_.** But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? _Of course not._ Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. **This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power.** The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. **[Team, chip $25 or whatever you can today as we fight bills like this around the country and protect our right to be heard in our elections>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110500250/554536879/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=8+t5ZUldCKsYUPFAFb8Q+GGSwg9DDW1uplIdJmr04j3608p8+1COdt+XYQKPKr4GpZEuKDngj10nSYRA+YXcJ/5DB8pPkvrJKi3iiVwmtYI=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhODI2ZDQ5LTEzNTUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3dO7wCIRW1HUpwABmLnK8RqbJWmv2WHc_HcOLrkGBI=&emci=780003c3-ed54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4a826d49-1355-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

| | Those aren't the only changes -- **this new law puts partisan county auditors and their staffs in charge of the recount instead of a board chosen by the campaigns in the race.** Want to guess which party controls most of Iowa's county auditor positions? Yes, the one that just passed this bill into law.Take it from Iowa state Sen. Sarah Trone Garriott, who has been through two recounts following elections for her Senate seat:"_Currently in our process, the county auditor and their staff, they’re very present, they support the process, they’re very engaged_ ," she said. "_But taking out the candidates’ representatives and the neutral party,**putting it on a partisan elected official and the staff who are supervised and employed by them does not make it more fair.**_ " It's clear that all this new law does is create opportunities for opponents of voting rights to suppress votes before they can be cast and the controlling party to silence votes after the election by having them tossed in a recount -- just like we saw in North Carolina with a race that was not settled for 6 months after Election Day. **[Help us protect voting rights in Iowa, North Carolina, and beyond with $25 or more today and make every vote count>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110500257/554536886/1723810624?am=25.00&contactdata=8+t5ZUldCKsYUPFAFb8Q+GGSwg9DDW1uplIdJmr04j3608p8+1COdt+XYQKPKr4GpZEuKDngj10nSYRA+YXcJ/5DB8pPkvrJKi3iiVwmtYI=&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5MjE1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjRhODI2ZDQ5LTEzNTUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=F3dO7wCIRW1HUpwABmLnK8RqbJWmv2WHc_HcOLrkGBI=&emci=780003c3-ed54-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&emdi=4a826d49-1355-f011-8f7c-6045bdfe8e9c&ceid=33603084)**

clean_body: Des Moines Register: Iowa is changing when candidates can request a recount — and who conducts them. Here's how.| | | Iowa's legislature isn't making these changes for fairness, for efficiency, or for a better democracy. It's to protect their power and shave the edges off our democracy so they stay in control. | | | Team: Last year, Congresswoman Marianette Miller-Meeks won reelection in Iowa by just 0.19 points after a recount—the second-closest House race in the country.So what have the opponents of voting rights in Iowa's state legislature done? That's right -- they just passed a bill lowering the recount threshold to 0.15 points. But they made this change across the board, right? To be fair? Of course not. Candidates for local elections and the state legislature can still request a recount if their race is within 1% (or 50 votes). For races for Congress and statewide office -- the most competitive races -- the tally must be within 0.15%. This is yet another case of opponents of voting rights changing the rules to protect themselves and their power. The law's vote manager claims that this bill was passed to "preserve fairness", while all it really does is protect his political party from potential losses while restricting campaigns from making sure every vote counts. If you've saved your payment information with FastAction, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | Those aren't the only changes -- this new law puts partisan county auditors and their staffs in charge of the recount instead of a board chosen by the campaigns in the race. Want to guess which party controls most of Iowa's county auditor positions? Yes, the one that just passed this bill into law.Take it from Iowa state Sen. Sarah Trone Garriott, who has been through two recounts following elections for her Senate seat:"Currently in our process, the county auditor and their staff, they’re very present, they support the process, they’re very engaged ," she said. "But taking out the candidates’ representatives and the neutral party,putting it on a partisan elected official and the staff who are supervised and employed by them does not make it more fair. " It's clear that all this new law does is create opportunities for opponents of voting rights to suppress votes before they can be cast and the controlling party to silence votes after the election by having them tossed in a recount -- just like we saw in North Carolina with a race that was not settled for 6 months after Election Day. | | | | | | ---|---|---|--- Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country. Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities. name: Heartland Patriots HQ
subject: No corporate PACs. No billionaires. Just you.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
Will you help us keep growing this people-powered movement?
#
Here’s the truth, Peter:
Heartland Patriots isn’t powered by corporate PACs. We’re not bankrolled by billionaires. And we don’t take marching orders from DC insiders.
**Our movement is powered by people like you.**
Every donation — whether it’s $5 or $50 — helps us elect real warriors for working people in communities like yours. We’re committed to supporting candidates who will:
☑️ Invest in the American people, not pointless forever wars
☑️ Stand up to corporate greed and political corruption
☑️ Defend real freedom — including reproductive healthcare
**[Will you help us keep growing this people-powered movement by chipping in $10 or whatever makes sense for you today?](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90875?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90876?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=2&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90876?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=3&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90876?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=4&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90876?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=5&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90876?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=6&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90876?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=7&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/90875?refcode=em20250629-9069&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=8&akid=9069%2E614464%2EIVV1Te)

Heartland Patriots HQ

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: I am MAGA’s #1 target without a doubt
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
|
[](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=abs-em-ossoff.coN5Ny&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250629_PM1_V1_S1&t=3&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1)
_Let me lay this out, clear as day:_
I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024.
This Senate race in Georgia will be the most competitive and most expensive in the nation.
If you’re outraged by what’s happening to our country — and you’re ready to fight –– [**please split $5 between my re-election campaign and Adam Schiff today.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=abs-em-ossoff.U7QP1g&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250629_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=4&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1)
[SPLIT A DONATION](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-ossoff.QI6PU2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250629_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=5&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1)
---
Otherwise, let me remind you why I ran for Senate — and why this moment is just as urgent.
Before I was elected, I led investigations of corruption and human rights abuses worldwide. We exposed wrongdoing in countries where criticizing the government is dangerous, where whistleblowers and witnesses will only meet in secret, and where protest carries the risk of prosecution.
More and more, the atmosphere under Trump reminded me of those places where dissent was silenced by intimidation.
Trump’s rise wasn’t just a crisis. It was a warning.
I ran for Senate because I saw the danger in electing someone so profoundly unfit for the presidency, and I wanted to confront the corruption that made his rise possible.
I also ran — years before the _Dobbs_ decision — because it was already clear the GOP was coming for reproductive rights. I saw Georgia as the front line in that fight. With a six-week ban now in place here, and Republicans pushing for a national abortion ban, it still is.
**Now this President is staging a power grab unprecedented in our history. In his first 100 days:**
* He’s freed violent criminals who attacked the Capitol on his behalf.
* Purged independent watchdogs across government.
* Stacked key agencies with loyalists—and called on them to investigate his political opponents.
* Defied and threatened federal judges.
* Undermined the press.
* Handed sweeping, unaccountable power to the billionaire who spent $300 million to elect him.

Trump’s goal isn’t just revenge. He wants to use the government to crush the opposition. And now, Americans are living in fear of their own government.
This is not a drill and it’s not a bad dream. As citizens, it is the test of our lifetimes.
**In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history—and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.**
Now we must win again. And we _will_ win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and Adam today, of $5 or any amount that works for you.**](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1230?c0=abs-em-ossoff.U7QP1g&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250629_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=6&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1)
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can to power our grassroots campaign. Please, contribute today.
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=abs-em-ossoff.QI6PU2&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_TAN_GEN_AC90_20250629_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=7&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1)
---
Thanks for being part of this team.
As always,
Jon Ossoff
150 E. Olive Ave., Suite 208 Burbank CA, 91502
**[www.adamschiff.com](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/60?t=1&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1) | [contact@adamschiff.com](mailto:contact@adamschiff.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.adamschiff.com/go/64?t=2&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1)**
PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
---
Sign up to receive [fewer emails](https://act.adamschiff.com/signup/em-fewer-emails/?t=8&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1) or [visit our store](https://store.adamschiff.com/). Text **JOIN** to **724433**. If you wish to no longer receive these messages, please [unsubscribe.](https://act.adamschiff.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=9&akid=8730%2E5257348%2EAILex1)

name: Troy
subject: Throwing a Hail Mary
body:
I’ve faced tough odds, but this might be the most brutal fight yet.

[](https://trk.emails.troydowning.) Peter, it's gut-check time.
The June 30th FEC deadline is just hours away, and I'm still short of my goal. I've been counting on Patriots like you to help me take a strong stand against the radical Left in Congress.
But so far, **_it's been crickets._** I've sent emails, made phone calls, and even reached out on social media... but I've heard nothing. _It's like radio silence out there._
Let me tell you, Peter – I'm not a quitter. I'm a fighter. As a U.S. Air Force combat veteran, I know what it means to face tough odds and come out on top. And with President Trump back in the White House, I know we have a real chance to make a difference.
I'm not just talking about the money, Peter. I'm talking about sending a message to the swamp in Washington that we won't back down. **We will keep fighting for what we believe in, no matter what.**
[So what's it going to be, Peter? Are you with me? Will you help me crush this next goal and defend America from the radical ideologues who are trying to destroy it?](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-oWw) [ CHIP IN TODAY
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._h4hHzNA) Thank you for having my back in the fight,
Congressman Troy Downing |
* * *
Q2 FEC DEADLINE COUNTDOWN The Q2 FEC Deadline is bearing down on me, and **this may be our final shot to get back on track before our fundraising numbers go public.** I'm not looking for a handout or a huge donation. I just need a small contribution from Patriots like you to keep my campaign afloat. Will you stand with me and chip in a few bucks to help a combat vet take down the Democrat machine? [Rush your gift to my campaign to defend this critical House seat.](https://trk.emails.troydowning._3rOQ) [ RUSH SUPPORT
](https://trk.emails.troydowning._7s9WhUsw) [](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---
[Privacy Policy](https://trk.emails.troydowning.-lP8oyNarlNOSMrFiprUQ)
To unsubscribe from Troy Downing for Congress, [click here.](https://trk.emails.troydowning.)
---

name: Jon Ossoff
subject: A last-ditch request from me
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
Normally when I write to you via email, I like them to be different from the other messages you get from most elected officials.
#

[](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.3hO4ob&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=1&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)
---
Team, it’s Senator Jon Ossoff.
Normally when you see my name in your inbox, I like the messages to be different from the other emails you get from most elected officials.
I've written to you in detail about the depth of corruption and self-enrichment of the Trump Administration, the President's thirst for political retribution and intimidation, along with other things I am seeing or working on in Washington, D.C. and at home in Georgia.
This message is different. It's more direct.
I am reaching out today with a last-ditch request for a contribution to my campaign before our end-of-quarter fundraising drive comes to a close tomorrow. Here's why:
This race will be one of the most competitive and expensive in the nation. I am the only Democratic Senator up for re-election in a state Trump won in 2024 and that makes me MAGA’s #1 target.
In 2020, the pundits said flipping a Republican Senate seat in Georgia couldn’t be done. But we built one of the strongest voter mobilization programs in Senate campaign history -- and we won. That victory won the Senate majority.
Now we must win again. And we will win again.
Just like last time, I can’t do it alone.
So I’m asking:
[**Please split a contribution between my re-election campaign and GIFFORDS PAC today before our end-of-quarter fundraising drive comes to a close.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.3hO4ob&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=2&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly between Jon Ossoff and GIFFORDS PAC:_
| | **[Donate $5](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.DnElhB&amount=5&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=21&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://go.giffords.org/go/17017?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.aZ1-LD&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=22&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://go.giffords.org/go/17010?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.5-nqzi&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=23&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://go.giffords.org/go/17011?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.VW8dAW&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=24&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://go.giffords.org/go/17012?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.dwHIah&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=25&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://go.giffords.org/go/17015?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.DnElhB&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=26&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)**
---
****
The average online donation to our campaign is around $30. Many give less. Some give more.
All that matters is that lots and lots of people are contributing what they can before our deadline. [**Please, contribute today.**](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.3hO4ob&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=27&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)
**[DONATE](https://go.giffords.org/go/14457?c0=giffords-em-ossoff-june2025.3hO4ob&refcode=em250629-1-b&t=28&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI)**
Thank you,
Jon Ossoff

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=29&akid=10570%2E3935704%2EhPVInI) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

name: Free Thinker Daily
subject: The "Invisible Scam" Nobody Knows About — Except The Big Food Companies Behind It
body:
---
| | | | | |
---
| |
---
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15333439/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvVGNRdnhXdHR5Vw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsUEVxdUI5eA/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUtjbG40ZnBxNFdscw/gaGGEKw/sfo3aa9be45)
| | One of America’s top doctors is hoping you’ll read this before you set foot in another grocery store.

Renowned cardiothoracic surgeon Dr. Steven Gundry has found an “invisible problem” affecting almost everything we eat. But almost nobody knows it’s happening — except the big food companies responsible for it.

And Dr. Gundry’s research shows it could be the true cause of low energy, digestive issues, and unwanted weight gain in millions of Americans over 35.

But that’s not even the worst part.

“Because this problem has flown under the radar for decades, there are no rules to protect us. Nobody is stopping these companies from doing this to our food,” says Dr. Gundry.

He exposes exactly what’s happening — and what you can do about it — in a **[new whistleblowing video report that reveals his shocking research.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15333439/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGtwZXR0cmtuZy5jb20vS1EyWENXLzNNNkdMMTkv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsUEVxdUI5eA/qP3N1YjE9NjUwNCZfbmxpZD1aek1rZGV5VlR5Jl9uaGlkcz1uY3gxS2NsbjRmcHE0V2xz/gaGGEKw/s9gcae96bd1)**

**“Once you’ve seen this,” Dr. Gundry says, “you’ll never buy groceries the same way again.”**

In his free video, Dr. Gundry reveals a new method for protecting yourself and your family from this little-known problem affecting food all across America.

It’s a technique he’s been using himself — and at age 74, he says it’s the reason he looks and feels decades younger.

The video has quickly gone viral, with thousands of people saying they’ve been using Dr. Gundry’s simple discovery at breakfast every day.

And as a result, they report having more energy, improved digestion, more comfortable joints, and a slimmer waistline.

Dr. Gundry has granted permission for us to share the full video below, completely free.

“Every American should have this information,” he says. “And if this video opens your eyes to what’s happening out there, I hope you’ll share it with your loved ones.”

[ ](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15333439/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaGtwZXR0cmtuZy5jb20vS1EyWENXLzNNNkdMMTkv/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsUEVxdUI5eA/qP3N1YjE9NjUwNCZfbmxpZD1yVDVFY2V6NHpiJl9uaGlkcz1uY3gxS2NsbjRmcHE0V2xz/gaGGEKw/s4v91b644d6)

This email was sent to **[dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)** as part of your subscription to **Free Thinker Daily**

108 S Washington St. Suite 200
Alexandria, VA 22314

[Unsubscribe](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e15333439/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3N1YnNjcmlwdGlvbnMvdW5zdWJzY3JpYmU/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsUEVxdUI5eA/qP2hpZHM9bmN4MUtjbG40ZnBxNFdscw/gaGGEKw/s3g6f08463b)

name: Eric Swalwell
subject: I’m calling for Kristi Noem’s resignation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress
body:
| Friend, I’m leading the call for Kristi Noem’s resignation. As the **senior-most Democrat on the House Homeland Security Committee** , I’ve seen a lot — but what Noem is doing at the Department of Homeland Security is beyond the pale. She deported a _4-year-old child battling cancer_. She detained a U.S. Marshal. She lied to Congress about Trump’s doctored photo of Kilmar Abrego Garcia. And she’s arrested one member of Congress and detained another just for speaking out against MAGA’s authoritarian regime. **Under her leadership, ICE agents are running around this country terrorizing families, masking their identities, and abusing their power at Noem’s behest.** **I’m demanding accountability — and her resignation. But I need your help.** [**While I fight to ensure Kristi Noem answers for her disregard for the rule of law on the Homeland Security Committee, will you split a contribution between me and Seth Moulton? I’m about to be in the middle of two high stakes investigations against Trump and his henchmen, so I need to be prepared to fight back no matter what they throw my way.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110501371/554540892/265156787?refcode=250629_MFC_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDhlOWU4NS0xNTU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nygPFVvGXTODM1_1LBpxma-8A-5zKdpRuiLZfW1HqPA=) [Donate](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110501372/554540893/-288956247?refcode=250629_MFC_Swalwell_Noem&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2NDhlOWU4NS0xNTU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=nygPFVvGXTODM1_1LBpxma-8A-5zKdpRuiLZfW1HqPA=) Democracy dies when we remain silent, friend. clean_body: | Friend, I’m leading the call for Kristi Noem’s resignation. As the senior-most Democrat on the House Homeland Security Committee , I’ve seen a lot — but what Noem is doing at the Department of Homeland Security is beyond the pale. She deported a 4-year-old child battling cancer. She detained a U.S. Marshal. She lied to Congress about Trump’s doctored photo of Kilmar Abrego Garcia. And she’s arrested one member of Congress and detained another just for speaking out against MAGA’s authoritarian regime. Under her leadership, ICE agents are running around this country terrorizing families, masking their identities, and abusing their power at Noem’s behest. I’m demanding accountability — and her resignation. But I need your help. = = Democracy dies when we remain silent, friend. Help me fight to protect the rule of law in this country and hold bad actors like Kristi Noem accountable. Thanks for having my back, Eric [content goes here] Seth Moulton for Congress PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States Paid for by Seth Moulton for Congress

##########################

Fellow Conservative,

This isn't any easy pill to swallow...

As recently as last month, we reached out to inform you of key polling that gave Republicans an 8-point lead over the Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But now, a brand new poll gives the __DEMOCRATS__ a **1-POINT** edge. _That 's a full 9-point swing!_

Like we've always said, we can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we'll LOSE to the Democrats.

And with the margins now as tight as 1 point - well within the MARGIN OF ERROR - every GOP voter profile matters.

_In fact, we 've identified YOUR profile as the difference maker in your zip code._

Peter,

People sometimes say that Maryland is a “blue state” — but that’s not
exactly true.

Two of the last four governors of Maryland have been Republicans. Just
three years ago we had a Republican governor. Reelecting Wes is no
guarantee, and with Republicans jumping into the governor’s race to beat
us, we can’t take anything for granted.

With just one day left until the end-of-quarter deadline, we need

name: Dan Goldman
subject: The fight against corruption
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York**
body:
|
#
---
There’s no way around it, Peter: President Trump has reached new levels of brazen corruption never before seen by a President of the United States. **But Trump is not entirely to blame for this problem.** Last week, I delivered a keynote speech at New York Law School centering on the overarching diminishing trust in elected officials in this country. As a former prosecutor and lead counsel for President Trump’s first impeachment, this is a topic I take very seriously because I’ve seen firsthand how public corruption, when left unchecked, can hollow out the rule of law from the inside. The title of my remarks was _Democracy on the Brink: Corruption and the Public Trust_. And the reality is,**that’s exactly where we are right now.** No president has disregarded the Constitution as routinely (or as brazenly) as Donald Trump. And I can think of no congressional majority that has so completely surrendered its power and independence to a president as this Republican House has. But too many Americans simply view all politicians as “corrupt.” They see members of Congress suspiciously trading stocks with impunity. They observe the Supreme Court whittle away the public corruption statute so that it covers nothing. That’s why I sold all of my individual stocks shortly after becoming a member of Congress. And it’s why I support legislation to ban all stock trading by members of Congress. **And it’s also why this week I introduced the _No Gratuities for Governing Act_ , which would specifically reverse a Supreme Court opinion that held it was permissible for an elected official to accept a “tip” after taking an official action to benefit the tipper.** I intend to lead by example to restore the public trust in elected officials. And in doing so, it will be easier to expose the egregious corruption of Donald Trump and his cronies. **[If you believe in my work and stand with me in the fight against corruption, I hope you’ll chip in to support me today:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110502631/554545104/916437137?refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250629_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBiNDMzNC0xYTU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUVOCvqvhdKeC1NeY3JzuZHs6glTJn98l8JXUOxTcxw=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [CHIP IN $10 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110502632/554545105/916437137?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=AU_DSG_FR_GEN_GEN_AC_20250629_AM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzEvMS85NDA4NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzYzBiNDMzNC0xYTU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=jUVOCvqvhdKeC1NeY3JzuZHs6glTJn98l8JXUOxTcxw=)

clean_body: | There’s no way around it, Peter: President Trump has reached new levels of brazen corruption never before seen by a President of the United States. But Trump is not entirely to blame for this problem. Last week, I delivered a keynote speech at New York Law School centering on the overarching diminishing trust in elected officials in this country. As a former prosecutor and lead counsel for President Trump’s first impeachment, this is a topic I take very seriously because I’ve seen firsthand how public corruption, when left unchecked, can hollow out the rule of law from the inside. The title of my remarks was Democracy on the Brink: Corruption and the Public Trust. And the reality is,that’s exactly where we are right now. No president has disregarded the Constitution as routinely (or as brazenly) as Donald Trump. And I can think of no congressional majority that has so completely surrendered its power and independence to a president as this Republican House has. But too many Americans simply view all politicians as “corrupt.” They see members of Congress suspiciously trading stocks with impunity. They observe the Supreme Court whittle away the public corruption statute so that it covers nothing. That’s why I sold all of my individual stocks shortly after becoming a member of Congress. And it’s why I support legislation to ban all stock trading by members of Congress. And it’s also why this week I introduced the No Gratuities for Governing Act , which would specifically reverse a Supreme Court opinion that held it was permissible for an elected official to accept a “tip” after taking an official action to benefit the tipper. I intend to lead by example to restore the public trust in elected officials. And in doing so, it will be easier to expose the egregious corruption of Donald Trump and his cronies. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for standing with me in this fight, Dan Dan Goldman for New York PO BOX 3306 New York, NY 10008 United States | mailto:info@dangoldmanforny.com | Paid for by Dan Goldman for New York

When they publish their numbers after tomorrow's deadline, the team can't show any signs of weakness in their fundraising. But it's not just about sending a message, as important as that is. It's also about having the resources they need to run a strong campaign, _especially_ with all the money sure to pour into the commonwealth as we draw closer to election year. At a time when DEI protections have been rolled back, Roe v. Wade has been overturned, and Medicaid and Social Security are in danger every day, we need real leaders (like my husband, Austin, and Governor Shapiro in Harrisburg!) who will fight for all of us. I feel lucky that Pennsylvania can look to our Lieutenant Governor and know he has our best interests at heart. I see it firsthand, every day, Peter. **Austin is so incredibly dedicated to making life better for everyone — it's one of the many things I admire about him. ** **[If, like me, you understand how important my husband's leadership is at such a critical moment in our history, would you consider pitching in a few dollars ahead of the deadline tomorrow? clean_body: Austin Davis is helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | = Hi Peter, I'm Blayre Holmes-Davis, the Second Lady of Pennsylvania and wife to Austin, and today, I'm reaching out because Austin and his team are up against their end-of-quarter deadline. When they publish their numbers after tomorrow's deadline, the team can't show any signs of weakness in their fundraising. But it's not just about sending a message, as important as that is. It's also about having the resources they need to run a strong campaign, especially with all the money sure to pour into the commonwealth as we draw closer to election year. At a time when DEI protections have been rolled back, Roe v. Wade has been overturned, and Medicaid and Social Security are in danger every day, we need real leaders (like my husband, Austin, and Governor Shapiro in Harrisburg!) who will fight for all of us. I feel lucky that Pennsylvania can look to our Lieutenant Governor and know he has our best interests at heart. I see it firsthand, every day, Peter. Austin is so incredibly dedicated to making life better for everyone — it's one of the many things I admire about him. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process now. | = | = | = | = | = | = Thanks for your support! Blayre * | | | ---|---|--- | get involved to support austin davis for PA Lieutenant Governor While serving as Lieutenant Governor, Austin Davis helped advance some of the most progressive changes the Commonwealth has seen in decades. Now, he's helping continue the progress we've made for Pennsylvanians by ensuring we keep Pennsylvania blue up and down the ballot. There’s so much on the line next year, and we need to show Trump that we’ve got the strength to fight back. $10 might not seem like a lot, but it can make a huge impact when the entire team chips in. **This is how movements are made, and we have a chance to show them what we’re made of NOW.**

[We’ve got a $10,000 goal to hit tomorrow at midnight. For over three decades, George Latimer has been a champion for progressive policies and leaders, helping lead the effort to make Westchester, a formerly solid Republican County, into a blue firewall that has withstood multiple red waves in recent years. George’s unparalleled track record in advancing Democratic goals includes successfully cutting regressive taxes, fighting for civil rights and racial equality, defending a woman’s right to choose, standing up to the NRA to keep guns off our streets, and voting for marriage equality.

| [](https://substack.com/redirect/9f7170b6-3814-408f-9acd-4ea6fd21883f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Last week I [wrote](https://substack.com/redirect/28f7276c-ce30-4aaf-af53-3383b0d42bd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) about the Pentagon Pizza Index, which for decades has seemingly predicted world events. The idea is to monitor DC-area pizza shops for spikes in business, the thinking being that a crisis would require late nights for those working in national security, and they would need to order something to eat.
The practice apparently originated with Soviet spies in the 1980's, who used to track pizza delivery cars, and journalists at the time also noted increases before the invasions of Grenada and Panama, respectively. After pizza deliveries to the Pentagon and Langley spiked the night before the U.S. invasion of Iraq in 1990, the concept broke out into the public imagination. At the time, CNN's Wolf Blitzer remarked, "Always monitor the pizzas."
* * *
## [Pizza's Power to Predict](https://substack.com/redirect/28f7276c-ce30-4aaf-af53-3383b0d42bd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
---
| | [Vikram Mansharamani](https://substack.com/profile/37278065-vikram-mansharamani)| | *
---|---|---
| Jun 21
[](https://substack.com/redirect/28f7276c-ce30-4aaf-af53-3383b0d42bd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[Recently, I've been intensely focused on all things pizza - a natural consequence of my having recently started a frozen pizza manufacturing business. Pizza news, the pizza market, anything affecting...](https://substack.com/redirect/28f7276c-ce30-4aaf-af53-3383b0d42bd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
| [| Read full story
---](https://substack.com/redirect/28f7276c-ce30-4aaf-af53-3383b0d42bd3?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
The idea caught my eye after the Israel attack on Iran earlier this month. The X [account](https://substack.com/redirect/c479c529-eccb-4828-ae2b-cf28b1f69825?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) Pentagon Pizza Report noted increased activity in pizza shops near the Pentagon; the attacks started the next day. And I had no sooner posted my article about this when pizza deliveries spiked [again](https://substack.com/redirect/832dece8-2c7e-4686-aa4a-f68a9ba9cb92?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). The U.S. bombed Iran soon thereafter.
In the wake of the U.S. bombing, pundits went into overdrive trying to predict what would happen next. There was a lot of hyperventilating about oil prices, the U.S. getting sucked into yet another war, a fractured MAGA base. But now that the dust has settled a bit - barely a week later - those concerns seem overwrought, at least for now.
Against the expectations of media, think tanks, and the foreign policy establishment - what Obama speechwriter Ben Rhodes sneeringly [referred](https://substack.com/redirect/32fb6800-b936-4aae-b4a7-eace812394ba?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) to as "The Blob" - the Trump Administration has seemingly pulled off what was thought to be impossible: the U.S. "[obliterated](https://substack.com/redirect/5ba49f36-5f84-4d37-8525-b9b88cfc5c3d?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" Iran's nuclear sites without escalating the conflict, and then negotiated a ceasefire. Oil [prices](https://substack.com/redirect/fcb7801e-ed2a-4b16-b664-1fa35c2d412c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) leveled off and the stock market saw [gains](https://substack.com/redirect/73c0c5bb-e01c-434c-9ec6-9813e35744af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) this week. Now the debate has moved on, and the media is [focused](https://substack.com/redirect/9ac17d0b-72d9-41d3-877d-b690ae2ef754?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) on whether Iran's nuclear capability [was](https://substack.com/redirect/dabfc616-a541-4474-896a-03d0d2bd2cc4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) "[obliterated](https://substack.com/redirect/203808e8-8078-402c-bba4-7436a633cf59?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)" or only set back a few [months](https://substack.com/redirect/5cb7aa1d-af08-4a0f-814c-a0a0b6fbe58f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg).
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..TidhbL4bwennXhtQSBx-d2m6Qns9UVF1UzmoWVkPpZE?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=167114717)
I have thought and written about Iran for years and my opinion on the matter has been unequivocally [clear](https://substack.com/redirect/a6bb73f0-42be-4072-a3d1-346f0d32a7bd?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg): Iran is an existential threat to U.S. interests and under no circumstances should it be allowed to develop nuclear weapons capability. Diplomacy and negotiation are always preferable, but if it requires kinetic action, then so be it.
I have also long predicted that such action would be necessary. After the October 7th attacks on Israel, I noted the potential for a wider escalation and [asked](https://substack.com/redirect/ed9cf255-7123-45e7-8783-dd0da0a144af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) if Israel - viewing Iran as an existential threat - would now attack Iran's enrichment facilities. I also predicted that the U.S. would back Israel and that we would join in on the attack.
**Iran is an existential threat to U.S. interests and under no circumstances should it be allowed to develop nuclear weapons capability.**
But my main concern has always been that the Israel-Iran conflict could end up as a proxy war between the U.S. and China. Both countries have vital interests at stake and are keen to diminish the influence of the other in the region. If the U.S. were to engage in military action, how high were the chances of an accidental conflagration? What if Chinese-supplied weapons shot down U.S. planes? Or if Chinese advisors were killed in U.S. strikes?
Think of the 2018 [incident](https://substack.com/redirect/5a0b059d-0870-4a0e-b35f-59533e72fb37?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) between the U.S. military and the Wagner Group in Syria. Pro-Assad forces - including Russian mercenaries - launched a major attack on a Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF) headquarters. U.S. Special Forces personnel were at the headquarters, and when they came under fire, they called in support. American gunships and artillery responded, decimating the attacking force; Russians were among the dead.
It's not hard to imagine an Archduke Franz Ferdinand-type situation that sparks a Sino-American crisis or another world war. (And for anyone looking for a good summer reading suggestion, I'd suggest Barbara Tuchman's Pultizer Prize-Winning _**[The Guns of August](https://substack.com/redirect/4d92f0bc-9f89-4342-bd62-469f2dd7fcdf?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). **_It is among my favorite history books and reads like a novel, providing a gripping account of the events that led to World War I.)
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/2813a0d5-c294-41d9-881b-e8b9c5983c90?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Source: Britannica [https://www.britannica.com/biography/Franz-Ferdinand-Archduke-of-Austria-Este](https://substack.com/redirect/77a671fa-c3ce-4bf1-87ac-775f33c61ad6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
None of this seems likely to happen as of now, but I am reminded of a [scene](https://substack.com/redirect/2d935dbc-c5c8-4761-b49a-76112d0e410c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg) at the end of Charlie Wilson's War. As Charlie Wilson (played by Tom Hanks) exults at the defeat of the Russians and their withdrawal from Afghanistan, CIA operative Gust Avrakotos (played by Phillip Seymour Hoffman) tells him the story of the little boy and the Zen Master, which I paraphrase here:
The boy got a horse for his birthday and everyone in the village said, "How wonderful!"
The Zen Master said, "We'll see."
Then the boy fell off his horse and broke his leg, and all of the people in the village said, "How horrible!"
The Zen Master said, "We'll see."
Then a war broke out and all of the boys in the village go off to fight but the boy doesn't because he has a broken leg. All of the people in the village think he is lucky, but the Zen Master says, "We'll see."
[](https://substack.com/redirect/3da67a37-5c73-402e-a642-3b30aac22252?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
So...has a crisis been adverted? Did the U.S. destroy Iran's ability to build nuclear weapons? Did the U.S. really avoid getting sucked into another war? Will the ceasefire hold? Is Iran going to accept its fate and not engage in significant retaliatory attacks or activate sleeper cells? Has the Middle Eastern power map been rewritten? Has a U.S.-China proxy war been adverted?
For now, the answers seem to be yes.
But we'll see.

**VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI** is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. **He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza**. _LinkedIn_ has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and _Worth_ profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, _**[The Making of a Generalist: An Independent Thinker Finds Unconventional Success in an Uncertain World](https://substack.com/redirect/2c1e631f-9f8d-4130-a76a-35fb1ffe450f?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ , _**[Think for Yourself: Restoring Common Sense in an Age of Experts and Artificial Intelligence](https://substack.com/redirect/74038aa7-5f48-4c1b-9d4d-615f7b33168c?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_ and _**[Boombustology: Spotting Financial Bubbles Before They Burst](https://substack.com/redirect/39760bd4-55c7-451f-9625-3b4b03d9d7c4?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**_. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing.
You're currently a free subscriber to [Navigating Uncertainty](https://substack.com/redirect/03cfea35-cc1f-4e58-98b7-0bcbf1fbe689?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg). clean_body: How Charlie Wilson's War helps explain my outlook for the Middle East | | ---|---|--- | | | Forwarded this email? ? for more ? How Charlie Wilson's War helps explain my outlook for the Middle East | | | Jun 29 | | | | | | | | | | | | | | ---|---|--- Last week I about the Pentagon Pizza Index, which for decades has seemingly predicted world events. The idea is to monitor DC-area pizza shops for spikes in business, the thinking being that a crisis would require late nights for those working in national security, and they would need to order something to eat. The practice apparently originated with Soviet spies in the 1980's, who used to track pizza delivery cars, and journalists at the time also noted increases before the invasions of Grenada and Panama, respectively. After pizza deliveries to the Pentagon and Langley spiked the night before the U.S. invasion of Iraq in 1990, the concept broke out into the public imagination. At the time, CNN's Wolf Blitzer remarked, "Always monitor the pizzas." | | | | ---|---|--- | Jun 21 | The idea caught my eye after the Israel attack on Iran earlier this month. The X Pentagon Pizza Report noted increased activity in pizza shops near the Pentagon; the attacks started the next day. And I had no sooner posted my article about this when pizza deliveries spiked . The U.S. bombed Iran soon thereafter. In the wake of the U.S. bombing, pundits went into overdrive trying to predict what would happen next. There was a lot of hyperventilating about oil prices, the U.S. getting sucked into yet another war, a fractured MAGA base. But now that the dust has settled a bit - barely a week later - those concerns seem overwrought, at least for now. Against the expectations of media, think tanks, and the foreign policy establishment - what Obama speechwriter Ben Rhodes sneeringly to as "The Blob" - the Trump Administration has seemingly pulled off what was thought to be impossible: the U.S. "" Iran's nuclear sites without escalating the conflict, and then negotiated a ceasefire. Oil leveled off and the stock market saw this week. Now the debate has moved on, and the media is on whether Iran's nuclear capability "" or only set back a few . I have thought and written about Iran for years and my opinion on the matter has been unequivocally : Iran is an existential threat to U.S. interests and under no circumstances should it be allowed to develop nuclear weapons capability. Diplomacy and negotiation are always preferable, but if it requires kinetic action, then so be it. I have also long predicted that such action would be necessary. After the October 7th attacks on Israel, I noted the potential for a wider escalation and if Israel - viewing Iran as an existential threat - would now attack Iran's enrichment facilities. I also predicted that the U.S. would back Israel and that we would join in on the attack. Iran is an existential threat to U.S. interests and under no circumstances should it be allowed to develop nuclear weapons capability. But my main concern has always been that the Israel-Iran conflict could end up as a proxy war between the U.S. and China. Both countries have vital interests at stake and are keen to diminish the influence of the other in the region. If the U.S. were to engage in military action, how high were the chances of an accidental conflagration? What if Chinese-supplied weapons shot down U.S. planes? Or if Chinese advisors were killed in U.S. strikes? Think of the 2018 between the U.S. military and the Wagner Group in Syria. Pro-Assad forces - including Russian mercenaries - launched a major attack on a Syrian Democratic Forces (SDF) headquarters. U.S. Special Forces personnel were at the headquarters, and when they came under fire, they called in support. American gunships and artillery responded, decimating the attacking force; Russians were among the dead. It's not hard to imagine an Archduke Franz Ferdinand-type situation that sparks a Sino-American crisis or another world war. (And for anyone looking for a good summer reading suggestion, I'd suggest Barbara Tuchman's Pultizer Prize-Winning . It is among my favorite history books and reads like a novel, providing a gripping account of the events that led to World War I.) | | ---|---|--- Source: Britannica None of this seems likely to happen as of now, but I am reminded of a at the end of Charlie Wilson's War. As Charlie Wilson (played by Tom Hanks) exults at the defeat of the Russians and their withdrawal from Afghanistan, CIA operative Gust Avrakotos (played by Phillip Seymour Hoffman) tells him the story of the little boy and the Zen Master, which I paraphrase here: The boy got a horse for his birthday and everyone in the village said, "How wonderful!" The Zen Master said, "We'll see." Then the boy fell off his horse and broke his leg, and all of the people in the village said, "How horrible!" The Zen Master said, "We'll see." Then a war broke out and all of the boys in the village go off to fight but the boy doesn't because he has a broken leg. All of the people in the village think he is lucky, but the Zen Master says, "We'll see." So...has a crisis been adverted? Did the U.S. destroy Iran's ability to build nuclear weapons? Did the U.S. really avoid getting sucked into another war? Will the ceasefire hold? Is Iran going to accept its fate and not engage in significant retaliatory attacks or activate sleeper cells? Has the Middle Eastern power map been rewritten? Has a U.S.-China proxy war been adverted? For now, the answers seem to be yes. But we'll see. | | ---|---|--- VIKRAM MANSHARAMANI is an entrepreneur, consultant, scholar, neighbor, husband, father, volunteer, and professional generalist who thinks in multiple-dimensions and looks beyond the short-term. Self-taught to think around corners and connect original dots, he spends his time speaking with global leaders in business, government, academia, and journalism. He 's currently the Chairman and CEO of Goodwell Foods, a manufacturer of private label frozen pizza. LinkedIn has twice listed him as its #1 Top Voice in Money & Finance, and Worth profiled him as one of the 100 Most Powerful People in Global Finance. Vikram earned a PhD From MIT, has taught at Yale and Harvard, and is the author of three books, , and **. Vikram lives in Lincoln, New Hampshire with his wife and two children, where they can usually be found hiking or skiing. You're currently a free subscriber to . For the full experience, | | | | | | | (C) 2025 Kelan Publishing, LLC PO BOX 932, Lincoln, NH 03251 ? ?

Under Donald Trump’s lead, ultra-MAGA Republicans have gone beyond conspiracy theories – they’re openly attacking the foundations of our democracy. By trying to discredit our elections, threatening election workers, and laying the groundwork to overturn future results, they’re steering the country toward something that looks a lot like authoritarianism. **Even President Obama is calling out these attacks:** [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110502849/554546118/-209663064?refcode=em-6.29.25-all-rs&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS84OTkxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZmQyN2YzYy0xYjU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=DnvkosgtpcsLAC71ic9jbqYa5F4xMCIqo--mp-WwbJA=) And in 2026, with 26 Secretary of State races on the ballot, that fight comes to the states. These elections could determine whether trusted public servants or MAGA loyalists are in charge the next time our democracy is on the line – including the 2028 presidential election. We need to be ready for whatever comes. #

It’s clear who funds Republicans’ campaigns, Peter. It’s the same billionaires whose taxes they're currently trying to cut by coming after Medicaid, SNAP, public education, and more. But Mazie? Her fight for working families and against Donald Trump is fueled by thousands of everyday Americans like you. In fact, our average online contribution amount is just **$13.62!** That says a lot about this campaign, Peter. We may not raise millions of dollars from billionaires and wealthy donors like they do, but we do have something they don’t — **grassroots passion. ** This team has shown up every time we’ve needed it to support Mazie’s work in standing up to Donald Trump’s reckless agenda and fighting to flip the Senate blue during the 2026 midterm elections. name: Marjorie Taylor Greene
subject: I won’t be quiet about this
body:
Republicans are failing President Trump.
| | | | Friend,

I’m writing you with bad news. Republicans in Congress who secretly despise President Trump are stymieing his agenda and sneaking poison pills into his signature legislation.
**Let me be clear: I love President Trump and I’ve been behind him 100% every day for the last 10 years.**
But what we’re seeing right now is not President Trump’s agenda, it’s the neocons and RINOs taking advantage of the broken system in Washington.
Just this week the far-left Senate Parliamentarian stripped some of the most important language from the Big Beautiful Bill which means it will continue funding sex changes on kids, Medicare and Medicaid for illegal immigrants, and strips the ability of states to regulate the use of AI for 10 years.
Six months ago I was so excited and felt like we could do anything with full Republican control of the government, _now it feels like there is nothing we can do._
**But I’m not ready to give up, even with the neocons and RINOs trying to take me out.**
---

clean_body: Republicans are failing President Trump. | | | | Friend, I’m writing you with bad news. Republicans in Congress who secretly despise President Trump are stymieing his agenda and sneaking poison pills into his signature legislation. Let me be clear: I love President Trump and I’ve been behind him 100% every day for the last 10 years. But what we’re seeing right now is not President Trump’s agenda, it’s the neocons and RINOs taking advantage of the broken system in Washington. Just this week the far-left Senate Parliamentarian stripped some of the most important language from the Big Beautiful Bill which means it will continue funding sex changes on kids, Medicare and Medicaid for illegal immigrants, and strips the ability of states to regulate the use of AI for 10 years. Six months ago I was so excited and felt like we could do anything with full Republican control of the government, now it feels like there is nothing we can do. But I’m not ready to give up, even with the neocons and RINOs trying to take me out. . The Uniparty sees President Trump and America First as a speedbump, and they are pretending to be MAGA just long enough to get back to business as usual in Washington. . Thank you, | | Marjorie Taylor Greene

##########################

Fellow Conservative,

This isn't any easy pill to swallow...

As recently as last month, we reached out to inform you of key polling that gave Republicans an 8-point lead over the Democrats for control of the House and Senate.

But now, a brand new poll gives the __DEMOCRATS__ a **1-POINT** edge. _That 's a full 9-point swing!_

Like we've always said, we can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we'll LOSE to the Democrats.

And with the margins now as tight as 1 point - well within the MARGIN OF ERROR - every GOP voter profile matters.

_In fact, we 've identified YOUR profile as the difference maker in your zip code._

clean_body: ########################## Fellow Conservative, This isn't any easy pill to swallow... As recently as last month, we reached out to inform you of key polling that gave Republicans an 8-point lead over the Democrats for control of the House and Senate. But now, a brand new poll gives the DEMOCRATS a 1-POINT edge. That 's a full 9-point swing! Like we've always said, we can have the best polls and the highest enthusiasm, but without a complete and verified voter census from every state in the nation, we'll LOSE to the Democrats. And with the margins now as tight as 1 point - well within the MARGIN OF ERROR - every GOP voter profile matters. In fact, we 've identified YOUR profile as the difference maker in your zip code. name: Dr. Ami Bera
subject: $4,962 to go — here’s why it matters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bera for Congress
body:
| Peter,

Republicans in Washington are once again pushing a budget that would slash Medicaid — and if they succeed, the consequences will be felt right here in California.

**Medi-Cal, our state’s Medicaid program, helps over 15 million Californians access the care they need.** Cuts at the federal level would mean fewer providers, longer wait times, and real harm for working families, seniors, and children.

This is personal for me. As a doctor, I’ve treated patients who depend on Medi-Cal — and I know the difference this program makes in people’s lives. That’s why this FEC deadline is so critical. We’re still **$4,962 short** of our goal, and our numbers will show whether we’re ready to take on this fight and win.
