clean_body: | Peter— Seattle Pride was the first Pride event I ever attended. Twenty years ago, I had just come out, and I decided to volunteer at the festival while I was home from college. Today, I led the Seattle Pride parade as its Grand Marshall. It was a full-circle moment that I think my 19-year-old self would be proud of. Today’s celebration was also a powerful reminder of just how important and impactful it is to be with community. Queer joy is an act of resistance, something worth celebrating and nurturing, perhaps more now than ever. Since my very first Pride, so much has changed. Our region, like many others, has seen a proliferation of Pride celebrations and Pride clubs and GSAs in schools – young people today have grown up with marriage equality as the law of the land. But today queer communities everywhere are facing attack after attack. 597 anti-LGBTQ bills have been introduced in state legislatures across the US in the first six months of this year. The Republican-controlled Supreme Court just upheld Tennessee’s Ban on health care for trans Americans. The Trump Administration is withholding federal funding from states that do safeguard queer communities. These are serious threats. As the first openly LGBTQ+ person to represent Washington in Congress, and a co-chair of the Equality Caucus, I am doing everything in my power to fight back. We won’t let MAGA extremists write the rules for our future. Not when we have the power to shape it ourselves, not when we fight on with hope and determination. I was honored to sit down with Bree Coven from the Seattle Times a few weeks back to talk about this fight, what Pride means to me, and more. Onward! –Emily💙 If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = | | Paid for by Emily Randall for Congress Emily Randall for Congress P.O. Box 1883 Port Orchard, WA 98366 United States | | If you would like to receive only our most important messages, . AP: Georgia Supreme Court overturns some election rules, curbing State Election Board’s power [https://secure.everyaction.com/Z31SNww9Q0CZWIdx46cuSQ2?am=25.00&contactdata=A4ekAVLB6uQYsrpfawTmZ38uJhTOW+N4WpobQO+u4ahgJvB1BhBzAZvcAt4yGearw41XPUfoYFNFL1vRSwAFxjx137qOUspdkDxMHoJwjN8=]
A great update from Georgia, everyone: Georgia’s highest court overturned four rules passed by the State Election Board just before last year’s general election, ruling the board overstepped its authority and intruded on lawmaking power reserved for legislators under the state constitution.
To refresh your memory: The State Election Board passed a slate of controversial new rules in August and September of 2024, including requirements that ballots be hand-counted after the close of polls, that someone delivering an absentee ballot in person provide a signature and photo ID, that county election board members be allowed to conduct a “ reasonable inquiry ” before certifying results, and that county election board members be granted broad access to election-related documents.
These new rules brought an outcry that the board’s majority was trying to improperly use its power to help MAGA candidates and follow disproved conspiracy theories about our elections.
The state Supreme Court’s unanimous decision to overturn these highly partisan, suppressive rules limits the ability of the State Election Board and other executive branch agencies of Georgia’s government to try and put their fingers on the scales and tip elections their way.

#

Hey everybody, Mark Kelly here.
In two days, we’re going to hit our end-of-quarter deadline. The second of the year, with only five to go before next year’s mid-term elections.
**FIRST:**
Mark won some of the most competitive elections in the country in 2020 and 2022 without taking a cent from corporate PACs. Millions of people donated. We’re proud of that fact, and you should be, too.

**THEN:**
Trump and our opponents absolutely pummeled Mark through both of those campaigns. He had hundreds of millions of dollars spent against him in 2020 and 2022, and Trump personally attacked Mark.

**NOW:**
Mark is at the same place he’s been his entire life. On the frontline, defending our democracy, serving where he can make the most difference. And Trump’s allies are going after him for it, which means he needs our help.
The attacks Mark receives every day from the MAGA Right and Trump’s top operatives are serious.
But none of that is going to stop Mark from defending our democracy and taking the fight to Trump when it really matters. If you understand how important it is that somebody like Mark is working to turn the tide against Trump, we’re humbly asking you:

name: GOTV PAC
subject: Meet Kacey Carnegie
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email6252025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email6252025&amount=25]
Peter,
You’ve heard us talk about how we’re investing in 17 incredible Democratic candidates running for the Virginia House of Delegates this year. It’s all part of our mission to protect the Democrats’ one-seat majority and to ensure a strong turnout across the Commonwealth that will help us win critical statewide offices.
Well, today, we want to introduce you to one of those candidates: Kacey Carnegie, running to flip District 89, one of the most competitive districts in Virginia.
Kacey is a mom of two with kids in the Chesapeake public school system, and she’s running because she knows what working families are up against and is ready to make real change. She’s fighting for affordable childcare, safer neighborhoods, well-trained first responders, and public schools where every child feels safe and supported.
She’s not a career politician. She’s a public school parent, a community advocate, and someone who shows up when it counts. And right now, we need to show up for her.
Republicans are scrambling to save this seat because they know how high the stakes are. So, will you split a donation between Kacey Carnegie and GOTV PAC to help flip District 89 and protect our majority? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/got-kc-2025?refcode=em06292025&amount=25]
Split a donation now » [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/got-kc-2025?refcode=em06292025&amount=25]
This is how we build a better future and Democratic Party -- by lifting up people like Kacey who are ready to lead with compassion, courage, and common sense.
Thanks for being part of this work.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06242025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email06242025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email6272025&amount=25]
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]
PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
GOTV PAC
712 H St NE
PMB 96591
Washington, DC 20002
United States
Get Out the Vote PAC is registered with the Federal Election Commission as a hybrid Political Action Committee (PAC) with FEC ID C00839407. Our mission is to Flip the House by supporting targeted Congressional districts and down-ballot races within those districts. Our internal research evidences that the impact of a Dollar invested in this manner amplifies the top and bottom of the ticket.

name: SIGN THE THANK YOU CARD (via VPP)
subject: your signature is the only one missing!!!!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
we’ve reopened our letter for one more hour!
| | **_TIME-SENSITIVE FOLLOW UP FOR: YOU_** Hi there, you were personally chosen as a top Democrat to represent your state in our letter to Rep. Hakeem Jeffries!

Unfortunately, our records indicate you’re the only supporter left who hasn’t responded – we’re hoping this is a mistake!

**We’ve reopened the letter for ONE MORE HOUR to ensure you have a chance to sign.** [**Add your name ASAP »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=6&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7) | [**LAST CHANCE TO SIGN THE LETTER »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=7&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7)
---
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
**_Hakeem Jeffries Launches Day of Action:_
“Push Back Against the Diabolical Republican Scheme to Enact the _Largest_ Medicaid Cut in History!”**
Leader Jeffries is calling EVERY Democrat to action — but we’re still missing critical support in your state.

**So we’re giving you an exclusive chance to join the fight:** [**Sign our letter thanking Hakeem Jeffries for his hard work and answer his urgent call to action NOW! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=8&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7)
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=9&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7)
[**Donate $3 to sign the card now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=10&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7)
---
TO: Minority Leader Hakeem Jeffries
FROM: A proud Democrat
Subject: We’re so grateful for your leadership! **_Dear Rep. Jeffries – you make me proud to be a Democrat._**

House Republicans have been nothing more than puppets for Donald Trump: GUTTING Medicaid, THREATENING Social Security, and making Trump a KING!!

I’m so grateful to have you leading the charge to defend our democracy, and for never backing down in the face of MAGA attacks.

**So today, I’m answering your call to action to make sure we flip the House in the midterms and STOP Trump in his tracks!**

[**I’m signing this card and chipping in $3 to the Voter Protection Project to join your critical fight and to help Democrats flip the 3 seats we need to take back control! »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=11&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7) [](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=12&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7) | [**Donate $3 to sign now »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/91464?t=13&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7)
---
**_X A grateful Democrat_**
Thanks so much for signing!

\- The Voter Protection Project
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=14&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=20438%2E878179%2Eq-J7Z7)

name: Katie Porter for Governor
subject: This month is different
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
body:
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/21486?t=1&akid=39846%2E3422442%2ETrr4qx)
Dear Derek,
Every month, our team works with Katie to set fundraising targets that keep us on track to raising the resources we need to win.
**[Our June goal is $100,000. Can you chip in $5 to help us get there?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250629_2_ak?refcode=em20250629-39846&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39846_3422442_Trr4qx&akid=39846%2E3422442%2ETrr4qx)**
**This month is also a little different than usual, because our goal isn’t just internal.** By law, we have to publicly report how much our campaign has raised through June 30th. That means that everyone can see—and judge—whether we have a path to victory.
We need all hands on deck for the next couple of days.
If we miss our target, pundits and outside groups will get louder about their doubts on whether we can win. _But this is also an opportunity_ —if we can post our strongest month of fundraising yet, it can send a clear message that our momentum is picking up and will carry us all the way to a victory next year.
**[Derek, we’re so grateful to have you in our corner. If you can, will you donate $5 before midnight tomorrow to help us hit our goal?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_ms_kp_20250629_2_ak?refcode=em20250629-39846&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&refcode2=39846_3422442_Trr4qx&akid=39846%2E3422442%2ETrr4qx)**
Thanks for being with us,
Team KP

Katie is running to be California’s next governor because California and our country need a leader who will stand up to Trump to lower costs, protect our rights, and combat climate change. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4g-em-footer?refcode=em20250629-39846&amounts=&t=3&refcode2=39846_3422442_Trr4qx&akid=39846%2E3422442%2ETrr4qx)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4g-emails?source=39846&t=4&akid=39846%2E3422442%2ETrr4qx)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4g-em-update-info-footer?source=39846)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4g-unsubscribe?source=39846&t=5&akid=39846%2E3422442%2ETrr4qx)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Governor 2026
PO Box 5176, Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)
Paid for by Katie Porter for Governor 2026
FFPC #1479597

name: Tim Kaine
subject: We have a real shot to flip Virginia this November
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Friends:
Amid everything going on in Washington, D.C. and around the country and world, here in Virginia we’re also in the thick of election season — and it’s a critically important one.
This November, we have the first major opportunity to not only flip Virginia’s statewide leadership blue, but also send a strong and clear message that Democrats are fired up and ready to win in the midterms.
Virginia Dems have picked a great ticket in Abigail Spanberger, Ghazala Hashmi and Jay Jones, and I’m glad to be supporting their campaigns along with those of so many great Democrats down the ticket.
We are unified and battle-tested going into the fall. Our mission: Sweep statewide offices and grow our majority in the House of Delegates!
But we can’t do this without an upswell of grassroots support. At the end of the day, candidates don’t win campaigns — the *people* do. The people who vote, the people who volunteer, and the people who chip in when they can.
Before Monday’s end-of-quarter filing deadline, will you chip in $25 to my Common Ground PAC that’s on the ground working to win in Virginia? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
If you’ve saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=50]
DONATE $100 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025?express_lane=true&amount=100]
DONATE OTHER [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
Thank you so much for anything you can give.
Together, we will win!
-Tim Kaine
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]
CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em-cgp-2025]

1490-5A Quarterpath Road #272
Williamsburg, VA 23185
Emails like this one are a critical part of staying in touch during this important election year. We value your support, and are so glad to have you on the team. name: Laura Gillen HQ
subject: Laura asked us to reach out to you
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by Gillen for NY
body:
Laura asked us to quickly follow up on her message about tomorrow’s June FEC deadline.

| Laura asked us to quickly follow up on her message about tomorrow’s June FEC deadline. We’re seeing a great response so far, but we still need to raise $4,376 more today to stay on track.

If we don’t hit our goal, we risk giving Republicans an opening to flip this seat. A fired-up Tom Homan **[took the mic from President Donald Trump](https://substack.com/redirect/c2392050-e465-47e4-8d76-fad62ddf5c10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** during a rally to promote the Big Beautiful Bill, strongly defending the president's deportation efforts and scolding Democrats for opposing provisions to give ICE more resources.
_" Who the hell would be against that?!!" _
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c2392050-e465-47e4-8d76-fad62ddf5c10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
[](https://substack.com/redirect/c2392050-e465-47e4-8d76-fad62ddf5c10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
"You know I wasn't going to do this but I see Tom Homan sitting there and I have to call him up,... this guy is keeping us very, very safe," Trump told the crowd, inviting Homan to the podium.
**["This issue with the Big Beautiful Bill should be non-partisan,](https://substack.com/redirect/c2392050-e465-47e4-8d76-fad62ddf5c10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** what the hell is wrong with everybody up in congress?!" Homan said. "People are dying every day. ICE is arresting 3 times as many criminals as the Biden administration did,... we over 600,000 illegal aliens with criminal histories walking the streets, we got less than 5,000 deportation officers. This should be a no-brainer!"
"The more resources we get, we get more agents on the road,... **[more agents mean more bad guys arrested!"](https://substack.com/redirect/c2392050-e465-47e4-8d76-fad62ddf5c10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** he continued. "Who the hell would be against that?! I get frustrated, I get pissed off because I'm sick ofmmeeting angel moms and dads!"
Watch Homan go off at the Democrats opposing Trump's legislation:
[Click To Watch Video](https://substack.com/redirect/c2392050-e465-47e4-8d76-fad62ddf5c10?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
* * *
**[Together with Goldco](https://substack.com/redirect/3930c298-0d76-4f87-99b0-9ed53b77ce83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
# **[Trump's Push For America First](https://substack.com/redirect/3930c298-0d76-4f87-99b0-9ed53b77ce83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/3930c298-0d76-4f87-99b0-9ed53b77ce83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
What we are seeing right now is truly historic.
President Trump has been pushing the limits on what is possible. I haven't seen anything like this since President Ronald Reagan.
But with this unbelievable push for an American First agenda, comes a few problems. Well, as President Trump said in a recent interview I had with him...
"There could be a little disruption. What we're doing is building a foundation for the future."
If you want to learn more about **[Trump's Great American Reset](https://substack.com/redirect/3930c298-0d76-4f87-99b0-9ed53b77ce83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**, go ahead read this **[great article](https://substack.com/redirect/3930c298-0d76-4f87-99b0-9ed53b77ce83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** that just went up. It's filled with some valuable information about what's in store for America, and what we could potentially be up against.
**[Read The Great American Reset now.](https://substack.com/redirect/3930c298-0d76-4f87-99b0-9ed53b77ce83?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
Yours Truly,
**SEAN HANNITY**

* * *
# NYC socialist candidate doubles down on plan to tax "richer and whiter" areas more
Socialist mayoral candidate **[Zohran Mamdani defended his plan](https://substack.com/redirect/fbdf74c6-4040-4003-8afe-9c5e682926c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)** Sunday to raise property taxes on "richer and whiter neighborhoods" and said billionaires shouldn't exist, while again refusing to condemn the phrase "globalize the intifada" despite pressure from fellow Democrats who called the language unacceptable.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/fbdf74c6-4040-4003-8afe-9c5e682926c6?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
* **The socialist mayoral candidate claimed his proposal is "not driven by race"** but is merely "an assessment of what neighborhoods are being under-taxed versus over-taxed," arguing he's "just naming things as they are" while acknowledging the city's shrinking tax base.
* **The candidate said billionaires shouldn't exist and dismissed concerns about losing business support** \- When asked about billionaire John Catsimatidis threatening to sell his Gristedes stores if Mamdani wins, the Democratic nominee said "I don't think we should have billionaires, frankly" in a city that's home to 123 billionaires, prompting Catsimatidis to call him "the Fidel Castro of New York."
* **Mamdani again refused to condemn the phrase "globalize the intifada" despite pressure from fellow Democrats** \- When asked three times by the host to condemn the phrase many consider a call to harm Jews, Mamdani said he doesn't use that language but won't "police speech," while House Democratic Leader Hakeem Jeffries called it "not acceptable phrasing" that Mamdani must clarify.
* **He expressed confidence about winning the November general election against multiple opponents** \- Mamdani will face incumbent Mayor Eric Adams (running as an independent), Republican Curtis Sliwa, potentially Andrew Cuomo on an independent line, and independent Jim Walden, framing the race as "a referendum" on Adams making the city "so unaffordable."

* * *
# Satellite images show activity occurring at struck Iran nuclear sites
New satellite images show significant damage and ongoing activity at Iran's underground Fordow uranium enrichment facility, **[Fox News reports.](https://substack.com/redirect/60d1c0e6-4d16-4fc4-bf9d-63f49016a7af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/60d1c0e6-4d16-4fc4-bf9d-63f49016a7af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
(Satellite image (C)2025 Maxar Technologies)
* **Maxar Technologies imagery reveals excavators, personnel, and cranes** working near the northern shaft entrance following U.S. bunker-buster strikes on June 22 and Israeli follow-up strikes on June 23 that targeted access roads.
* **The strikes appear designed to hinder access and complicate repair efforts rather than just destroy the facility** \- Analysts believe the primary goal was to make the underground complex harder to reach and repair, with satellite photos showing six prominent craters, scattered debris, destroyed facilities, and damaged access routes around the mountain site near Qom.
* **Military officials acknowledge severe damage but say full assessment will take time** \- Gen. Dan Caine confirmed that all three Iranian nuclear sites "sustained extremely severe damage and destruction," while both the U.S. and Israel maintain the strikes were aimed at hindering Iran's nuclear weapons development, which Tehran denies, claiming its program is peaceful.

body:
Jason Crow For Congress [https://nvlupin.blob.core.windows.net/images/van/NGP/NGP21/1/88523/images/logoJC%20(1).png]
Team, we have some bad news to share today:

With just a few days left in the fundraising quarter, we’re at risk of falling short of our major end-of-quarter fundraising goal.

We're not going to scare you into donating or tell you the sky is falling — it’s not.

But presenting a strong public fundraising report at the end of this quarter is the best way to show that we have what it takes to win back the House in 2026 — and that Jason’s important work to do so is already in motion.

As the Democratic Congressional Campaign Committee’s new Recruitment Co-Chair, Jason is supporting campaigns to elect true servant leaders to the House.

This work is vital, so we need to keep Jason focused on electing the Democratic leaders of tomorrow — not fundraising. That’s how we’ll keep our momentum toward progress going full speed ahead.

Here’s the good news: if everyone on this team pitched in as little as $1, we’d catch up in no time.

Will you support Jason’s work with a donation of $1 or more today? Every dollar helps us reach our goal and fuel our fight for the future. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jc-em-june2025?amount=1]

name: Eric H. Holder, Jr.
subject: Civil Rights should not be partisan
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE NATIONAL REDISTRICTING ACTION FUND
body:
Let’s talk about the Department of Justice.
|
---

Peter,
Every generation of Americans is ultimately called upon to defend democracy — to bring our nation closer to its founding ideals. Now is our time.
Leading the fair maps movement requires ongoing vigilance and sustained investment from **all of us,[and we hope you’ll join us in powering this movement with a donation to All On The Line.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110508737/554566595/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOQ2_email_20250628-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250628-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGEOQ2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0NTMwYjY0LTM0NTUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dM5AfeyE4kW7-9pRC1KPIQk6Udnc5RTXCLCwx0Ks6is=) **
[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110508738/554566596/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOQ2_email_20250628-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250628-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGEOQ2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0NTMwYjY0LTM0NTUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dM5AfeyE4kW7-9pRC1KPIQk6Udnc5RTXCLCwx0Ks6is=)
---
The fact is that, right now, the foundations of our democracy are being pushed to the edge in more ways than one.
As someone who spent the majority of my career at the Department of Justice — from line lawyer to U.S. Attorney, Deputy Attorney General, and ultimately Attorney General — **it absolutely tears me apart** to see the current administration wreaking havoc upon this institution. They have gone as far as dismantling the Civil Rights Division.
In so many ways, the Civil Rights Division is the conscience of the Justice Department. Without it, our freedoms are at risk — especially as far-right extremists make it clear they’re working to undermine democracy and thwart fair representation.
Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to undermine the fundamental right of Americans to have their voices heard.
Having the Justice Department enforce civil rights protections, including upholding the Voting Rights Act, has been foundational to the promise of American democracy. Now, we are seeing the Department used as a tool to empower an anti-democracy minority.
**So while the Department of Justice retreats from its duty, we the people cannot. The work we’re doing to strengthen and protect democracy is critical.**
All On The Line and our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), are on the frontlines of the ongoing struggle to ensure that voters can participate in a democracy that’s truly and fairly representative.
From fighting for fair maps in courtrooms to combating anti-democracy legislation in state legislatures — from mobilizing volunteers against gerrymandering to equipping voters with the information they need to make their voices heard — our movement rallies Americans to ensure fair elections and fair representation.
[**At the end of the day, it comes down to the power of the American people. Together, we can defend our democracy — and we must. **](https://click.everyaction.com/k/110508739/554566597/302038796?refcode=don_aotl_tier1_email_AGEOQ2_email_20250628-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2-EHH_&utm_source=email&utm_medium=email&utm_term=don&utm_content=20250628-AOTL-Tier1-AGEOQ2-EHH_&utm_campaign=AGEOQ2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxMy8xLzg5Mjk2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjI0NTMwYjY0LTM0NTUtZjAxMS04ZjdjLTYwNDViZGZlOGU5YyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dM5AfeyE4kW7-9pRC1KPIQk6Udnc5RTXCLCwx0Ks6is=)

clean_body: Let’s talk about the Department of Justice. | Peter, Every generation of Americans is ultimately called upon to defend democracy — to bring our nation closer to its founding ideals. Now is our time. Leading the fair maps movement requires ongoing vigilance and sustained investment from all of us,= = The fact is that, right now, the foundations of our democracy are being pushed to the edge in more ways than one. As someone who spent the majority of my career at the Department of Justice — from line lawyer to U.S. Attorney, Deputy Attorney General, and ultimately Attorney General — it absolutely tears me apart to see the current administration wreaking havoc upon this institution. They have gone as far as dismantling the Civil Rights Division. In so many ways, the Civil Rights Division is the conscience of the Justice Department. Without it, our freedoms are at risk — especially as far-right extremists make it clear they’re working to undermine democracy and thwart fair representation. Whether it's through onerous voting requirements, partisan gerrymanders, or attempting to use courts to invalidate legitimate election results, the goal is the same — to undermine the fundamental right of Americans to have their voices heard. Having the Justice Department enforce civil rights protections, including upholding the Voting Rights Act, has been foundational to the promise of American democracy. Now, we are seeing the Department used as a tool to empower an anti-democracy minority. So while the Department of Justice retreats from its duty, we the people cannot. The work we’re doing to strengthen and protect democracy is critical. All On The Line and our affiliate, the National Redistricting Foundation (NRF), are on the frontlines of the ongoing struggle to ensure that voters can participate in a democracy that’s truly and fairly representative. From fighting for fair maps in courtrooms to combating anti-democracy legislation in state legislatures — from mobilizing volunteers against gerrymandering to equipping voters with the information they need to make their voices heard — our movement rallies Americans to ensure fair elections and fair representation. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | = = | = = | = Thank you, Eric H. Holder, Jr. 82nd Attorney General of the United States is the grassroots advocacy campaign supported by the National Redistricting Action Fund. Support our work to end gerrymandering. 🔴Polls show my race is _TIED_ , Fellow American❗
---
| | I have an important update for you, Fellow American. Poll after poll shows that my race for Governor is a toss-up!

The stakes? Everything.

**✅ **Maggie is fighting to defend our democracy, protect reproductive freedom, and safeguard healthcare and food assistance from the biggest cuts in American history.

**❌ ****Her opponent? Lily Tang Williams is a far-right extremist who’s pushed Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda at every turn:**
* She’s backed some of the most extreme abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions—even criminalizing doctors and patients.
* She’s said Social Security and Medicaid shouldn’t exist and wants to raise the retirement age and replace Medicaid entirely.
* She wants to eliminate the Department of Education and remove gun-free zones from our schools.

With control of the House on the line, we cannot afford to let NH-02 fall into MAGA hands. With just 1 day left until the FEC deadline, we’re running out of time to show we have what it takes to hold the line against MAGA extremism.

clean_body: A new poll shows Maggie Goodlander is locked in a neck-and-neck rematch with her extremist opponent from last year, Lily Tang Williams. | = | Peter, A new poll shows Maggie Goodlander is locked in a neck-and-neck rematch with her extremist opponent from last year, Lily Tang Williams, and= | = The stakes? Everything. ✅ Maggie is fighting to defend our democracy, protect reproductive freedom, and safeguard healthcare and food assistance from the biggest cuts in American history. ❌ Her opponent? Lily Tang Williams is a far-right extremist who’s pushed Donald Trump’s MAGA agenda at every turn: She’s backed some of the most extreme abortion bans in the country, with no exceptions—even criminalizing doctors and patients. She’s said Social Security and Medicaid shouldn’t exist and wants to raise the retirement age and replace Medicaid entirely. She wants to eliminate the Department of Education and remove gun-free zones from our schools. With control of the House on the line, we cannot afford to let NH-02 fall into MAGA hands. With just 1 day left until the FEC deadline, we’re running out of time to show we have what it takes to hold the line against MAGA extremism. = | = | = | = | = | = Thank you, Team Goodlander | | = Paid for by Maggie for Congress Maggie for Congress 131 Daniel Webster Hwy #949 Nashua, NH 03060 United States | | | ---|---|--- = =

Peter,
Sorry to bother you twice on a Sunday — but this is important.
We’ve set a big goal to raise $25,000 by midnight tomorrow. Hitting this target means we’ll have what we need to keep reaching Minnesotans in every corner of the state — listening to their concerns, lifting up their stories, and tackling the real challenges families are facing right now.
From strengthening our public schools to driving down costs and growing good-paying jobs, Governor Walz is focused on building a Minnesota where every family has a fair shot and no one gets left behind. **That’s what One Minnesota is all about.**
We’re investing in our classrooms so every kid has the chance to succeed, growing good-paying jobs right here in Minnesota, and making sure our communities have the support they need to stay safe and thrive. It’s real, tangible work — and it’s moving Minnesota forward.
[**If you can chip in $10 — or whatever feels right — before midnight tomorrow, it would go a long way toward helping us reach this goal. name: Steve Hilton
subject: It’s not just the riots.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE HILTON FOR GOVERNOR 2026
body:
| [View in Web Browser](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e21470361/VaHR0cHM6Ly9vZGIubnVjbGV1c2VtYWlsLmNvbS9hbXBsaWZ5L3YvWU00YTlKWGdGSw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsWjFBY1FkNw/qP2hpZHM9bmM0WkF1TVFBaFFubDBscw/gaGG8mQ/s0g16b17301)
| |
---
| | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
| | Dear Fellow Conservative, I’m livid. I’m frustrated. I’m appalled. [**And if you feel the same way about what’s happening in California right now, then I need you to join my campaign.**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) Because after days of rioting, looting, chaos, and violence in Los Angeles, Governor Gavin Newsom finally addressed California and the nation in primetime. In a broadcast that—just like his term as Governor—was rife with technical difficulties, Newsom failed to explain anything and took no responsibility... **While Angelenos, Californians, and the nation watched, Newsom went on a deranged 8-minute rant, making excuses for violent rioters and looters, railing about saving our democracy, and calling Trump a tyrant.** You and I know the Truth: calling in the National Guard, restoring law and order, and protecting Los Angeles doesn’t make Trump a tyrant; it makes him the leader that California needs in this moment. The real tyrant is the man who has all but explicitly endorsed these riots for political gain...the man who shut down schools, small businesses, and churches for years...the most authoritarian governor in our nation. Yes, Gavin Newsom is the TYRANT. And this is all his fault. And if you and I don’t stand up and demand an end to 15 years of unchecked Democrat rule, then the tyranny will NOT end with Gavin Newsom leaving office in 2027. The insanity, the riots, the radicalism won’t stop until it IS stopped. **** **[That’s why I’m asking you to join my campaign today.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** These L.A. riots were avoidable, and if I were Governor right now it would have been avoided. If we had proper leadership in this state, we would work WITH ICE and the Federal government to enforce immigration policy. We would have clamped down on the agitators IMMEDIATELY. Once you let a situation like this get out of control, it feeds on itself. Gavin Newsom knows this; but he let it happen anyway. He’s more focused on collecting sound bites for his foolish Presidential campaign than he is on keeping Californians safe. And as I said, the tyranny won’t end when he leaves office if we don’t demand real change. Would Kamala Harris handle this any better? Of course not! We need **_real_** leadership in California. That’s why I’m running for Governor. **[And it’s why I hope you’ll join my campaign today.](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)** Friend, it’s not just the riots; EVERYTHING is falling apart all around us in this once great state.
---
* Crime is up.
* Homelessness is exploding.
* Public schools are failing.
* Housing is unaffordable.
* Businesses and families are fleeing.

---
_**This election is our last best hope to save California.**_ _****_ _**We can create a new era of bold, common-sense leadership that will make California Golden Again.**_
So I'm calling on every proud patriot who wants to turn things around:
[**Will you chip in $26, $50, $100 or more to help me Make California Golden Again?**](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.) Join me—and let's get to work.
---
**Steve Hilton** Republican Candidate for Governor of California
---
[DONATE](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.)
---
**P.S.** Our end-of-quarter fundraising deadline is right around the corner. We need to put out a strong report to show the radical Democrats how powerful our movement to Make California Golden Again is. **[Click here to donate $50, $26, or $15](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.). **Even a small donation of $5 adds up if everyone chips in.
---
|
---
| | | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e21470361/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuZmFjZWJvb2suY29tL1RoZVN0ZXZlSGlsdG9uLw/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsWjFBY1FkNw/qP19ubGlkPXJwQmZhNVFIU2cmX25oaWRzPW5jNFpBdU1RQWhRbmwwbHM/gaGG8mQ/s5r148d378c) | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e21470361/VaHR0cHM6Ly94LmNvbS9TdGV2ZUhpbHRvbng/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsWjFBY1FkNw/qP19ubGlkPTR1YnBiV0p5UHAmX25oaWRzPW5jNFpBdU1RQWhRbmwwbHM/gaGG8mQ/sdgdc42a1a8) | [](https://link.email.freethinkerdaily.com/click/e21470361/VaHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuaW5zdGFncmFtLmNvbS9zdGV2ZWhpbHRvbng/SZW1haWxfZnJlZXRoaW5rZXJkYWlseV9jb20yNTA2Mjk/LbmNsWjFBY1FkNw/qP19ubGlkPVV6UE1ra3RCdzQmX25oaWRzPW5jNFpBdU1RQWhRbmwwbHM/gaGG8mQ/s3k4017e3b7)

body:
ELIZABETH PANNILL FLETCHER FOR CONGRESS [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP10/1/82676/images/Non-Re-Elect%20Logo.png]
It’s been a while since you’ve heard from me, so in case you need a quick refresher, I’m Gordon, Lizzie’s campaign treasurer.
My job is to manage the campaign’s budget and make sure we have the resources to power our efforts all year long. That includes keeping our campaign office open as a hub for organizing, outreach, and community-building in every corner of TX-07.
DONATE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250629?refcode=lpfe250629]
Right now, we’re working hard to meet our goals ahead of the FEC quarterly deadline tomorrow night —a key moment to show the strength of this campaign and enthusiasm to re-elect Lizzie and help Democrats in Texas and across the country win, too. And with all that’s coming our way, including rumors that President Trump wants Texas to redraw its congressional maps, we need to show how strong this campaign is in dollars and cents.
Your contribution today helps us hit this critical deadline, and monthly recurring contributions that help us plan ahead and keep the focus on organizing—not just fundraising.
BECOME A RECURRING DONOR [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250629?refcode=lpfe250629&recurring=1]
DONATE $7.77 PER MONTH (DISTRICT TX07) [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250629?refcode=lpfe250629&amount=7.77&recurring=1]
DONATE $20.26 PER MONTH (MIDTERM ELECTION YEAR) [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250629?refcode=lpfe250629&amount=20.26&recurring=1]
DONATE $70 PER MONTH (WEEKS LEFT TO ELECTION DAY) [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250629?refcode=lpfe250629&amount=81&recurring=1]
With a potential redistricting fight looming in Texas and daily assaults from this administration, Team Lizzie needs to stay ready so we can mobilize quickly and effectively—and your support helps us do exactly that.
Thanks,
Gordon
P.S. If a recurring contribution isn’t doable today, that’s okay! Contributions of all types and sizes support our campaign efforts—and all are appreciated. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/lpfe250629?refcode=lpfe250629]

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: Such a wild ride
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out.
#

Hola, Peter. It’s Ruben.
You might be wondering how this kid...
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=1&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
...ended up where I am now.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=2&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
Let me take you back to the beginning. It all started in the apartment I shared with my mom and my sisters. It was tough. I was sleeping on the floor because that’s all we could afford.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=3&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
I knew I had to do whatever it took to build a better life for us. I worked a bunch of jobs all through school to help make ends meet.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=4&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
Thanks to my family, my community, and a lot of hard work, I got into Harvard. But before I graduated, I enlisted in the Marines to serve the country that gave me so much.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=5&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
I deployed to al Anbar, Iraq with my brothers in arms. They called us “Lucky Lima”, but our luck turned eventually. We ended up the hardest hit Marine unit of the entire Iraq war, and I lost some of my best friends over there.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=6&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
You’re never the same person after something like that. And I knew I had to do something to improve things for the guys I served with, for people who grew up like me. So, I ended up running for Congress — and I won.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=7&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
Then, on January 6th, everything changed. It became clear to me that public service wasn’t just about improving the lives of the people in my community anymore — it was about defending our democracy, too.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=8&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
So, I decided to run for U.S. Senate. I took on one of Trump’s most devoted supporters. It was one of the hardest fought and most competitive elections in the country, but I defeated her.
[](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=9&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out.
But in the years since, I’ve learned a thing or two. I know that it’s the people like my mom, my old boss who let me fill out college applications on the job, the librarian that believed in me, and the Marines I fought beside who are going to suffer because of what Trump is trying to do.
I also learned a thing or two about beating these clowns. And for the next four years, I’m going to be a thorn in their side. I am not going to stop working to defend what makes this country great — and to build on it so that my kids can live the American Dream.
[**If you are still with me, please. It’d mean a lot if you could chip in before our this FEC deadline on Monday. I can’t do this work alone — never could.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-june25.8rdpPa&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=10&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1061?c0=ruben-em-june25.vQepXC&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=29&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)**
---

| **[Donate $25](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1046?c0=ruben-em-june25.2meeNP&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=30&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1039?c0=ruben-em-june25.aRoiY-&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=31&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)**

****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1040?c0=ruben-em-june25.59IiEg&refcode=em250629-2-90&t=32&akid=3906%2E734936%2E6m39BL)**

clean_body: Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out. Hola, Peter. It’s Ruben. You might be wondering how this kid... ...ended up where I am now. Let me take you back to the beginning. It all started in the apartment I shared with my mom and my sisters. It was tough. I was sleeping on the floor because that’s all we could afford. I knew I had to do whatever it took to build a better life for us. I worked a bunch of jobs all through school to help make ends meet. Thanks to my family, my community, and a lot of hard work, I got into Harvard. But before I graduated, I enlisted in the Marines to serve the country that gave me so much. I deployed to al Anbar, Iraq with my brothers in arms. They called us “Lucky Lima”, but our luck turned eventually. We ended up the hardest hit Marine unit of the entire Iraq war, and I lost some of my best friends over there. You’re never the same person after something like that. And I knew I had to do something to improve things for the guys I served with, for people who grew up like me. So, I ended up running for Congress — and I won. Then, on January 6th, everything changed. It became clear to me that public service wasn’t just about improving the lives of the people in my community anymore — it was about defending our democracy, too. So, I decided to run for U.S. Senate. I took on one of Trump’s most devoted supporters. It was one of the hardest fought and most competitive elections in the country, but I defeated her. Back when I was that kid sleeping on the floor of our apartment, I never would’ve guessed this is how things would turn out. But in the years since, I’ve learned a thing or two. I know that it’s the people like my mom, my old boss who let me fill out college applications on the job, the librarian that believed in me, and the Marines I fought beside who are going to suffer because of what Trump is trying to do. I also learned a thing or two about beating these clowns. And for the next four years, I’m going to be a thorn in their side. I am not going to stop working to defend what makes this country great — and to build on it so that my kids can live the American Dream. If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly. | | ** | | | | | | | ** We’ve built an incredible team over the last two years. Thank you for continuing to be a part of it. Semper Fi, Ruben Paid For By Gallego for Arizona Use of military rank, job titles, and photographs in uniform do not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department of Defense.

subject: this will send a message to the GOP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
| | |
---
Peter,

If you saw my email yesterday, you'll know **[I need your help to reach my $50,000 end-of-quarter goal by midnight tomorrow](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110510094/554570925/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk525-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQzNDc5My0zODU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rcVEVEzAtm0N1yVplQCd8B7HmMWN1XJGZfi44GOcBo=)** , because strong fundraising data is the best way to send the GOP a message that they cannot afford to ignore – namely, that their _Big, Ugly Bill _is massively unpopular.
But there's another critical reason why your support is so important: **By**** coming after the fundraising platform grassroots Democrats use to chip in toward campaigns like mine, and causes that align with o****ur values****,**** the Trump administration and Republicans in Congress are trying to _shut us up_ and _shut us out_ of the political conversation for good.**
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110510095/554570926/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk525-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQzNDc5My0zODU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rcVEVEzAtm0N1yVplQCd8B7HmMWN1XJGZfi44GOcBo=)
**[Please chip in $5 or more now to help me ensure they do not succeed.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110510096/554570927/-1711732667?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&refcode=jtk525-fr-nd&recurring=0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MDM4NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlYWQzNDc5My0zODU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=4rcVEVEzAtm0N1yVplQCd8B7HmMWN1XJGZfi44GOcBo=)**
Because of the Supreme Court, political donations all count as protected free speech.
And when I last ran for reelection, grassroots supporters like _you_ used ActBlue to speak up, by making nearly _50,000 small-dollar donations totaling over $5 MILLION_** ** to help me keep one of Washington state's Senate seats blue.
So after Democrats brought in about TWICE as much as Republicans from small-dollar donors last cycle,**the GOP is _fed up_ with regular people speaking up with their dollars to power candidates who will check their overreach, or threaten their majorities, like me.**
Since the American public is the only guardrail in the way of them and absolute rule, their only option is to squash the people power on our side.
**In short, they are terrified of you.**
And while they have a trifecta in the federal government, they're trying to lock in their power by stamping out any and all opposition.

_We can't let them. We WON'T._
And until their unlawful, un-American scheme succeeds, the best way to show that we won't be silenced so easily is by ensuring I have the resources to keep making your voice heard in the Other Washington, whether they like it or not.

name: Sarah McBride HQ
subject: This email really matters. Please let us explain

body:
You’re probably receiving a lot of emails asking for your donation right now.
#
If your inbox looks anything like ours, you’re probably receiving a ton of emails asking for your donation. **Here’s why this one really matters.**
Our FEC fundraising deadline is tomorrow at midnight, and we’re **$7,500 short** of our goal — but this moment is about more than just the numbers. It’s about how we respond to the threats in front of us.
Do we let Trump and his MAGA allies overwhelm us with disinformation, fear, and authoritarian tactics?
_Or do we fight back?_
Sarah is in the halls of power every day, doing the work to counter the harm caused by this administration and deliver real solutions to lower costs, expand paid leave, tackle gun violence, and save our democracy.
[**This grassroots team is what makes Sarah’s urgent work possible, and this deadline is our chance to show the strength behind our shared fight when our report is released to the public. Can you chip in $5 to help us cross the finish line?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250629-2?refcode=em20250629-2139&amount=5&refcode2=2139_21716_BcBO7H&akid=2139%2E21716%2EBcBO7H)
**[Donate $5 »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mcb-em-20250629-2?amount=5&refcode=em20250629-2139&refcode2=2139_21716_BcBO7H&akid=2139%2E21716%2EBcBO7H)**
Thank you,
Team McBride

_And the worst part is, our young people are falling for their lies._

If we’re going to stop the scourge of socialism in our country, we must all band together and take a stand - and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. **I have a track record of fighting against the socialism that has infected our nation.**

clean_body: | | | Do you think socialism is a threat to American freedom? | | The days of moderate Democrats are over. Today, the party proudly supports socialism, with its most prominent members even calling themselves proud socialists who want to end capitalism. And the worst part is, our young people are falling for their lies. If we’re going to stop the scourge of socialism in our country, we must all band together and take a stand - and that’s why I’m reaching out to you today. I have a track record of fighting against the socialism that has infected our nation. Now, I want YOU to take a stand against socialism, so I put together a poll to show the world we will NEVER be a socialist country. Let me know where you stand. There’s no question that our region should be an example for the rest of the country.

**Unfortunately, today’s administration is led by extremists focused on advancing their fringe political agenda. They’ve shown little interest in caring about the people I represent.**

As a mother and an Angeleno, I'm worried about the future of our county. That's why as a legislator and activist, I'm stepping up to do something about it.

In Congress, it’s my promise that every vote I make will be grounded in whether or not it truly meets the needs of this district - removing barriers to affordable housing and healthcare, combating climate change, fighting for good jobs, and defending the rights of our LGBTQ+ friends and family from far-right attacks.

That’s why I’m proud to represent CA-30, and it’s why I’m asking for your support:

[**We're officially 24 hours from our FEC deadline, and we have to close strong. If you can, please pitch in $3 today to help us meet the mark.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110510527/554572057/-319689629?refcode=em-6.29.25-all-2-a&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiYjMwZDI0YWItM2E1NS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=a_Vui5Mk_hyPSCl2hRAJ_htwgLErUxz3aK8YOcVATbM=)

body:
My uncle Donald should not be anywhere near the Oval Office...

|
---
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110511064/554574039/-1903694003?refcode=250629_MaryTrump_Personal&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84NDI2NiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4N2Y3OWQwYi0zZDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ebam0BlGYxZOdafgQgqo-d8DqMt5eVS4bKylyfpfdLc=)** Friend, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald should not be _anywhere_ near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. _Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch._ This fight is personal for me, friend, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. **I am committed to fighting back, but I am under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it.
In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must:
1. _**Flip the House.** The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power._

2. _**Take Back the Senate**. We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule._

3. _**Take the fight to the States.** We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures._

4. _**Win in 2025.** Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections._

**Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle.**

clean_body: My uncle Donald should not be anywhere near the Oval Office... | = Friend, I never needed political pundits or psychologists to tell me that my uncle Donald should not be anywhere near the Oval Office. I spent much of my childhood in the very house where Donald grew up. The cruel, weak, and deeply insecure man who brought our democracy to the brink of disaster is the same man I have always known. Seeing him sworn in for a second time was an absolute gut punch. This fight is personal for me, friend, and as more people lose their jobs or have their rights and freedoms trampled, it’s becoming personal for them, too. I am committed to fighting back, but I am under no illusion about the uphill battle we face. We need everyone to speak up. = | = "Donate $25" = "Donate other amount" I launched the Democracy Defense Fund to build a grassroots movement to secure our electoral system from Donald and the authoritarian traitors who seek to destroy it. In order to finally defeat Donald once and for all, we must: 1. Flip the House. The GOP’s majority is historically small and ripe for the taking, and if we retake the House, we can put a critical check on Donald’s power. 2. Take Back the Senate. We need a Democratic majority in the Senate to fight back against judicial appointments and prevent Donald from securing a generation of MAGA rule. 3. Take the fight to the States. We must continue to win critical gubernatorial elections and invest in flippable down-ballot races that have the potential to push back on Donald’s dangerous agenda through state legislatures. 4. Win in 2025. Virginia, New Jersey, Louisiana, and Mississippi all have important legislative elections in 2025, and both New Jersey and Virginia will also hold gubernatorial elections. Winning big in these races would shift the narrative of GOP dominance and give Democrats serious momentum heading into a pivotal 2026 election cycle. = | = "" | = "" | = "" | = "" In solidarity, Dr. Mary L. Trump = OHDC 545 E. Town St. Columbus, OH 43215 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please . [content goes here] OHDC 545 E. subject: Falling short means falling behind, and that’s simply not an option
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20250629-1403-foote&t=1001&akid=1403%2E342411%2E-Y1yhI ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

We won’t beat around the bush. The FEC’s end-of-quarter fundraising
deadline is tomorrow, and we’re tracking behind our $40,000 goal. Take a
look:

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250629-2-movement.JD28G2&refcode=em20250629-1403&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1002&akid=1403%2E342411%2E-Y1yhI ]END OF QUARTER GOAL: $40,000. DONATE BY JUNE 30.

Meeting each goal isn’t a numbers game — it’s how we strengthen this
grassroots movement. Every dollar raised powers our Squad with the tools
needed to fight back against ring-wing attacks, defend our democracy, and
elect more progressive champions.

Falling short means falling behind. And with far-right forces pouring
money into defeating our movement, that’s not something we can afford.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250629-2-movement.JD28G2&refcode=em20250629-1403&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1003&akid=1403%2E342411%2E-Y1yhI ]Can you pitch in $3 before tomorrow’s midnight deadline
to help close the gap? This is how we build lasting power — from the
ground up.

[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/19213?c0=svfem-20250629-2-movement.JD28G2&refcode=em20250629-1403&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1022&akid=1403%2E342411%2E-Y1yhI ]Contribute ››

In solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1403%2E342411%2E-Y1yhI

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated as follows: 8.33% to each of Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, Rooted in Community Leadership PAC, Politivist PAC, and For the Children PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

name: Keith
subject: I'm suing the Trump administration again
disclaimer_text: paid for by the Keith Ellison for Attorney General committee, PO Box 17224, Minneapolis, MN 55417
body:
Peter,

I recently joined a coalition of 21 attorneys general to sue the Trump administration for illegally slashing billions in funding—without warning or justification—from states and other entities that people count on.

Under orders from Trump and the so-called Department of Government Efficiency (DOGE)—previously led by Elon Musk—federal agencies are eliminating support for everything from education to public safety to fighting hunger.

To justify this, they’re invoking a single, five-word clause buried deep in federal regulations. But that doesn’t give them the right to ignore the Constitution, override Congress, and abandon Americans in need.

The Trump administration’s use of this legal gimmick reveals a deep and utter disregard for the rule of law. I won’t stand for that—so I’m taking them to court to put a stop to it.

Peter, I can’t do this work without people like you. And right now, our campaign is falling short of our end-of-quarter fundraising goal. We need your help to close the gap before midnight tomorrow.

Our records show you’re still eligible for the Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program. That means you can donate up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and get a full refund from the Minnesota Department of Revenue.

Peter, will you make your refundable $75 contribution before midnight tomorrow to help us keep the Trump administration in check?

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
CHIP IN $10 NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250629ke?express_lane=true&amount=10&refcode=express_lane_10]
CHIP IN $25 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250629ke?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=express_lane_25]
CHIP IN $75 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250629ke?express_lane=true&amount=75&refcode=express_lane_75]
CHIP IN $150 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250629ke?express_lane=true&amount=150&refcode=express_lane_150]
CHIP IN $250 NOW [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250629ke?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=express_lane_250]
OTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250629ke?refcode=other]

Thank you,

Keith Ellison

Minnesota's Political Contribution Refund (PCR) program reset on January 1. You can now use your 2025 PCR to contribute up to $75 (or $150 for couples) and receive a full refund from the State of Minnesota.

Please take advantage of your PCR and make a REFUNDABLE $75 DONATION so Keith can continue fighting to help people afford their lives and live with safety, dignity, and respect.

CONTRIBUTE [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em250629ke?refcode=body&amount=25]

name: Wes Moore
subject: The constraint that could mean we don’t reach our goal
body:
I'll get right into it.
# [](https://act.wesmoore.com/go/8?t=1&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)
Hey Peter, it’s Wes.
I’ll get right into it: Our first end-of-quarter deadline since Maryland’s fundraising freeze lifted is tomorrow night, and we’re going into it with a _huge_ disadvantage.
Maryland law requires us to stop fundraising when the state legislature is in session, _which means we can only fundraise for 75% of the year._
Potential opponents -- including Republicans who have already jumped in the race -- may not have the same constraints. With just hours left to go, we need to close the gap as soon as we can.
**[Will you chip in $5 or any amount to power our campaign today? We rely on folks like you to reach each and every milestone.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250629-2?refcode=em-20250629-2&refcode2=246_1086043_DFb3-R&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)**
Our vision for Maryland -- investing in schools, granting well-deserved second chances, and building an economy that leaves no one behind -- **relies on a movement to make it a reality.**
Small-dollar donations from people like you are the only way we’ll stay in this fight. If we close this gap, we can continue making progress for Maryland. _If we can’t close the gap, we’ll need to make tough decisions to make ends meet._
**[So Peter, please, chip in $5 before tomorrow’s big deadline to support our campaign.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250629-2?refcode=em-20250629-2&refcode2=246_1086043_DFb3-R&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)**
**[Donate $5 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250629-2?amount=5&refcode=em-20250629-2&refcode2=246_1086043_DFb3-R&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)**
I’m so grateful to have the support of folks like you, Peter.
Elevate,
Wes Moore
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-20250629-2?source=em-20250629-2&refcode2=246_1086043_DFb3-R&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)
* * *
**[Donate »](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/wes-em-footer?refcode=em-20250629-2&t=2&refcode2=246_1086043_DFb3-R&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)**
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.wesmoore.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)

* [Unsubscribe](https://act.wesmoore.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=246%2E1086043%2EDFb3-R)

name: Team Obando-Derstine
subject: we won’t get over this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carol for PA
body:
Ryan Mackenzie is doing everything he can to support Mitch McConnell’s reckless agenda. Just like McConnell, he’s more interested in catering to billionaires and special interests than standing up for the families he represents.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110511629/554575666/1877634325?refcode=BLU_EM_CODC_2025-06-29_2&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNjIvMS8xMTc2MjgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMzNkMjdmOTQtM2U1NS1mMDExLThmN2MtNjA0NWJkZmU4ZTljIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=TXJ9TLI2aqoheIpHH6d7EpqigBo_z967W_UjsluNa3o=)
---
Peter, it’s never been more clear: out-of-touch Republican leadership is happy to brush off your concerns about losing healthcare coverage, saying that you’ll **“get over it”**.

**Seriously?!**

These cuts pose a major risk to the health of millions. Medicaid is a lifeline for thousands across PA-07, and we won’t stand by while wealthy politicians like Mitch McConnell and Ryan Mackenzie dismiss the struggles of working families.

Ryan Mackenzie is doing everything he can to support Mitch McConnell’s reckless agenda. Just like McConnell, he’s more interested in catering to billionaires and special interests than standing up for the families he represents.

**Mackenzie was the deciding vote for Trump’s Big, Bad Bill, which cut taxes for the wealthy while cutting the benefits of hardworking Pennsylvanians.**

name: John Hickenlooper
subject: not your typical politician
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazie Hirono For Hawaii**
body:
When I first arrived in Washington to serve Colorado in the US Senate, I’ll be honest: it was a lot to take in.

|
#
---
_Peter, this is Mazie. Below is a message from my colleague Sen. John Hickenlooper, who is running for re-election in Colorado. Please read his message below._ [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110511944/554576699/-30801677?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20250629_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWJlZTI2NS00MDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN7GjbltIxLHQJ1l2W6mrVzIyuQE66IsW5lAdTfoqI0=) Peter, when I first arrived in Washington to serve Colorado in the US Senate, I’ll be honest: it was a lot to take in. See, I had served in public office before, but I was still *far* from being a typical politician. And I knew all too well about Washington’s reputation of partisanship and gridlock. [_**I’m going to tell you more about how I’m breaking through the noise in Washington and delivering results for working families — but first, will you consider splitting a donation between Sen. Mazie Hirono and my campaign to keep this Senate seat blue?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110511945/554576700/-30801677?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20250629_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWJlZTI2NS00MDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN7GjbltIxLHQJ1l2W6mrVzIyuQE66IsW5lAdTfoqI0=) | [DONATE NOW →](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110511946/554576701/-30801677?amount=&refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20250629_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWJlZTI2NS00MDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN7GjbltIxLHQJ1l2W6mrVzIyuQE66IsW5lAdTfoqI0=)
---
My path to serving in the US Senate looked a little different from the typical politician you’ll find in Washington. I’m a laid-off geologist who became a local brewer, and I first ran for Mayor of Denver because the concerns of everyday Coloradans simply weren’t being addressed. And since then, no matter what office I’ve held, I’ve worked to put Colorado families and communities first.
Despite the dysfunction we’ve seen from Washington lately, I’m proud to say that grit, integrity, and hard work has paid off in the time I’ve served Colorado in the Senate.
I got my hands dirty working hard in the Senate to make real change for Coloradans. We invested billions of dollars to confront the climate crisis, lowered prescription drug costs, made investments to rebuild our infrastructure, and brought thousands of good-paying manufacturing jobs back to America.
And in this unprecedented and critical moment, I’m fighting tooth and nail to oppose Trump’s cruel cuts to Medicaid, protect Colorado’s public lands, and preserve all of the progress we’ve made over the past few years.
**Americans don't want to see more chaos and dysfunction in Washington — they’re counting on us to deliver real relief and progress on the issues that matter most, and that’s what we’ll always do.**
[_**If you believe our country deserves more results and fewer political games, will you split a donation between my campaign and Mazie today? We really need to prevent extremists from flipping this seat red and bringing more dysfunction to DC →**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110511947/554576702/-30801677?refcode=AU_MKH_FR_TAN_EOQ_AC_20250629_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDUvMS83MTU3NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZWJlZTI2NS00MDU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=eN7GjbltIxLHQJ1l2W6mrVzIyuQE66IsW5lAdTfoqI0=)

name: Team Wiley
subject: This is on us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Wiley Nickel for North Carolina**
body:
It’s up to us to rally together and defend North Carolina values. |
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110512090/554577139/-1960556440?refcode=AU_GWN_FR_GEN_RES_AC_20250629_PM2_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJmNmM2MzEzYy00MTU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=gUd-Y1S8a0x1_MfkZyY_v_4RqXOeUXf8ZSFctGrqiTk=)
---
