name: Deb Haaland
subject: re: Can I send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P
body:
Cooking has always been a way for me to foster connection and build community.
#
Friend, it’s Deb Haaland. I’m running for Governor of New Mexico and Mandela Barnes and The Long Run said I could reach out to you.
One thing you should know about me is that **I love to cook.**
My love of cooking New Mexican cuisine started early, thanks to the hours I spent watching my grandmother bake bread in her mud oven and stir huge pots of posole. She wouldn’t let us kids in the kitchen while she cooked, but I’d perch myself outside and watch her through the window for hours. I still hold those memories close as I prepare my favorite traditional New Mexican dishes.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.uQL3Ri&refcode=em250529-1-nor&refcode2=5577.196590.YdUtoD&t=1&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)
---
_New Mexico chiles – the best in the world!_
**There’s something powerful about connecting with others over a home cooked meal.** When I was in law school at UNM, I’d make chicken green chile stew for student gatherings, and I made that same dish for my Congressional colleagues during the 2019 winter holiday season. I even cooked chile and tortillas for the water protectors when I traveled to Standing Rock during the protests against the Dakota Access Pipeline.
Cooking became more than a hobby after I decided to start my own salsa business. I worked out of a commercial kitchen and bought my red chile pequin from a farm in northern New Mexico. I’d prepare my salsa and deliver jars to mom-and-pop shops across the state, often with Somáh riding with me in the back seat.
[](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.uQL3Ri&refcode=em250529-1-nor&refcode2=5577.196590.YdUtoD&t=2&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)
---
_Here’s Somáh posing with jars of my homemade salsa. Kids in New Mexico start early... 🌶️_
**For me, cooking has always been a way to foster connection and build community, which is exactly what we’re doing now as we grow our campaign for New Mexico.** I’ve had the chance to sit down with New Mexicans in living rooms and at kitchen tables to hear about their lives, their struggles, and their hopes for the future. Every conversation is another reminder of the incredibly high stakes in this race – and proof that if we organize around our shared values, we will win.
[**Will you split $5 between my campaign and The Long Run today? If you donate through this link, I’ll even send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole!**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.uQL3Ri&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=3&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)
_If you 've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly._
| | **[Donate $5](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1281?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.6TJzVv&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=22&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)**
---
****
| **[Donate $25](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1273?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.zjEvD6&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=23&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $50](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1274?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.FuMTfl&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=24&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)**
---
****
| **[Donate $100](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1275?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.8ycPwh&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=25&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)**
---
****
| | **[Donate $250](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1266?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.OENWMZ&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=26&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)**
---
****
| **[Other Amount](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1271?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.QL4Y0M&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=27&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)**
---
****
Happy cooking,
Deb 🌶️
P.S. Throughout my life, cooking has helped me bring my community together – and bringing people together is exactly how we’ll win this campaign. [**If you make a donation of any amount to my campaign and The Long Run through this link, I’ll be sure to send you my recipe for green chile chicken posole so you can cook it for your friends and family.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/go/1212?c0=partner_ms_dh_em_longrun.uQL3Ri&refcode=em250529-1-nor&t=28&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you. We'd hate to see you go, but if you'd like you can [**unsubscribe here**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=29&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD). You can also [**sign up to receive fewer emails.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/fewer-emails/?source=em-footer&t=30&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)
The Long Run PAC is funded by grassroots donors giving what they can, when they can. [**Make a contribution to The Long Run PAC today.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/longrunpac-em-footer?refcode=em-footer&t=31&refcode2=5577_196590_YdUtoD&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)
Submit this form to [**update your contact information.**](https://act.mandelabarnes.com/signup/update-contact-info/?source=em-footer&t=32&akid=5577%2E196590%2EYdUtoD)
Paid for by The Long Run PAC, P.O. Box 597
Milwaukee, WI 53201, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.

# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/110512518/554577895/-896966196?refcode=AU_SMP_FR_GEN_RES_AC30_20250629_PM2_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82ODY3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJjYjU4MmU3OC00MzU1LWYwMTEtOGY3Yy02MDQ1YmRmZThlOWMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-VeZhVquOUYkLnPCwLSfiaGwa25yXli_dcc6JBZaI1E=)
Breaking news, team: **GOP Senator Thom Tillis just announced he is not seeking re-election in North Carolina.** This represents a prime opportunity to flip a red seat **BLUE**. ☀️️To all Democrats, please don’t click away from this important message: 🇺🇸 ️We know it’s a weekend, so we’ll get straight to the point: **We’re asking you to contribute $3 to the DNC ahead of tomorrow’s end-of-quarter fundraising deadline.**
Republicans have already proven that they won’t stand up to Trump’s abuses of power, so we need to elect as many Democrats as possible who will. That work demands a strong, organized Democratic Party leading the way.
But the truth is that less than one percent of the people receiving these messages pitch in. We’re counting on all Democrats who know how important this moment is to step up.
[**If fighting back against Trump and electing Democrats at all levels of government matters to you, then we’re asking you to pitch in $3 to support the DNC today. National Republicans have already come close to flipping OR-06 twice, and if we leave any weakness in our end-of-quarter report, they won’t hesitate to go all in with dark-money attack ads to take Andrea down. We set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of the month to ensure our team has the resources we need to keep Andrea in Congress to bring down costs, defend Oregon’s working families, and push back on Trump’s culture-war agenda. But with just one day left before time runs out, we’re still running $2,186 short of our goal. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | = | = | | = | = | | = | = Thank you, Team Salinas | This email was sent to: dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a key way for us to stay in touch and make sure you get the latest updates from our campaign.
